Psalms33:9 Isi coyi'reenna kalqe kalaqantino; isi hajajeenna baalunkuri xawo fulino.
Psalms33:10 Kaaliiqi dagate mala diiganno; hedonsano wo'mitannokki gede assanno.
Psalms33:11 Isi mali kayinni hegerera hee'ranno. Wodanisi hedono beettu beettira sa'anno.
Psalms33:12 Kaaliiqi Maganonsa ikkino manni ba'raa'rinoho; isire assi're doodhinonsa gosa ba'raadhinote.
Psalms33:13 Kaaliiqi iima gordoho hee're laanno; mannu baalu assannoreno afanno.
Psalms33:14 Ayirradu barcimisira hee're, baattote aana nooha baala la""anno."
Psalms33:15 Wo'munku wodana kalaqinohu, loosonsa baala egennino."
Psalms33:16 Moote olantote batinyinni diinasi diqeelanno; wolqaataamuno wolqasi batinyinni qeelle diafi'ranno.
Psalms33:17 Olu faradinni qeelle afi'nanni yaa haafaho; faradu wolqa diinu anganni digatissanno.
Psalms33:18 Kuneeti Kaaliiqi ille waajjitannosirenna, bagamannokkiha baxillesi addaxxitannore la'anno."
Psalms33:19 Lubbonsa reyotenni gatisanno; hudete yannarano itisannonsa.
Psalms33:20 Kaa'laanchinkenna wonqonke Kaaliiqaatina, ninke iso hexxineemmo."
Psalms33:21 Qullaawu su'misinni addaxxineemmona, wodaninke isinni hagiidhanno."
Psalms33:22 Kaaliiqa ballo, ate addaxxinoommonte gede, bagamannokkihu baxillikki ledonke hee'ro."
Psalms34:1 Kaaliiqa wo'manka woyite galateemmosi; galatisino wo'manka woyite afii'yanni dibaxxanno.
Psalms34:2 Loosisi daafira Kaaliiqa wo'mu wodani'yanni galaxxeemmo; gadadaammuno tenne macciishshite hagiidhito.
Psalms34:3 Amme, ane ledo Kaaliiqi lowimma kulle; mittimmatenni su'masi ayirrinso."
Psalms34:4 Kaaliiqa huucci'rummo, isino dawarie; waajjishannori baalunkunnino gatisie."
Psalms34:5 Isiwa shiqqannorira albinsa xawanno; horonta diirraabbanno.
Psalms34:6 Ani qarraataamu Kaaliiqiwa hige raarummo; isino macciishshie, qarri'ya baalunkunni gatisie."
Psalms34:7 Kaaliiqi sokkaasinchi Kaaliiqa waajjitannori ledo hee're agarannonsa; bushu coyi baalunkunnino gatisannonsa.
Psalms34:8 Kaaliiqi shaqqado ikkinota shiqqine la'e; iso golosi assi'rino manchi ba'raa'rinoho.
Psalms34:9 Waajjitannosiri mittoreno dihooggannona, mannisi baalu Kaaliiqa waajje!"
Psalms34:10 Doobbiyu nafa sagale hooge hudi'rara dandaannona, Kaaliiqa hasidhannori kayinni danchare dihoogganno."
Psalms34:11 Ooso'ya amme macciishshee! Kaaliiqa waajja rosiiseemmo'nena.
Psalms34:12 Heeshsho baxannohunna, dancha seeda diro halchannohu,"
Psalms34:13 arrawosi bunshetenni, suumesi dogatenni eemadho."
Psalms34:14 Bunshetewiinni xooqi; danchumma assi; keere hasi'ri; hoodesino ha'ri.
Psalms34:15 Kaaliiqi ille keeraano towattanno; maccasino raarensa macciishshitanno.
Psalms34:16 Baattote aaninni tajensa hunara yee, Kaaliiqi bunshe assitannore giwanno."
Psalms34:17 Keeraano raartu; Kaaliiqino macciishshinsa; qarrinsa baalunkunnino gatisinsa.
Psalms34:18 Kaaliiqi dadillunni hiiqqantinorira mule noonsa; hexxo hoogginore gatisannonsa.
Psalms34:19 Keeraanchu manchi qarri batinyeho; Kaaliiqi kayinni kunni baalunkunni gatisannosi.
Psalms34:20 Kaaliiqi miqqasi baala agaranno; miqqasi giddonni mittu nafa dihiiqqamanno.
Psalms34:21 Bushuulle bunshensa shitannonsa; keeraano gibbannorino ba'anno.
Psalms34:22 Soqqamaanosi lubbo Kaaliiqi wodanno; isiwa eeggo eannohu mittu nafa dibaanno.
Psalms35:1 Kaaliiqa ballo! Gibbannoere giwi; qassannoere qasi.
Psalms35:2 Siwiilu uddano uddidhe, wonqo amaxxite, dagge gatisie."
Psalms35:3 Bagadokki adhite shorritannoeri doogo cufi; aneno, «Lubbokki gatiseemmohe» yiie."
Psalms35:4 Shitaera hassannore baala saalunna shollinyu amadannonsa; anera busha heddannori irraabbe badhera higgo.
Psalms35:5 Kaaliiqi sokkaasinchi shorrannansa, diilallote tungoonni kuri gede ikkito."
Psalms35:6 Kaaliiqi sokkaasinchi shorre ganannansa, doogonsa shalaqonna tunsicho ikkito."
Psalms35:7 Beebbatenni huntaera woshshaadonsa wortinoena, ane amaddara qile bale untinoena,"
Psalms35:8 hedeweelcho dano iillitonsa; untino bale egemmitonsa.
Psalms35:9 Hatte yannara, anera Kaaliiqinni tashshi yaannoe; gatisasinnino hagiidheemmo."
Psalms35:10 Wo'mu wodani'yanni, Kaaliiqa, «Ate gedeehu ayi no? Ati, gadadaamo wolqaataamu anganni, buxicho gawajjannohu anganni gatisatto» yeemmo."
Psalms35:11 Bushuullu beebbatenni bushiishshue; afoommokkirira kaphunni naqqassue.
Psalms35:12 Danchumma bunshetenni qoltue; aneno callachishshue.
Psalms35:13 Ani kayinni insa xiwantu yannara lowo geeshsha dadilloommo; ita aga agure umo'ya goddaasoommo; umo'ya heeshshi asse insara huuccoommo.
Psalms35:14 Jaali'yaranna rodii'yara ikkeemmo gede ikkoommonsa; ama shii'rinohu gede hururame wi'loommo.
Psalms35:15 Insa kayinni ani qarramummo yannara qacifattaera shiqqino; egennoommokki manni gaangeessinoe; agurtannokkiha gantinoe.
Psalms35:16 Yawaawulootu qacifattinoe; sammi yite hinko ga'midhinoe.
Psalms35:17 Kaaliiqa! Mamooti geeshsha sammi yite laattoe? Ane doobbiyu gede gawajjitannoriwiinni gatisie.
Psalms35:18 Hakkawoyite Kaaliiqa! Lowo songo mereero galaxxeemmohe; lowo manni mereerono ayirriseemmohe.
Psalms35:19 Iimi uullanni ka'e gibbannoerira tashshi yoonkensa; beebbatenni gibbannoeri aana'ya qeexaa'litanno gede assitootie.
Psalms35:20 Afiinsanni danchu coyi difulanno; manna iillannokki mannira busha maltanno.
Psalms35:21 «Hiii, kune hawallella loosokki anfummo!» yitanni, su'ma huntue."
Psalms35:22 Kaaliiqa'ya! Ati afoottona sammi yitooti; Mootichi'ya ballo anewiinni faffooti.
Psalms35:23 Xaano Mooticha'ya ka'e halamie; Magano'ya ballo coyi'ramie.
Psalms35:24 Kaaliiqa Magano'ya keeraanchimmakki garinni su'ma'ya seekki; aana'ya qeexaa'litanno gede assitooti.
Psalms35:25 «Xa hashshu lubbonke hagiidhitino» yitoonke; qolteno, «Gabbi assinoommosi» yite coyidhoonke."
Psalms35:26 Qarrame hee'reenna hagiidhitannori saalfatto; mitteenni ti'maa'mito; ane aana boo'nitannori saalanna shollinye uddidho.
Psalms35:27 Keeraanchimma'ya affara baxxannorira kayinni, tashshi yoonsa; wo'manka woyite hagiidhitanni, «Soqqamaanchisi keere baxannohu Kaaliiqi, ayirradoho» yito."
Psalms35:28 Hatte yannara barra wo'ma, arrawi'ya keeraanchimmakkinna galatakki kulanno."
Psalms36:1 Bushu manchi wodana cubbu massaganno; Magano horonta diayirrisanno.
Psalms36:2 Isonoo ale tuqqanno daafira, Maganu cubbosi afannohanna hanqannosiha dilawannosi."
Psalms36:3 Afiisinni xagarronna kaphu fulanno; wodanchanna dancha coye assa agurino.
Psalms36:4 Ma'nasira hee're sarraaqo malanno; busha doogonni horonta difafanno; busha coye calla baxanno.
Psalms36:5 Kaaliiqa! Bagamannokkihu baxillikki gordoho qasi'rino; halaalaanchimmakkino gomichu geeshsha iillitino.
Psalms36:6 Keeraanchimmakki jajjabba ilaalla geeshshite; yookkino baaru diime gedeete; Kaaliiqa, ati mannanna saada towatatto."
Psalms36:7 Kaaliiqa'ya, bagamannokkihu baxillikki maala'linanniho; mannu baalunku qoolikki caalira fooliishshi'ranno."
Psalms36:8 Mannakki gooffannokki sagalenni duushshatto; hagiirru xashshono hayikkisattonsa.
Psalms36:9 Ati heeshshote buichootina, xawaabbikkinni xawaabba la'neemmo."
Psalms36:10 Bagamannokkiha baxillekki egentinoherira, shaqqillekki wodana subbinorira dirrisinsa."
Psalms36:11 Boonaleeyye gawajjitaera worte la'ootie; bushuullu shorritannoe gede assitootie.
Psalms36:12 Kuneeti bushuullu ubbe no; ubbinowiinnino kaa didandiitanno.
Psalms37:1 Hayissote gede rakke mooltannorenna, darote gede giggiltannore ikkitinohura,"
Psalms37:2 busha manna la'e giirantooti; bunshe assitannore hinaassooti.
Psalms37:3 Uullate aana keere hee'ratto gede, Kaaliiqa addaxxi; dancha coyeno assi."
Psalms37:4 Kaaliiqinni tashshi yoohe; isino wodanikki halcho wonshannohe.
Psalms37:5 Doogokki Kaaliiqira eeggo uyi'ri; iso addaxxi; isino towatannohe.
Psalms37:6 Keeraanchimmakki xawaabbu gede, halaalekkino barri arrishsho gede xawisanno."
Psalms37:7 Cincite Kaaliiqi assannore agadhi; wolootu duroo'mituro, bunshe assitannorira qiniinsaro giirantooti."
Psalms37:8 Ateno bunshete giddora eessannohena, fooggaltooti; hanqonna giirama aguri."
Psalms37:9 Bunshe assitannori murantanno; Kaaliiqa hexxitannori kayinni baatto ragidhanno.
Psalms37:10 Bushuullu shiima yannalla keeshshitanno; dargaho la'e hoogatto.
Psalms37:11 Shaqqaddu kayinni baatto ragidhanno; atootenna keere afidhe hagiidhitanno.
Psalms37:12 Bushu manchi keeraanchoho busha malanno; mulla kae suume ga'mi'ranno.
Psalms37:13 Kaaliiqi kayinni, barru iillinosita afino daafira, oso'lannosi."
Psalms37:14 Buxanenna gadadaamma shitara, dancha loossannore gorritara, bisensa fushshitanno; digaanansa gonnitanno."
Psalms37:15 Insa uminsa bise shitannonsa; digaaninsano hiiqqamanno.
Psalms37:16 Keeraanchunniti shiima jiro, bushuullunnita lowo jiro roortanno."
Psalms37:17 Bushuullu cigile hiiqqantanno; keeraano kayinni Kaaliiqi irkisannonsa.
Psalms37:18 Kaaliiqi keeraano towatannonsa; iqqinsano geedonniho.
Psalms37:19 Bushu diri dayenna disaalfattanno; hudete yannarano ikkitanno geeshshi sagale afidhanno.
Psalms37:20 Bushuullu kayinni gooffanno; Kaaliiqi baarigaarra daraarote gede giggiltanno; wiliilete gede ikkite ba'anno.
Psalms37:21 Bushu liqii'rannota ikkinnina diqolanno; keeraanchu kayinni shooshaqanno; wolehono aanno.
Psalms37:22 Kaaliiqi maassi'rinonsari baatto ragidhanno; ruminonsari kayinni murantanno.
Psalms37:23 Kaaliiqi mannu qaafo suwisanno; ha'rinshonsannino hagiidhanno.
Psalms37:24 Kaaliiqi irkisannonsa daafira, gufidhuro nafa diubbanno."
Psalms37:25 Anje'yanni kayise techo geedhimma'ya geeshsha, keeraanchu tugamanna, sirchisino hudi're huucci'ranna afe diegennoommo."
Psalms37:26 Isi wo'ma woyite callano aanno; liqiissannono; oososino maassantanno.
Psalms37:27 Bunshetewiinni xooqqe, dancha coye assittoro, sirchikkino baattote aana geedanno."
Psalms37:28 Kaaliiqi halaale baxanno daafira, keeraano dihunanno; keeraano hegerera heedhanno; bushuullu sirchi kayinni ba""anno."
Psalms37:29 Keeraano baatto ragidhanno; ise aanano hegerera heedhanno.
Psalms37:30 Keeraanchu afii hayyo rosiisanno; arrawisino taalo coyi'ranno.
Psalms37:31 Maganisi seera agadhanno; doogosi aaninni wirri diyaanno.
Psalms37:32 Bushu keeraancho duganno; shaasira hasi'ranno.
Psalms37:33 Kaaliiqi kayinni keeraancho sayise diaannosi; yoote shiqe digaramanno.
Psalms37:34 Kaaliiqa hexxittoro, hajajosino wonshittoro, baatto ragisiiseennahe ayirratto; bushuulluno ba'anna illekkinni la""atto."
Psalms37:35 Bushunna kaajjadu manchi ayirre, Libaanoosi daguwi gede bati'rinoha afoommo;"
Psalms37:36 Higummo woyite kayinni dino; dargaho lae hoogoommo.
Psalms37:37 Danchanna keeraancho mancho seekkite lai; gibbonna giwansho baxannokki manchi, sircho sa""anno."
Psalms37:38 Sao assannohu co'o yee baanno; bushu sirchino muramanno.
Psalms37:39 Keeraanote gatonsa Kaaliiqiwiinni dagganno; qarrinsa yannara isi qiishonsaati.
Psalms37:40 Isiwa eeggo e'anno daafira, Kaaliiqi kaa'le gatisannonsa; bushuullu angannino fushshannonsa."
Psalms38:1 Kaaliiqa'ya ballo, hanqikkinni ruffootie; aarikkinni gantootie."
Psalms38:2 Maxxikki qasinoe; angakkino aana'ya dirritino.
Psalms38:3 Hanqikkinni kainohunni maali'ya difayyino; cubbi'yanni kainohunni manninati'ya keere diafi'rino.
Psalms38:4 Cubbi'ya lolahu gede egemminoe; lowo duhi gede ayirrinoe.
Psalms38:5 Hambe'yanni kainohunni, mada'ya shante bobbu."
Psalms38:6 Lowo geeshsha gadadamoommo; barra wo'ma wi'lanni kadame keeshshoommo.
Psalms38:7 Fooggalunni kainohunni giiramoommo; lowo geeshsha dhiwamoommo.
Psalms38:8 Lowo geeshsha daafure shaqqoommo; dhibbunni kainohunni hakankaroommo;
Psalms38:9 Mooticha'ya halcho'ya baala maatiro egennootto; uratto'ya baala macciishshatto.
Psalms38:10 Wodana lowo geeshsha tuminoe; wolqano ba'inoe; ille'yano jaaroortino.
Psalms38:11 Mada'yanni kainohunni baxillaano'yanna jaalla'ya shiqqo gibbinoe; fiixi'yano xooqinoe.
Psalms38:12 Shitaera hasidhannoeri woshshaado wortinoe; qarrameemmota baxxannori huntannoe gara ma'litino; anera gano gana diuurrissanno.
Psalms38:13 Ani kayinni macciishshannokki macciweelo, coy'rannokki danqicha lawoommo."
Psalms38:14 Macciishsha hoogatenni kainohunni, tumo qolannokki manchi gede ikkoommo."
Psalms38:15 Kaaliiqa'ya ballo, ate hexxeemmona, Mooticha Magano'ya ati dawarattoe."
Psalms38:16 «Qarrameenna baarigaarra'ya hagiidhitoonke; uwa'yanni kainohunni aana'ya naaxxitoonke» yoommo.
Psalms38:17 Ani uwammora rahoommo; qarri'yano aani'yanni diho'lino.
Psalms38:18 Sao'ya ifaaxxeemmo; cubbi'ya daafira dadilleemmo.
Psalms38:19 Baarigaarra'ya wolqatenni no; beebbatenni gibbannoeri batidhino.
Psalms38:20 Danchumma assoommo daafira, danchumma bunshetenni qoltannoeri gibbannoe."
Psalms38:21 Kaaliiqa ballo, ati callachishshootie; Magano'ya anewiinni faffooti."
Psalms38:22 Mooticha gatisaancho'ya, rakke kaa'lie."
Psalms39:1 «Asseemmore baala qorophotenni asseemmo; arrawi'yanni sao dicoyi'reemmo; bushu manni noowa mittoreno dicoyi'reemmo» yee hedoommo.
Psalms39:2 Danqichu gede sammi yoommo; dancha coye nafa coyi'ra aguroommo; qarri'ya kayinni lede bati'ri.
Psalms39:3 Wodani'ya fooggalie; yaaddotenni kainohunni giddo giira bubbue; anino sammi yaa didandoommo.
Psalms39:4 Kaaliiqa ballo, mamoote reemmoro egensiisie; diri'ya mageeshsha ikkannoro, mageeshshi geeshsha hara'mannoro kulie."
Psalms39:5 Kuneeti diro'ya haransootto; ate kiirora, hee'reemmo yanna dinoote. Lubbote noo manni baalu diilallote gede ikke sa""annoho."
Psalms39:6 Beebballa daafurannota ikkinnina, mannu caalimma sa""annoho; duunannota ikkinnina ayi gudhannoro diafino."
Psalms39:7 Mooticha'ya, ate agurranna, ani wole dihexxeemmo."
Psalms39:8 Cubbi'ya baalunkunni gatisie; gowwootu oso'litannoe gede assitootie.
Psalms39:9 Konne baala assoottohu ateetina, afoo'ya beeshshi're sammi yeemmo."
Psalms39:10 Lowo geeshsha ganoottoe daafira, daafuroommona, kunni ka'a ledde qorichishshootie."
Psalms39:11 Manna cubbisi daafira yite rufatto; banxannire baala huqu qasanno gede assatto; mannu baalu diilallote gedeeho.
Psalms39:12 Kaaliiqa'ya ballo, huuccatto'ya macciishshi; raare'ya hidhi; wi'la'ya lashshi assite la'ooti; ani tenne gobbaha di""ikkoommo; annuwa'ya gede anino shiima yanna wosinchooti."
Psalms39:13 Higeemmokkiwa ha'rammo geeshsha, hagiidheemmona hanqitootie."
Psalms40:1 Kaaliiqa cincatenni agadhoommo; isino caaqqi yiinoe; raare'yano macciishshie.
Psalms40:2 Fullannikki booninni, rirriwu giddonni fushshinoe; lekka'yano kinchu aana uurrisinoe; qaafo'yano suwisinoe."
Psalms40:3 Maganinkera ikkitannota haaro faarso afii'yara worino; konne coye lae lowo manni waajjanno; Kaaliiqano addaxxanno.
Psalms40:4 Kaaliiqa addaxxitannori, boonaleeyyete ledo hossannokkirinna kaphu maganna magansidhannokkiri maassantinoreeti."
Psalms40:5 Kaaliiqa Magano'ya assootto dhagge lowote; ate gedeehu horontanni dino; ati ninkera maala'linanni coye hedoottonke; hasaawenna coyi're gude diafeemmo!
Psalms40:6 Kakkalonna fushshaate dihasi'ratto; shilqonnitanna cubbu daafira shiqinshanni kakkalo dixa'mi'ratto; roorenkanni ati yaattota macciishshitanno macca oottoe.
Psalms40:7 Hatte yannara, «Kuneeti dayommo; anere Seeru Maxaafira borreessinoonni;"
Psalms40:8 Magano'ya hedokki wonshammora baxoommo; seerikkino wodani'yara no» yoommo.
Psalms40:9 Mannikki songinowa keeraanchimmakki duduweemmo; Kaaliiqa, afoottonte gede afoo'ya gamba diassi'roommo."
Psalms40:10 Assite gatisoottoe gara dimaaxoommo; ammanamakkinna keeraanchimmakki songote mereero duduweemmo; bagamannokki baxxillekkinna halaalekki kula diagureemmo.
Psalms40:11 Kaaliiqa maarokki anewiinni xeertissooti; bagamannokki baxillikkinna halaalikki wo'manka woyite agaroe.
Psalms40:12 Kiiro anfoonnikki bunshe doyissitinoe; cubbu amadeennae laa hoogoommo; kiiro umi'ya danancho rooreenna hexxo ba'inoe.
Psalms40:13 Kaaliiqa, eeggatena gatisie; Kaaliiqa rakke kaa'lie."
Psalms40:14 Lubbo'ya huntara hasidhannori irraabbo; qeelanto; qarrameenna hagiidhitannori saalfatte badhera higgo.
Psalms40:15 «Hiii» yitannoeri, Kaaliiqi qeeleennansa saalfatte huxuxxi yito."
Psalms40:16 Ate hasidhannori baalu hagiidhito; tashshino yoonsa; gatisaanchimmakkira galaxxitannori wo'manka woyite, «Kaaliiqi lowoho!» yito."
Psalms40:17 Mooticha'ya ani gadadaamohonna buxichoho; ati kayinni dihawoottoe; kaa'laancho'yanna gatisaancho'ya ikkoottohura rakke kaa'lie.
Psalms41:1 Gadadaammu daafira xissiisi'rannohu ba'raa'rinoho; Kaaliiqi qarru barra gatisannosi.
Psalms41:2 Kaaliiqi agare lubbotenni worannosi; baattote aanano maassaminoho yinanna hee'ranno; baarigaarrasirano sayise diaannosi.
Psalms41:3 Kaaliiqi dhiwame goxinowa hee'reenna kaa'lannosi; fayyimmano qolannosi.
Psalms41:4 Anino, «Kaaliiqa'ya, ate aana sao assoommona maarie; dhibba'yano hursie» yoommo."
Psalms41:5 Baarigaarra'ya ane aana bunshe coyidhanni, «Mamoote reya ikka? Su'misino mamaro hawama ikka?» yitanno."
Psalms41:6 Ane la'ara dagganno woyite, goowi alita dogganno; busha duduwo corte, dargunni darga sa'anni su'ma'ya huntanno."
Psalms41:7 Gibbannoeri baalu gamba yite hashaashantanno; anera busha gantanno.
Psalms41:8 «Bushu dhibbi amadinosina, xaate hakkiinni dika""anno» yitanno."
Psalms41:9 Lubbote jaali'ya hexxoommohu, ledo'ya hurbaate itinohu, anera badhe wodhinoe."
Psalms41:10 Kaaliiqa'ya ballo, baarigaarra'ya rabbisi'reemmona, maarie; fayyimmano uyie."
Psalms41:11 Baarigaarra'ya qeeltannoe gede assoottoekki daafira, baxoottoeta kunninni afoommo."
Psalms41:12 Ane danchumma assa'ya daafira yite kaa'lattoe; hegerera albakkiinni worattoe.
Psalms41:13 Israeelete Magani Kaaliiqi hegere hegerera galatamo! Hamii'ni! Hamii'ni!
Psalms42:1 Bulaa buichote waa sinsinnaabbannonte gede, Magano! Hattonni lubbo'ya ate sinsinnaabbanno."
Psalms42:2 «Mamoote iilleemma? Magani'ya albano mamoote laeemma?» yite, lubbo'ya heeshshote Magano goodhanno."
Psalms42:3 Baarigaarra'ya wo'manka woyite, «Maganikki hiikko no?» yitannae, hashshanna barra hindiiddo sagale ikkitue."
Psalms42:4 Ani albaanni hige lowo manni ledo Maganu Minira ha'ranna, ayyaana ayirrissannori galatu faarsonni Magano galattino; konne coye qaaganna wodani'ya dadillunni hiiqqami."
Psalms42:5 Lubbo'ya ballo, mayira dadillatta? Mayirano daassattae? Xaano galagale Magano gatisaancho'ya galaxxeemmona, atino iso hexxi."
Psalms42:6 Magano'ya ballo, lubbo'ya daassitannae, Yordaanoosi gobbara Hermooni Mizaari Ilaalira hee're qaageemmohe."
Psalms42:7 Foonchikki huuronni diime mimmito woshshitanni, dambalikkinna lolahikki baalu aana'yaanni hige sai."
Psalms42:8 Kaaliiqi barra, bagamannokki baxillesi soyannoe; hashsha faarso aannoe; tinino, heeshsho'ya Maganira shiqishi'reemmo huuccattooti."
Psalms42:9 Magano, «Ati digolo'yaati? Mayira hawittoe? Baarigaarra'ya gadadishshinni kainohunni, yaadanni hee'reemmohu mayiraati?» yeemmosi."
Psalms42:10 Baarigaarra'ya wo'manka woyite, «Maganikki hiikko no?» yite yaachishshannae, manninati'ya yaaddotenni manii'ri."
Psalms42:11 Lubbo'ya ballo, mayira dadillatta? Mayira daassattae? Xaano galagale Magano gatisaancho'ya galaxxeemmona, atino iso hexxi."
Psalms43:1 Magano'ya ballo! Garoommota egensiisie; anera ha'lite halaaluwiinni xeerti'rino manni ledo ati coyi'ramie; dogaanchunna bushu manniwiinni gatisie.
Psalms43:2 Magano golo'ya mayira agurattoe? Diini'ya gadadisannae yaadanni mayira hee'reemmo?
Psalms43:3 Massaggannoe gede caabbichokkinna halaalekki soyie; insano galattowa qullaawu ilaalikkiwa haadhe massitoe.
Psalms43:4 Hatte yannara, kakkallanni dargi Maganunnihuwa, hagiirsiisannoe Maganiwa mareemmo; ate Magano Magano'ya! Gingilaatunni galaxxeemmohe."
Psalms43:5 Lubbo'ya ballo! Mayira dadillatta? Mayirano daassattae? Xaano Magano gatisaancho'ya galaxxeemmona, atino iso hexxi."
Psalms44:1 Magano! Ati assoottore maccankenni macciishshinoommo; annuwankeno alba yannansara loosoottoha dhaggete looso kultinonke.
Psalms44:2 Ati daga baattonsa aaninni shorrite, ate manna baattonsara worootto; wole gosa qorichishshe, mannakki kayinni qawaaxxisootto."
Psalms44:3 Baatto ragidhinohu dibagadinsanniiti; wolqansano digatissinonsa; qiniinonsahu, ati baxattonsanna, ledonsa heedhe kaa'loottonsa daafiraati."
Psalms44:4 Magani'yanna moote'ya ateeti; mannikkirano qeelle aattohu ateeti.
Psalms44:5 Ate wolqanni diinanke qeelleemmo; su'mikkinni aananke ka'inore kandeemmo.
Psalms44:6 Digaana'ya diaddaxxeemmo; bagado'ya dihexxeemmo;
Psalms44:7 Ati kayinni diininkewiinni gatisoottonke; gibbannonkereno shollishootto.
Psalms44:8 Magano, wo'manka woyite ate adawadhineemmo; hegere geeshsha galanteemmohe."
Psalms44:9 Xa kayinni giwoottonke; shollishoottonke; olantonke ledono fula agurootto.
Psalms44:10 Diinanke xoonqeemmo gede assoottonke; gibbannonkerino mulqidhinonke.
Psalms44:11 Ge'reewu gede gorramate sayisse oottonke; dagate giddono billaallisoottonke.
Psalms44:12 Mannakki mullurira hirootto; mulla sayisse ootto.
Psalms44:13 Olliinkera heedhanno gosa mishshannonke gede, qooxeessinkera heedhannori oso'litannonkenna qacifattannonke gede assootto."
Psalms44:14 Dagate maammaashsha, mannu mereerono hii""i! Yinannire assoottonke."
Psalms44:15 Shollinyi'ya wo'manka woyite leellannae, saalu ille beeshshinoe."
Psalms44:16 Togo ikkeemmohu baarigaarra'yanna ko'mitinoeri, xontannoenna ceeggifattannoe yannaraati."
Psalms44:17 Kuni duuchunku ninke aana ikkino; ikkollana kayinni, dihamboommohe; gondoorokkino didiingoommo."
Psalms44:18 Wodaninke badhera dihigino; qaafonkeno doogokki aaninni wirri diyitino.
Psalms44:19 Kayinnilla, kaa'lannohu nookkiha moyichu mereero tugge aguroottonke; beebbu tunsichi giddo hunte ha'roottonke."
Psalms44:20 Maganinke su'ma hamboommoha ikkoommero, kaphu maganiwa wodananke qolloommoro,"
Psalms44:21 Maganu diafanno? Isi diwodanu giddo noore afannoho?
Psalms44:22 Ate daafira wo'ma woyite shinoonninke; gorrinanni ge'reewi gedeno ikkinoommo.
Psalms44:23 Kaaliiqa! Goxxootina, kainke! Kainke! Hegere geeshsha callachishshootinke."
Psalms44:24 Alba mayira go'latto? Qarrankenna kadamanke mayira hawatto?
Psalms44:25 Uullate aana diriirroommona, bisinkeno baattote qa'minona,"
Psalms44:26 Kaaliiqa ballo! Ka'e kaa'linke! Bagamannokkihu baxillikkira yite wodinke.
Psalms45:1 Wodani'ya dancha coye malanno; geewo'yano mootete kuleemmo; arrawi'ya rahino borreessaanchi biire gedeeho.
Psalms45:2 Ati manna baala roore xumaati; Maganu maassi'rinohe daafira, hasaawikki coommannoha ikkino."
Psalms45:3 Ati bareedu! Xirchikkinninna gaacheenikkinni, bagadokki amaxxi."
Psalms45:4 Joongillenna taashsha qolate, xirchikkinni qeelle afi'ratto gede gulufi; wolqaataame cigilekki jawa looso loossanno."
Psalms45:5 Maxxikki quxaminoho; hakkuno, baarigaarrakki wodanira eanno; dagano lekkakkira woroonni ubbanno."
Psalms45:6 Magano! Mootimmakki hegerete; mannakki halaalunni gashshatto.
Psalms45:7 Ati halaale baxatto; bunshe giwatto; kunnira, wole mootoollanni rooratto gede, Maganu Maganikki hagiirru buuro buurinohe."
Psalms45:8 Uddanokkira kaarbenna shitto assinoonni; daaniichu hinkonni seesiinsoonnihura mootete mine heedhe, gannanni gingilaatinni hagiidhatto."
Psalms45:9 Mootete seenni, ayirraddu soqqamannohe meenti mereero no; mootitte culku irra wodhite qiniitekkiinni uurritanno."
Psalms45:10 Beetto'ya ballo! Macciishshi; maccakkino kawa qoli; kunni ka'a fiixikki amaale adhitooti.
Psalms45:11 Moote xummekki baxino; isi mootichakkiitina ayirrisisi.
Psalms45:12 Xiroosi seenni afansha haa're abbannohe; dureeyye baxantahera yite albakkiinni loollaabbanno.
Psalms45:13 Mootete idayicho mootete mine hiitto biiffino? Uddanose culkunni seesiinsoonnite.
Psalms45:14 Biifado uddanose uddidhe mootenniwa e'anno; jaallaseno dukkisannose.
Psalms45:15 Hagiirrunninna hisanyootunni mare, mootete holgira eanno."
Psalms45:16 Moote! Annuwakki darga mookkannota lowo ooso afi'ratto; baatto baalate aanano gashshaasine assite moohisattonsa.
Psalms45:17 Su'mikki ilamate ilamara qaagamanno gede asseemmo; kunnira, hegere hegerera daga galattannohe."
Psalms46:1 Maganu golonkeetinna wolqankeeti; qarru iillannonke yanna baalate kaa'late qixxaawaho.
Psalms46:2 Kunnira, baatto shafanturo, ilaallano marte baaru giddo ubburo diwaajjineemmo;"
Psalms46:3 wayibba luulte hambiituronna, ilaalla shafanturo nafa diwaajjineemmo."
Psalms46:4 Maganu katamira, Wo'munkura Aliidihu hee'rannowa qullaawa darga, tashshi assannohu daadanno wayi no."
Psalms46:5 Kaaliiqi mereerosi noo daafira katamu dishafamanno; Kaaliiqi konne katama soodo balaxe kaa'lanno.
Psalms46:6 Daga waajjite raartu; gashshootuwano huxidhu; Maganu qoonqosi macciishshiishi woyite baattono daaqqu.
Psalms46:7 Olantote Mootichi ledonke no; Yaiqoobi Magani golonkeeti.
Psalms46:8 Maala'linanniha Kaaliiqi baattote aana loosino looso, daggine la'e!"
Psalms46:9 Baattote qacce geeshsha nooha ola uurrisanno; digaana hiiqqanno; amaxxo cancananno; wonqono giire hunanno.
Psalms46:10 Fooliishshidhe; ani Magano ikkoommotano egenne! Dagate mereeronna baattote aana ayirreemmo.
Psalms46:11 Olantote Mootichi ledonke no; Yaiqoobi Magani golonkeeti.
Psalms47:1 Daga baala, anga'ne ganne; hagiirru qaalinni Maganoho faarse."
Psalms47:2 Wo'munkura Aliidihu Kaaliiqi waajjinanniho; baatto baalate aanano isi jawa mooteeti.
Psalms47:3 Daga ninkera woroonni galtannore assino; gashshootuwano ninkera hajajantannore assino.
Psalms47:4 Ragi'neemmo baattono doorinonke; ninke ku'lineemmotino iseeti; ninkeno baxannonke mannasiiti.
Psalms47:5 Maganu ayirradu dargasi ha'ri woyite, Kaaliiqi iimira hige ha'ri yannara, ililleettenna buudu xurumbi luulo macciishshinoonni."
Psalms47:6 Galatu faarso Maganinkera faarse; galatu faarso mootenkera faarse.
Psalms47:7 Kaaliiqi baatto baalantera mootete; kunni daafira, guwishshu faarso faarsesi."
Psalms47:8 Maganu dagate moohanno; Maganu qullaawu barcimisira ofollanno.
Psalms47:9 Gosate roorrooti Abirihaami Magani manni ledo songitanno; isino baattote wolqaataammira baalaho aliidiho. Wo'munkunni roore ayirradoho.
Psalms48:1 Kaaliiqi lowoho; Maganinke qullaawu ilaalira noohura katamisira lowo geeshsha galataminoho.
Psalms48:2 Tsiyooni ilaalira noohu Maganu katami leelladohonna xumaho; kuni jawa moote katami baatto baalate hagiirre aannoho.
Psalms48:3 Kunni katami giddo Maganu ledosi hee'niro, jawaata qiisho ikkinota egensiisanno."
Psalms48:4 Kuneeti mootoolla gamba yite, Tsiyooni gawajjitara daggu yannara,"
Psalms48:5 konne katama la'e maala'lite, waajjite xooqqu."
Psalms48:6 Ilate game amaddino mancho gede, yaaddonna waajjillu amadinsa."
Psalms48:7 Wolqaataame soojjaati bubbe Terseesi markaawe assitu gede, assite cancanoottonsa."
Psalms48:8 Maganu assinore macciishshinoommo; Wo'munkura Aliidi Maganiha baxillesi anfoommo; isino konne katama hegerera keere hee'ranno gede assanno.
Psalms48:9 Magano! Qullaawa Minekki hee'ne, bagamannokkiha baxillekki qaangeemmo."
Psalms48:10 Magano! Su'mikki gobba baalate egennaminonte gede, galatikkino gobba baala iillanno; angakkirano halaalu wo'mino."
Psalms48:11 Kaaliiqa! Halaalaancho yookkinni Tsiyooni manni hagiidho; Yihudu katammara noorira tashshi yoonsa.
Psalms48:12 Maganu manna, Tsiyooni gaangaabbe; kinchu huxxi aana noo shaeno kiirre."
Psalms48:13 Huxxu daafira diinaggaabbine, katamu giddo noo qiishono buuxxine, «Kuni Magani hegerera Maganonkeeti; isino hegere geeshsha massagannonke» yitine, dagganno ilamara kultinanni."
Psalms48:14 
Psalms49:1 Ki'ne gosa baala konne coye macciishshe; baattote aana heedhinoonniri baalu wodana asse;
Psalms49:2 Aliidirinna woriidiri, dureeyyenna buxane mitteenni macciishshe."
Psalms49:3 Afii'ya hayyo coyi'ranno; wodani'ya hedo wodancha uyitanno.
Psalms49:4 Macca'ya maammaashshu widira qolummo; maammaashshu tirono gingilaate gananni kuleemmo.
Psalms49:5 Bushu manni gaangeessannoe yannara, qarru barra diwaajjeemmo."
Psalms49:6 Jironsa hexxitannore, durummansa batinyinni adawadhitannoreno diwaajjeemmo."
Psalms49:7 Mannu umosi gatisa didandaanno; lubbosi woxxate Maganoho ee afannori dino.
Psalms49:8 Reyikkinni hegerera hee'rate, baantanniri dandiinannikkiha ikkino daafira, ikkanno geeshshire ee diafanno."
Psalms49:9 
Psalms49:10 Gowwootunna jallaagootu gede, egennaammuno reyitanno gedenna, jironsano wolootaho agurte hadhannota ayino afino."
Psalms49:11 Lowo baatto noonke yite naaxxitannoha ikkiro nafa, waamma hegerera minensa ikkitanno."
Psalms49:12 Manna jirosi digatissannosi; saadate gede reyasi digattannote.
Psalms49:13 Uminsanni addaxxitannorira kuni coyi daannonsa; jironsanni qawaaxxidhannorira tini kaayyonsaati.
Psalms49:14 Gorrinara haa'ne ha'nanni ge'reewi gede, konne mannano reyo agarte no; maalinsano rahe mininsara jeennaate dirre shamanno."
Psalms49:15 Ane kayinni Maganu jeennaatu giddonni wode, reyotenni gatise isiwa haa'rannoe."
Psalms49:16 Mannu jiro afi'rironna, jiro jirote aana lexxitusiro hinaasu illenni la'ooti."
Psalms49:17 Reyanno yannara anga adhe ha'rannori dinona, jirosino ledosi dihadhannona."
Psalms49:18 Lubbotenni hee're qawaaxxi'rironna, qiniitisinni kainohunni mannu jajisiro nafa,"
Psalms49:19 isino ree, hegere geeshsha xawaabba anfannikkiwa, akaakkasiwa ha'ranno."
Psalms49:20 Wodancha nookkiha jiro duu'nino manchira, saadate gede reyasi digattannote."
Psalms50:1 Magannate Magani Kaaliiqi coyi'ranno; soojjaatinni galchimira baattote aaninni manna baala woshshanno.
Psalms50:2 Maganu xummesira kullanniri nookki katamira, Tsiyooni hee're xawanno."
Psalms50:3 Maganinke daanno; sammi diyaanno; ittanno giira albasiinni no; wolqaataame bubbe gaangaawisira no.
Psalms50:4 Mannisira yoo yaanno yannara, gordonna baatto naqaashshe asse kiidhe,"
Psalms50:5 «Kakkalotenni ledo'ya gondooro e'inore, dooraminoha manna'ya anewa gamba asse» yaanno."
Psalms50:6 Maganu yoo yaannoha ikkino daafira, gorduno halaalaanchimmasi farchi'ranno."
Psalms50:7 Manna'ya kuleemmo'nena, macciishshe""e; Israeele ki'ne aana naqqaseemmona, macciishshe; Maganu ani Magano'neeti."
Psalms50:8 Wo'manka woyite albi'yara shiqishshinanni fushshaatenna, shilqote kakkalo'ne diabbooshshi'roommo."
Psalms50:9 Lali'ne giddonni woraamo, mei'ne giddonni goco dihasi'roommo."
Psalms50:10 Dubbu moyichi baalunna kume ilaalla aana noo saada baala anete.
Psalms50:11 Gaaru cea baalanta egennoommo; dubbu kalaqami baalu aneho.
Psalms50:12 Baattonna aanase noori baalu aneha ikkino daafira, hudi're ki'nera diku'leemmo."
Psalms50:13 Woraamu maala iteemmoni? Meichu mundee ageemmoni?
Psalms50:14 Maganoho galatu kakkalo kakkalle; Wo'munkura Aliidihura xano'ne uyidhe.
Psalms50:15 Qarru barra woshshidhee; anino gatiseemmo'ne; ki'neno ayirrissinannie.
Psalms50:16 Maganu kayinni bunshe assitannore, «Seejjo'ya gibbinoonni; hajajo'yano mishshinoonnina,"
Psalms50:17 seejjeemmo'neta gibbinoonni; hajajo'yano mishshinoonni.
Psalms50:18 Mooraancho affinanni woyite ledo doddinanni; hoshsha'neno foortannori ledooti.
Psalms50:19 Afii'nera bunshe batidhino; arrawi'ne sarraaqo coyi'ranno.
Psalms50:20 Ofoltine fiixa'ne he'mitinanni; ama'ne beettono su'ma huntinanni.
Psalms50:21 Konne baala assitinanna sammi yee laummota, ane ki'ne gedeeha assitine kiirtinoonnie; xa kayinni xawoho abbooshshi're, la'inanna borooreemmo'ne."
Psalms50:22 Ki'ne ane habbinanniri, xa yeemmota wodanche; ka'a woyite kayinni huneemmo'ne; gatisanno'nehuno dihee'ranno."
Psalms50:23 Ayirrisannoehu galata kakkalannoe; hajajamannoehurano ani gatisaanchimma'ya leellisheemmosi» yaanno.
Psalms51:1 Magano! Bagamannokkihu baxillikki deerrinni maarie; maarokki batinyi deerrinni cubbo'ya agurie.
Psalms51:2 Sao'ya baala hayishshite hoolie; cubbi'yanni keereensie;
Psalms51:3 ani sao'ya egennoommo; cubbo'yano wo'manka woyite qaageemmo.
Psalms51:4 Ani cubbo loose ate aana calla sao assoommo; ati giwatto coye assoommo; ane aana yoo yaakkinna ane bunshete kiirakki garaho.
Psalms51:5 Ilamummo barrinni kayise ani bushaho; godowamummo yannanni kayise ani cubbaataamoho.
Psalms51:6 Ati halaalenna sumbe baxatto; wodani'yara egennokki wonshie.
Psalms51:7 Keeraa'meemmona, garambichunni wixie; kaadetenni roore waajji'reemmo gede hayishshie."
Psalms51:8 Hisachishannorenna tashshi assannore macciishsheemmo gede assie; hiiqqoottoti miqqa'yano hagiidhito.
Psalms51:9 Cubbo'ya la'ooti; sao'ya baalanta agurie.
Psalms51:10 Magano ballo! Keeraancho wodana kalaqie; haaronna suwashsho wodana giddo'ya worie.
Psalms51:11 Albikkinni huntootie; Qullaawa Ayyaanakki aani'yanni adhitootie.
Psalms51:12 Gatisaanchimmakkinni galagale hagiidheemmo gede assie; maahoyyete ayyaaninni irkisie.
Psalms51:13 Hakkunni gedensaanni, seera sa'annorira doogokki rosiiseemmo; cubbaataammuno atewa higganno."
Psalms51:14 Gatisaancho Magano ballo, shitannoriwiinni agarie; anino keeraanchimmakki duduweemmo."
Psalms51:15 Mooticha'ya, arrawi'yanni galatakki duduweemmo gede, afoo'ya fanie."
Psalms51:16 Kakkalo hasi'rattoha ikkoommero eemmohe; ati kayinni dihasi'ratto; shilqote kakkalo tashshi diassitannohe.
Psalms51:17 Magano ati baxatto kakkalo heeshshi yiino wodanaati; heeshshi yiinohanna atewa higino wodana dimishatto.
Psalms51:18 Tsiyoonira baxillikkinni dancha coye assisi; Yerusaalamete huxxano huxxi.
Psalms51:19 Hatte yannara, halaalaancho kakkalonna shilqote kakkalo tashshi assitannohe daafira, ninkeno kakkalote darga woraamma kakkalleemmohe."
Psalms52:1 Ati wolqaataamo mancho! Bunshekkinni mayira naaxxatto? Wo'manka woyite mayira sao assatto?
Psalms52:2 Wodanikkinni woloota hunate malatto; xagarate arrawikki iibbitino milaace gedeeho.
Psalms52:3 Danchummatenni roore bunshe baxatto. halaale coy'rantenni roore kapho coyi'ra halchatto.
Psalms52:4 Ati kaphaanchu, manna hunanno coye coyi'ra baxatto."
Psalms52:5 Kunnira, Maganu hegerera diigannohe; minikkinnino fushshe hunannohe; baattote aaninnino buqqisannohe."
Psalms52:6 Keeraano konne coye affe waajjitanno; qolteno oso'litanni,"
Psalms52:7 «Maganoho irki'rannokkiha, jirosi batinye ku'lannohanna, bunshe loosasinni hawaqi'ranno mancho kune la'e!» yitanno."
Psalms52:8 Ani kayinni Maganu mine latino ejersi gedeeho; hegere hegerera bagamannokkiha Maganu baxille addaxxeemmo.
Psalms52:9 Assoottoehu danchu coyira hegerera galaxxeemmohe; su'mikki danchumma mannikki xaadinowa lallaweemmo.
Psalms53:1 Hawanyootu wodaninsanni, «Maganu dino» yitanno; baalunku battaabbino; hashakki'nanni cubbo assitanno; dancha coye assannohu dino."
Psalms53:2 Wodanchannohunna Magano hasi'rannohu noo gedeenni afara, Maganu gordoho hee're manna baala lai."
Psalms53:3 Baalunku doogosi aaninni wirri yiino; baalunku mitteenni battaawino; dancha coye assannohu mittu nafa dino.
Psalms53:4 Maganu, «Manna'ya sagalimma ittannorinna, ane magansidhannokkiri woyyanno coye afa hasiissannonsani?» yaanno."
Psalms53:5 Maganu mannisi baarigaarrata miqqansa billaallisanno daafira, noowa heedhe mulla ka'e qece yitanno; Maganu giwinonsa daafira saalfattanno."
Psalms53:6 Israeelete gato Tsiyooninni daggoommero maaho! Maganu qafadonsa qolanno yannara, Yaiqoobi mini lowo geeshsha hagiidhanno."
Psalms54:1 Magano ballo, su'mikkinni gatisie; wolqakkinni keereensie."
Psalms54:2 Magano ballo, maccakki huuccatto'ya widira qoli; ku'lo'yano macciishshi."
Psalms54:3 Allaggu ka'inoe; mararro nookkiri shitaera hassinoe. Magano maanko diyitino.
Psalms54:4 Kuneeti, Maganu kaa'lannoe; Mootichu lubbo'yara irkisaanchoseeti."
Psalms54:5 Diinna'yara bunshensa garinni qoli; ammanamoottoha ikkootto daafira insa gudi.
Psalms54:6 Qarru baalunkunni gatisoottoena, ille'yano diini'ya qeelama la'inona,"
Psalms54:7 wodani'yanni kainohunni kakkalo'ya shiqishi'reemmohe; Kaaliiqa su'mikki danchahona galaxxeemmohe.
Psalms55:1 Magano'ya ballo, huuccatto'ya macciishshi; eegama'yano lashshi assitooti."
Psalms55:2 Seekkite macciishshite dawarie; yaaddotenni kainohunni quuroommo;
Psalms55:3 baarigaarra'ya waajjishiishshinni kainohunni masoommo; bushuullu gadadishshinni kainohunni hiiqqamoommo; aana'ya qarra abbitanno; hanqitannoe; gibbannoe.
Psalms55:4 Wodanu shafamie; reyote waajjilli doyissie.
Psalms55:5 Waajjillunna masillu dayie; qarruno beeshshe amadie.
Psalms55:6 Lembooli gede qoola afi'roommoro, buuwe bae fooliishshi'reemmohu baino!"
Psalms55:7 Mayi xeerti're ha're, halallitte gobbara ofollo;"
Psalms55:8 hombobolattetenna wolqaataame bubbewiinni, mayi rahe xooqe bae hee'reemmowa afi'ro!"
Psalms55:9 Mooticha'ya ballo, assinanni beebbanna gibbo katamu giddo afoommona, hedonsa diigi; afoonna arrawo soorrinsa."
Psalms55:10 Xagarronna qarru katamu giddo no; insano, hashshanna barra katamu huxxa doyitanno."
Psalms55:11 Base baalate bunshe no; xagarronna hanaaqu dikkonsara dihooganno.
Psalms55:12 Baarigaaru xonoommeero cinceemmo; giwannoehu aana'ya boo'noommero, albisinni shawwu yeemmo."
Psalms55:13 Konne coye assattohu kayinni, darawo'ya, miila'yanna jaala'ya ikkoottohu ateeti;"
Psalms55:14 wolootu ledo mitteenni Maganu minira ha'nanna, hagiidhinanni wodaninketa hasaamboommo."
Psalms55:15 Minensanna mereeronsa bunshe noo daafira, baarigaarra'yara reyo daggonsa; yanni-male reyito insa."
Psalms55:16 Ani kayinni Magani'ya Kaaliiqiwa hige raareemmo; isino macciishshe gatisannoe.
Psalms55:17 Soodo, barranna hashsha isira qaxxadheemmo; isino qoonqo'ya macciishshanno."
Psalms55:18 Batinyu diini ledo olameemmowiinni, hobbaase qolannoe."
Psalms55:19 Bunshete doogonsanni higgannokkihuranna Maganono waajjitannokki daafira, hundunni kayise gashshino Magani huuccatto'ya macciishshe shollishannonsa."
Psalms55:20 Jaali'ya baxillaanosi aana kai; gondoorono diigi.
Psalms55:21 Afiisi buuroho; wodanisira kayinni koma wo'mitino; qaalisi owaataho; kayinnilla bisete gede murannoho.
Psalms55:22 Isi irkisannohena, yaaddokki Maganu aana tugi; isi keeraancho qeelamara wore dila""anno."
Psalms55:23 Magano, ati kayinni bushuulle qile balera tugi; manna shitannorinna dogaasine taaloote dirono diheedhanno; ani kayinni ate hexxeemmo."
Psalms56:1 Magano! Mannu xiiwannoena, baarigaarra'yano wo'ma woyite gadadissannoena mararie."
Psalms56:2 Insa barra wo'ma miiccannoe; qassannoerino kiiro haammataho.
Psalms56:3 Waajjillu amadannoe yannara, ate addaxxeemmo."
Psalms56:4 Uyinoe hexxo daafira Magano galaxxeemmo; iso addaxxeemmo daafira diwaajjeemmo. Mannu maassannoe?
Psalms56:5 Baarigaarra'ya barra wo'ma qarra kalaqqannoe; anera busha coye calla maltanno.
Psalms56:6 Gamba yite gaa'lite agartannoe; shitaera hasidhe ani asseemmore baala la'anno.
Psalms56:7 Magano ballo, assitanno bunshera qorichishittonsakkinni agurtooti; hattenne daga hanqikkinni gani."
Psalms56:8 Mageeshsha qarramoommoro ati afootto; mageeshshi hindiiddo du'noommoro egennootto. Baalunku coyi maxaafikkirawe borreessame no!
Psalms56:9 Ate woshshi'reemmo woyite, baarigaarra'ya badhera higganno; kunninni Maganu ledo'ya noota afeemmo."
Psalms56:10 Uyinoe hexxo daafira, Magano galaxxeemmo; uyinoe hexxo daafira Kaaliiqa galaxxeemmo."
Psalms56:11 Iso addaxxeemmo daafira diwaajjeemmo; mannu maassannoe?
Psalms56:12 Magano! Xa'noommohe xano atera uyi'reemmo; galatu afanshano abbi'reemmohe.
Psalms56:13 Lubbo'ya reyotenni, lekka'ya gufi're uwatenni agarootto; heeshshote xawaabbi giddo ate albaanni ha'rameemmo."
Psalms57:1 Lubbo'ya ate addaxxitinona mararie; Magano ballo, mararie; qarru dambali sa""a geeshsha, qoolikki giddo maaxameemmo."
Psalms57:2 Anera hedinore wonshannoehuwa, Wo'munkura Aliidi Maganiwa raareemmo."
Psalms57:3 Isino gordunni dawaro soye gatisannoe; xiibbanoereno shollishanno; Maganu bagamannokki baxillesinna ammanamasi leellishannoe.
Psalms57:4 Kune baarigaarra'ya itanno doobbiyi gede doyissite nooeta lai; hinkonsa amaxxotenna maxxaho; arrawinsa gamanxoonni biseeti.
Psalms57:5 Magano! Iima gordoho ayirri; ayirrinyikki gobba baalate leello.
Psalms57:6 Baarigaarra'ya lekka'yara woshshaado wortino; lubbo'yano gadadissino; doogo'yara bale untino; kayinnilla, untino balera insanni qolte ubbino."
Psalms57:7 Wodani'ya dishafamannoho; Magano! Wodani'ya dishafamannoho; kunnira geeweemmohe; faarseemmohe.
Psalms57:8 Lubbo'ya baqqi yii! Gingilaatunna baganu ka'e! Anino gute kaeemmo.
Psalms57:9 Mooticha! Gosate mereero galateemmohe; dagate mereerono faarseemmohe;
Psalms57:10 bagamannokkihu baxillikki gordoho qasi'rino; halaalaanchimmakkino gomichu geeshsha iillitino.
Psalms57:11 Magano! Iima gordoho ayirri; ayirrinyikkino gobba baalate leello.
Psalms58:1 Ki'ne gashshaano halaale loossinannini? Ki'ne mannaho taalo coyidhinannini?
Psalms58:2 Dee'ni! Wodani'nenni bunshe calla maltinanni; baattote aana jaddo loossinanni.
Psalms58:3 Bushuullu amansa godowi giddo heedhenni sodhinoreeti; ilantu barrinni kayisse kaphaanote.
Psalms58:4 Harfinsa hamashshunnihu gedeeho; jalli assanno manchi qaalenna kiilaanchu fiiqatto macciishsha gibbe macciweeltino buute gede, macca cu'midhanno."
Psalms58:5 
Psalms58:6 Magano! Hinkonsa hiiqqaqqite afoo wonshi; Kaaliiqa! Doobbiyunniha keltansa cancani.
Psalms58:7 Insa wayi gede lolaasse huni; doogote tungoonni hayisso gede cancante mooshshi.
Psalms58:8 Gagate gede shiilto; ama godowa kisidhino aleeshshi gede arrishsho affoonke.
Psalms58:9 Affukkinni utu gede muranto; Maganu jawaatu hanqisinni lubbotenni heedheennanni billaallisonsa.
Psalms58:10 Bushuulle rabbinsanna la'e keeraano hagiidhitanno; mundeensano kakkaxxitanno.
Psalms58:11 Hatte yannara mannu, «Halaalintanni keeraano angasinni ba'raa'ra adhitanno; hada baattote aana halaale coyi'ranno Magani nooni?» yaanno."
Psalms59:1 Magano ballo, baarigaarra'yawiinni gatisie; gawajjitaera ka'annoriwiinni agarie."
Psalms59:2 Busha assitannoriwiinni gatisie; mannu mundee aggannoriwiinni agarie.
Psalms59:3 Kaaliiqa! Cubbonna sao assummokkinni shitaera gaa'lite agarte no; kuri mararro nookkiri gamba yite anera gano gantanno.
Psalms59:4 Sao assummokkinni shorrite amaddaera ariiffattanni noona, ati ka'e kaa'lie; noommo garano dagge illekkinni lai."
Psalms59:5 Olantote Magano ikkoottohu, Israeelete Magano Kaaliiqa, daga baalanta qorichishattora kai; sayisse hirtannore bushuulle baala marartooti."
Psalms59:6 Hawarro tuqa hudi'rino woshshi gede, katama doyitanni soroortanni hosse higganno."
Psalms59:7 Kuneeti boollaqi'ransa macciishshi; arrawinsa bagadu gede qasannoho; anfanninsahano dilawannonsa.
Psalms59:8 Kaaliiqa ati, insa oso'latto; daga baalanta qacifatatto."
Psalms59:9 Magano! Ati jawaante'yaatina, addaxxeemmohe."
Psalms59:10 Bagamannokki baxillihu Magani'ya daye laannoe; baarigaarra'ya qeelantanna leellishannoe.
Psalms59:11 Kaaliiqa wonqo'ya! Manni'ya rabbisoottota afa hoogannona insa shitooti; kayinnilla, wolqakkinni billaallisi; shollishi."
Psalms59:12 Afiinsa cubbiranna suumensanni fultanno so'rora, rumonna kaphu afiinsanni fulanno daafira, boo'nansanni amadanto."
Psalms59:13 Insa hanqikkinni huni; shakki assite gudi; Maganu Israeeletenni sae baatto baalate gashshaancho ikkinota, baalunku hakkawoyite affanno."
Psalms59:14 Hawarro tuqa hudi'rino woshshi gede, katama doyitanni soroortanni hosse higganno."
Psalms59:15 Insa sagale hasi'ranni raataawannonna, hooge gurura""anno woshshi gedeereeti."
Psalms59:16 Ani kayinni ate jawaantekki daafira faarseemmohe; qarramummo yannara ati golonna qiisho ikkoottoena, soodimaroho bagamannokkihu baxillikki daafira yee geeweemmohe."
Psalms59:17 Gargaraancho'ya! Ati anera golo'yaati; baxattoe Maganootina, ate Magani'yara faarseemmohe."
Psalms60:1 Magano! Giwoottonke; facci assite aguroottonke; hanqoottonke; xa kayinni higge jawaachishinke.
Psalms60:2 Baatto shashshaffe daddarootto; diigante ba'ukkinni gamba assite gowi.
Psalms60:3 Ninke mannikkira shetto leellishoottonke; gaggassitannota woyinete xajjeno hayikkisoottonke.
Psalms60:4 Bagaduwiinni gattanno gede, waajjitannoherira malaate oottonsa."
Psalms60:5 Baxattohu mannikki gatanno gede, wolqakkinni kaa'linke; huuccattonkeno macciishshinke."
Psalms60:6 Maganu Qullaawu Dargisira hee're, «Tashshi yaannae Sekeemi beeheemmo; Sukooti lagicha manni'yara qeecheemmo."
Psalms60:7 Geleaadi aneho; Minaaseno aneho; Efireemi siwiilu gullee'yaati; Yihuduno gashshooti'ya siqqooti.
Psalms60:8 Moaabi hayishshi'reemmo badirooti; Edoomi umi'yaha ikkinota egensiisate caamma'ya wodheemmowaati. Filisxeemoota qeeloommo daafira qeexaa'leemmo» yiino.
Psalms60:9 Qiinshoonni katama ayi massae ikka? Edoomiyaasira ayi haa're ha'rae ikka?
Psalms60:10 Magano! Ati tugge aguroottonke; olantonke ledono olunniwa fula giwootto.
Psalms60:11 Mannu kaa'lo ditirtannotena, diinanke qeelleemmo kaayyo uyinke."
Psalms60:12 Maganu ledo hee'ne qeelleemmo; isino diinnanke irraawisanno.
Psalms61:1 Magano ballo, raare'ya macciishshi; huuccatto'yano macciishshi."
Psalms61:2 Hexxo ba'annoe yannara, qae'yanni lowo geeshsha fafe hee're, atewa hige raareemmo; ati anera kinchu huxxaatina, diini'yawiinnino golo ikkite gatisie. Massite keeru noowa worie."
Psalms61:3 
Psalms61:4 Dukkanikki giddo hegerera hee'ra hasi'roommo; qoolakki go'la halchoommo.
Psalms61:5 Magano! Ati xano'ya macciishshoottona, su'makki ayirrissannori iqqa anerano oottoe."
Psalms61:6 Mootete diru aana diro ledisi; dirisino ilamate ilama geeshsha iillo.
Psalms61:7 Magano! Isi albakkiinni hegerera moohe hee'rona, bagamannokkihu baxillikkinna halaalaanchimmakki agartosi."
Psalms61:8 Anino atera xa'noommo xano barru barrunkunni aanni, wo'manka woyite su'mikkira faarseemmo."
Psalms62:1 Gatisannoehu Magano calla ikkinohura, cince iso agadheemmo."
Psalms62:2 Isi callu golo'yaati; gatisaancho'yaatinna, qiisho'yaati; kunnira, dargi'yanni ayino milli diassannoe."
Psalms62:3 Haawiino mininna uwara rahino huxxi gedee mancho gawajjitinanni; ki'ne baalunku mamooti geeshsha heedhinanni?
Psalms62:4 Ayirrinyesi moofisate amaalantinanni; kapho coyi'rate hagiidhitinanni; afii'nenni maassidhinanni; wodani'nenni kayinni runtinanni.
Psalms62:5 Hexxeemmohu isootina, lubbo'ya, ati sammi yite Magano calla agadhi."
Psalms62:6 Isi callu golo'yaatinna gatisaancho'yaati; isi qiisho'yaatina dargi'yanni milli assannoehu dihee'ranno.
Psalms62:7 Gato'yanna ayirrinyi'ya Maganunniiti; isi qiisho'yaatinna jawaata golo'yaati.
Psalms62:8 Manna! Wo'manka woyite iso addaxxe; isi golonkeetina, qarra'ne baala isira hasaaphe."
Psalms62:9 Mannu baalu fooraru gedeeho; afi'rinohuno hooginohuno baalunku mullareeti; keennanni woyite shote baino. Foollanni fooli geeshsha nafa diikkino.
Psalms62:10 Wolqisa'nenni adawadhitinoonte; saantine duubbinara heddinoonte; jiro afidhiniro nafa, ise addaxxitinoonte."
Psalms62:11 Maganu, «Wolqanna bagamannokki baxilli aneho» yee coyi'ranna lame hige macciishshoommo. Mootichu, mittu mittunkura loosisi garinni aanno."
Psalms62:12 
Psalms63:1 Magano'ya! Ati anera Magano'yaati; ani ate lowo geeshsha sinsinnaawoommo; manninati'ya ate yoranno; waa hoogge buko ikkite mooltino baatto gede lubbo'ya ate goodhanno.
Psalms63:2 Qullaawu Minikki giddo laeemmohe gedenna, wolqakkinna ayirrinyekki afeemmo gede assie."
Psalms63:3 Bagamannokkihu baxillikki heeshshotenni rooranno daafira, suumma'ya galattannohe."
Psalms63:4 Lubbotenni noommo geeshsha galaxxeemmohe; anga'ya fane ate huucci'reemmo.
Psalms63:5 Adonna buuro aginohu gede hagiidheemmo; ateno galatunni faarseemmo.
Psalms63:6 Ma'na'yara hee're qaageemmohe; hashsha wo'ma atere hedeemmo.
Psalms63:7 Ati wo'manka woyite kaa'loottoena, qoolikki caalira hee're faarseemmohe."
Psalms63:8 Lubbo'ya ate cu'midhino; qiniiticho angakkino irkissinoe.
Psalms63:9 Shitaera hassannoeri kayinni, baattote woroonni sa'anno."
Psalms63:10 Bagadoho sayinse uyineenna reyitanno; maalansano yeedaala ittanno.
Psalms63:11 Moote kayinni, Maganu assinore lae hagiidhanno; Maganu su'minni hexxo uyitannori, iso galattanno; kapho coyi'ranno afii kayinni beewanno."
Psalms64:1 Magano! Qarramoommona, hururama'ya macciishshie; baarigaari'ya waajjishiishshinni lubbo'ya gatisie."
Psalms64:2 Cubbaataammu gosoominni agarie; bushuullu ganonni maaxxe gatisie.
Psalms64:3 Arrawonsa bisete gede gamaxidhanno; harfaamu afiinni maxxu gede qassanno.
Psalms64:4 Keeraancho dugge qassara digaana gonnitanno; waajjitukkinni hedeweelcho idditanno.
Psalms64:5 Busha hedonsa wonshate, mimmitonsa jawaachishshanno; «Afannonkehu dino» yite, woshshaado wortanno darga maltanno."
Psalms64:6 «Konne assinoommo coye afara dandaannohu nooni? Xaate hedonke wonshi'noommo» yitanno. Kune, mannu wodaniranna mannu hedora, xagarro wo'mitino gara la'e!"
Psalms64:7 Maganu kayinni insa maxxunni qasanno; insano hedeweelcho madidhanno.
Psalms64:8 Maganu afiinsanni fulanno coyinni hunannonsa; laannonsahu baalu oso'lannonsa.
Psalms64:9 Hatte yannara, mannu baalunku waajjanno; insano wodanunni sammi yite assitannore maltanno; Maganu loosono faajjete dudubbanno."
Psalms64:10 Keeraanchoho Maganunni tashshi yoosi; isono golosi assi'ro; wodana subbinori baalu galattosi.
Psalms65:1 Magano! Atera Tsiyooni galatu malinohe; ninkeno atera xa'ninoommo xano wonshineemmo.
Psalms65:2 Mannu baalu cubbinsa daafira yee, atewa daanno; atino huuccattonsa macciishshatto; cubbu lowo geeshsha ayirrannonke yannara, ati saonke agurattonke."
Psalms65:3 
Psalms65:4 Ati dooroottohura, Qullaawa Darga hee'rara woshshoottosihura tashshi yoosi; duushshannonke atooti Qullaawu Minikki giddonni fulannoho."
Psalms65:5 Magano gatisaanchonke! Dhegge loosse dawaro qoloottonke; baara widoonni noorinna baattote qaccera heedhannori baalu ate hexxitanno.
Psalms65:6 Jawaata wolqakki leellishshanni, ilaalla base basensara uurrisootto."
Psalms65:7 Baaru dambali luulattonna, mannu canco sammi assatto."
Psalms65:8 Assootto dhaggenni kainohunni daga baala yitannore habbanno; danchu loosikkinni kainohunni, qaccetenni qaccete geeshsha baattote aana hagiirru duduwamanno."
Psalms65:9 Xeena uyite baatto towatootto; lowo geeshshano qawaaxxisootto; lagikkira wayi wo'mino; ati yootto garinni, baatto jajja fushshitino."
Psalms65:10 Hawuurshisera xeena duushshatto; ooyyaseno taashshatto; bushshano shorunni shaqqishatto. Mu'raseno latisatto.
Psalms65:11 Ellekkinni diro qawaaxxisatto; ati noottowi baalu duuwoho.
Psalms65:12 Halalla saada wo'mitanno; gaarrano hagiirre uddanote gede uddidhanno.
Psalms65:13 Xawu, lowo saada hossannowa ikkanno; laggate gidu wo'manno; baalunku hagiirrunni ilillisanni faarsanno."
Psalms66:1 Baattote aana heedhinoonniri baalunku, ilillissinanni Magano galatte."
Psalms66:2 Su'misi ayirrinyira faarse; ayirrado galatano uuyyesi.
Psalms66:3 Magano, «Loosikki dhaggenniho; wolqakkino lowota ikkitinohura, baarigaarrakki huxidhe waajjitannohe."
Psalms66:4 Baattote aana noori baalu magansidhannohe; galatu faarsono shiqishshannohe; su'mikkirano galatunni faarsitanno» yiiyyesi.
Psalms66:5 Amme, Maganu looso la'e! Isi mannu mereero maala'linannire assino."
Psalms66:6 Baara moola baattora soorrino; akaakkankeno lolahanno wayi giddoonni higge lekkansanni sa'ino. Kunninni kainohunni, hakkiicho ninkera tashshi yiinonke."
Psalms66:7 Wolqasinni hegerera gashshanno; illesi dagate aaninni dika'anno; kunnira, haxawarrootu isi albaanni naaxxitoonke."
Psalms66:8 Daga, Maganonke galatte! Qoonqo'ne naggi assitine galattesi."
Psalms66:9 Lubbonke agarinonke; umbammora wore dilainonke.
Psalms66:10 Magano! Giiratenni daashshinanni birri gede, ninkeno fonqolte laoottonke."
Psalms66:11 Woshshaadote giddora eessoottonke; badhenkera qarra bayisiisoottonke.
Psalms66:12 Baarigaarra aananke guluffanno gede assootto; giiratenna wayi giddoonni hinge sa'noommo; xa kayinni, hala'lado jirote dargira haadhe abboottonke."
Psalms66:13 Shilqote kakkalo adhe minikkira eeemmo; xano'yano abbe atera eemmo.
Psalms66:14 Qarramummo yannara, afii'yanni coyi'roommotanna, suume'yanni xa'noommota xano'ya atera eemmo."
Psalms66:15 Harditino saada shilqote kakkalora, woraammanna meu gocca kakkalote shiqisheemmo; shilqono gordo iillitanno."
Psalms66:16 Maganu assinoere kuleemmo'nena, iso waajjitinanniri baalu amme macciishshe""e!"
Psalms66:17 Qoonqo'ya naggi asse iso huucci'roommo; galata'yano shiqishi'roommosi.
Psalms66:18 Wodani'yara cubbo maaxi'roommoha ikkoommero, Mootichu dimacciishshannoe."
Psalms66:19 Ikkollana kayinni, addintanni Maganu macciishshinoe; maccasino huuccatto'ya widira qolino."
Psalms66:20 Huuccatto'ya mishinokkihu, bagamannokkiha baxillesi anewiinni xeertisinokkihu Maganu galataminoha ikko."
Psalms67:1 Magano mararinke; maassi'rinke; shaqqillunni lainke.
Psalms67:2 Kunninni kainohunni, daga baalante mereero gatisaanchimmakki, baatto baalate aana hedokki egennantanno."
Psalms67:3 Magano! Ate gosa galattohe; daga baala galattohe.
Psalms67:4 Halaale coyi'rattonsa daafiranna, baattote aanano heedhanno gara kulattonsa daafira, daga baala hagiirrunni faarsitohe."
Psalms67:5 Magano! Ate gosa galattohe; daga baala galattohe.
Psalms67:6 Maganu maassi'rannonke daafira, baatto gide laashshitanno."
Psalms67:7 Maganu maassi'ronke; baattote aana noo gosa baalano ayirrissosi.
Psalms68:1 Maganu kao! Baarigaarrasino billaallito! Gibbannosirino albisinni xooqqo!
Psalms68:2 Wiliilete gede ikkite ba'o! Giira gaga daaqissannohu gede, cubbaataammu Maganu albinni hatto ikkite gooffo."
Psalms68:3 Keeraanote kayinni tashshi yoonsa; Maganu albaanni hagiidhito; lowo geeshsha hisatte ilillisso.
Psalms68:4 Maganoho geebbe; su'misirano galatunni faarse; gomicho gulufe ha'rannohura doogo qixxeesse; su'misino Kaaliiqaatina, isi albaanni hagiidhe."
Psalms68:5 Maganu qullaawu dargisira hee're, buxoho annaho; gunnootaho malannoho."
Psalms68:6 Maganu callattinorira mine aannonsa; usurantinore tire hagiirsiisannonsa. haxawarrootu kayinni moola gobbara heedhanno.
Psalms68:7 Magano! Mannikkira albaanni fulitto waro, halallitte gobba giddoonni higge saitto waro,"
Psalms68:8 Siina Ilaali Magani albaanni, Israeelete Magani albaanni baatto huxidhu; gordu xeena lolaasi."
Psalms68:9 Magano! Xeena duushshitto; mooltinota baattokki gabbi assitto.
Psalms68:10 Mannikki giddose galanni no; shaqqillikkinni buxanete hasiisannore qixxeessittonsa.
Psalms68:11 Mootichu hajajo uyi; lowo meenti duduwosi gobba tuqisi.
Psalms68:12 Olantote mootoolla rakke xooqqanno; qaete hosino meenti qafado beeqqanno.
Psalms68:13 Ge'reewo allaaltara badhera gattinori, qoollate birra xallinoonniha, xabbannota culkunni seekkinoonni baalluwa afi'rino lemboola adhitino."
Psalms68:14 Wo'manka Dandaanno Magani mootoolla billaallisi yannara, Selmooni yinanni ilaali aana dirritanno kaade gede assinsa."
Psalms68:15 Batinye birxe afi'roottohu ati Baasaani Ilaali, hiittoo jawaataati?"
Psalms68:16 Batinye birxe afi'rino ilaalira heedhinanniri Baasaani manni, hegerera Maganu hee'ranno ilaalira, Magano magansi'ranno manna busha illenni mayira la'inanni?"
Psalms68:17 Maganunniti faradi gaare batinye kumeeti; Mootichu Siina Ilaalinni kae qullaawu minisira daanno.
Psalms68:18 Kaaliiqi Maganu qafadonna haxawarrootu uyitino afanshi nafa gatikkinni adhe, hee'rannowa iimira ha'ri."
Psalms68:19 Barra baala duqqannonkehu, Mootichu galataminoha ikko; Maganu gatisaanchonkeeti."
Psalms68:20 Maganinke gatisaancho Maganooti; Maganu Kaaliiqi reyotenni gatisannoho.
Psalms68:21 Addinta Maganu baarigaarrasi umo cancananno; bunshete doogo agurtannokkiri sammo dhodhoosanno.
Psalms68:22 Mootichu, «Baarigaarrakki Baasaaninni abbeemmo; baaru diime giddonnino haa're fushsheemmo."
Psalms68:23 Lekkakki mundeensa kakkaxxitanno; woshshikki baarigaarrakki mundee duuwa geeshsha lacanno» yii.
Psalms68:24 Magano! Qeellenniti qaafokki wo'munkura leeltanno; ati Moote Magani'ya Qullaawu Minikkira dukkinseenna eatto.
Psalms68:25 Faarsaano albaanni, muuziiqu uduunne gantannori badheenni, dibbe gananno seenni mereeroho hee're,"
Psalms68:26 «Magano songote mereero galattesi; Israeelete sirchi baalu Kaaliiqa galattesi!» yaanno.
Psalms68:27 Maa'niidihunniti Biiniyaami ga're albissanno; hakkiicho Yihudu roorrooti gaamonsa ledo, Zaabilooninna Niftaalemi roorrootino hoodete no."
Psalms68:28 Magano'ya ballo, wolqakki leellishi; albinte gede xaano wolqakki egensiisi."
Psalms68:29 Yerusaalamete noohura Qullaawu Minikki daafira yite, mootoolla atera afansha haadhe dagganno."
Psalms68:30 Umonsa heeshshi assite birransa uyitahe geeshsha, shomboqqote giddo galanno moyicho Gibitse, dagate mereero heedhannore woraammanna middo rufi! Ola kayissara hasidhannore billaallisi!"
Psalms68:31 Ayirraddu Gibitsetenni dagganno; Itiyophiyu angasi Maganu widira qole kayisanno.
Psalms68:32 Baattote aani gosa baala! Maganoho faarse! Mootichaho galatunni faarse.
Psalms68:33 Bi're hundinni kayise gordo gulufe noo Maganita, wolqaataame huurosi macciishshe!"
Psalms68:34 Israeelete aana Gaacheena afi'rinohunnita, gordoho wolqasi leellishannohunnita, Maganu wolqa dudubbe."
Psalms68:35 Israeelete Magani, Maganu Qullaawa Minesi waajjinanniho; mannisira wolqanna jawaante aanno; Maganu galatamo!"
Psalms69:1 Magano ballo! Wayi kokke iillinoena gatisie.
Psalms69:2 Leepho egemmitue; kaxxe uurreemmowano hoogummo. Diimete giddora eummo; lolahuno iimaanni hige saie.
Psalms69:3 Woxaratate batinyinni daafuroommo; kokkeno mooltue; Magano'ya agadhanna ille xissitue.
Psalms69:4 Beebbatenni gibbannoeri umi'ya dananchi kiironni roortino; huntaera hassannoeri baarigaarra'ya wolqissinoe; adhoommokkiha qoli yitanni giddeessitue.
Psalms69:5 Magano'ya ballo, hambe'ya egennootto; cubbi'yano atera digo'linohe."
Psalms69:6 Olantote Mooticha Magano! Hexxitannoheri anenni kainohunni saalfattoonke; Israeelete Magano! Hasidhannoheri anenni kainohunni shollitoonke.
Psalms69:7 Ate daafira xonnannae cincoommona, saaluno ille beeshshinoena."
Psalms69:8 Roduuwi'yara allaggicho, ayiddi'yara wosincho ikkoommo."
Psalms69:9 Minikki laala amaddinoe; xontannoheri xonono aana'ya ubbino.
Psalms69:10 Manninate'ya qatumatenni hunquffi assoommo; kunninni kainohunni mannu xoninoe.
Psalms69:11 Xiddu uddano uddi'rummota, haariintanni oso'litue."
Psalms69:12 Nafara ofoltannori anerella assitanno; dimbaasine ane su'minni sirbitanno.
Psalms69:13 Kaaliiqa'ya, ani kayinni macciishshate hasi'ratto yannara, ate huucci'reemmo; Magano, ati gatisate ootto hexxo wonshattoha ikkoottohura, bagamannokkihu baxillikki deerrinni dawarie."
Psalms69:14 Rirriwu egemmannoekki gede agarie; gibbannoeriwiinninna diimetenni gatisie.
Psalms69:15 Lolahu aanaanni hige saoonkee; diimeno egemmitoonkee; baleno giddora qo'lite cufidhoonkee.
Psalms69:16 Kaaliiqa! Bagamannokki baxillikkira yite dawarie; mararrokki batinyinni anewa higge lai.
Psalms69:17 Ane borojjichikkira albakki maaxxootie; lowo geeshsha shetoommona rakke dawarie.
Psalms69:18 Anewa dagge gatisie; baarigaarra'ya anganni wodie.
Psalms69:19 Ati xonama'ya, saalfata'yanna sholla'ya afootto; shetissannoere baala ati affanni nootto."
Psalms69:20 Xono wodana madiissitinoe; hexxono mudhoommo; mararannoeha hasi're hoogoommo; sheshifachishannoehano diafi'roommo.
Psalms69:21 Hudi'rummota qaraartino sagale uyitinoe; goo'rummota shiisha hayikkissinoe.
Psalms69:22 Hurbaatinsa bagado ikkonsa; kakkalote sagale huntannota ikkitonsa.
Psalms69:23 La'annokki gede illensa tunsito; wo'manka woyite badhensa ukkito.
Psalms69:24 Aarikki aanansa dirro; buwannohu hanqikki haa'ronsa.
Psalms69:25 Heedhanno gobba onto; minensa galannohu hoogo.
Psalms69:26 Ati ganoottonsare gadadissannonsa; ati madiissoottorira qarra leddanno.
Psalms69:27 Cubbonsa sammi yite cori; maarono uyitootinsa.
Psalms69:28 Heeshshote maxaafi giddonni huninsa; keeraanote ledo su'minsa borreessamoonke.
Psalms69:29 Ani qarraataamohonna madaanchoho; Magano'ya ballo, gatisaanchimmakkinni agarie."
Psalms69:30 Magano faarsotenni galateemmo, galatu faarsonni lowimmasi lallaweemmo."
Psalms69:31 Kuni coyi saada kakkalatenninna, woraamo gorratenni roore Magano tashshi assanno."
Psalms69:32 Konne coye affanno woyite qarraataammu hagiidhitanno; Magano magansidhannori jawaattanno.
Psalms69:33 Maganu gadadaammu huuccatto macciishshanno; usurame nooha mannasi sammi yee diaguranno.
Psalms69:34 Gordunna baatto, baarunna giddosi noohu baalu galatannosi."
Psalms69:35 Maganu Tsiyooni gatisanno; Yihudu katamma galagalche minanno; mannisino hakkiicho hee'ranno; baattono amadanno.
Psalms69:36 Soqqamaanosi sirchino hattenne baatto ragi'ranno; iso baxxannori hakkiicho heedhanno.
Psalms70:1 Magano ane gatisie; Kaaliiqa'ya rakke kaa'lie.
Psalms70:2 Lubbo'ya huntara hasidhannori irraabbo; tootayyaabbo; busha maltannoeri badhera higgo; shollito.
Psalms70:3 Hiii yitannori, Kaaliiqi qeeleennansa irraabbe badhera higgo."
Psalms70:4 Ate hasidhannori baalu hagiidhito; gatisaanchimmakki galaxxitannori wo'manka woyite, «Maganu lowoho!» yito."
Psalms70:5 Ani mitiimmaamohonna gadadaamohona, Magano'ya rakke kaa'lie; kaa'laanchi'yanna gatisaanchi'ya ateeti."
Psalms71:1 Kaaliiqa! Ati golo'yaatina, horonta saalfachishshootie."
Psalms71:2 Keeraanchimmakkinni gatisse fushshie; huuccatto'ya macciishshite gatisie.
Psalms71:3 Ati goda'yaatinna golo'yaatina, balba'leemmowanna jawaata qiisho ikkite gargarie."
Psalms71:4 Magano'ya ballo, bushuullu anganni, cubbaataammunna kaajjadduwiinni gatisie."
Psalms71:5 Mooticha! Ati hexxo'yaati; Kaaliiqa! Ati anje'yanni kayisse addaxxeemmoheho.
Psalms71:6 Ilamummo barrinni kayisse ati agaroottoe; heeshsho'ya diri baalunkunni ate irki'roommo; anino wo'manka woyite galaxxeemmohe.
Psalms71:7 Ati jawaata golo ikkoottoehura, ani lowo mannira lawishsha ikkoommo."
Psalms71:8 Barra wo'ma ayirrinyikkira faarseemmo gede, afii'yara galatu wo'minoe."
Psalms71:9 Geedhimma'ya yannara huntootie; wolqa gooffannoe waro agurtootie.
Psalms71:10 Baarigaarra'ya anera busha mala maltanno; shitaera hassannori anera gano gantanni,"
Psalms71:11 «Maganuno agurinosi; gatisannosihuno dinona, faana gantine amadde» yitanno."
Psalms71:12 Magano'ya! Anewiinni faffooti; Magano'ya! Rakke kaa'lie.
Psalms71:13 Lubbo'ya hettissannori irraabbe gooffo; gawajjameemmota baxxannori saalanna shollinye uddidho.
Psalms71:14 Ani kayinni wo'manka woyite hexxeemmohe; lede lede galaxxeemmohe.
Psalms71:15 Loosikki kiirre gundannikkiha ikkiro nafa, afii'ya barra baala keeraanchimmakkinna gatisaanchimmakki coyi'ranno."
Psalms71:16 Kaaliiqa Magano'ya ate jawaantenni ha'reemmo; keeraanchimmakki calla lallaweemmo.
Psalms71:17 Magano'ya anje'yanni kayisse rosiisoottoe; anino techo geeshsha dhaggenniha loosokki duduwanni noommo.
Psalms71:18 Geedheemmonna awuuweemmo woyiteno, dagganno ilama baalate roorrekkinna wolqakki kuleemmona, Magano agurtootie."
Psalms71:19 Magano! Keeraanchimmakki gordo iillitanno; ati jawa looso loosootto; Magano! Ate gedeehu dino.
Psalms71:20 Lowo qarranna shetto leellishoottoe; ikkollana, galagalchite wolqa'ya haaroonsootto; balete giddonnino fushshattoe."
Psalms71:21 Albinni roore ayirrado assattoe; galagalchite jawaachishattoe.
Psalms71:22 Anino halaalaanchimmakki daafira, baganunni galateemmohe. Israeelete Qullaawa Magano! Maasinqotenni faarseemmohe."
Psalms71:23 Gatisoottoe daafira galatunni faarseemmohe; afii'yano hagiirrunni ilillisanno.
Psalms71:24 Gawajjameemmota baxxannori saalfattannonna shollitanno daafira, arrawi'ya barra wo'ma keeraanchimmakki duduwanno."
Psalms72:1 Magano! Moote halaalunni gashshanno gede assi; mootete keeraanchimmakki rosiisisi.
Psalms72:2 Kunni garinni mannakki taashshe gashshanno; qarraataammikkirano halaalaancho yoo yaanno.
Psalms72:3 Mannikkira ilaalla jiro, gaarrano keeraanchimmate guma uyitanno."
Psalms72:4 Moote buxanete halaale coyi'ro; gadadaamma kaa'lo; gadadissannore irraawiso.
Psalms72:5 Kaaliiqa! Arrishsho fultanno diro baala, aganu xawanno yanna baala, ilamatenni ilamate geeshsha, mannikki magansi'rohe."
Psalms72:6 Mooteno xawoho gananno xeeninna baattote uwanno shori gedeeha ikko.
Psalms72:7 Isi gashshooti yannara keeraano qawaaxxidho; aganu baa geeshsha jiro batidho.
Psalms72:8 Baarunni kayise baaru geeshsha, Efiraaxisi Wayinni kayise baattote qacce geeshsha gashsho."
Psalms72:9 Halalla heedhanno gosa isira kumbuultanno; diinisino bushsha afooho wodhanno.
Psalms72:10 Terseesinna giddichuwate mootoolla giwire abbitosi; Arabetenna Saaba mootoolla afansha haadhe daggosi.
Psalms72:11 Mootoolla baala kumbuultosi; daga baalanti gashshantosi.
Psalms72:12 Qarraataamo woshshi'rannosi woyite gatisannosi; buxichonna gadadaamo kaa'lanno.
Psalms72:13 Buxanenna wolqiweeloota mararanno; qarraataamma reyotenni gatisanno.
Psalms72:14 Insa heeshsho isi albaanni ayirrado ikkitino daafira, gadadaamma shettotewiinni fushshannonsa."
Psalms72:15 Dirisi seedo; Arabete gobbanni culka abbitosi; wo'mante yannara mannu isi daafira huucco; wo'manka woyite Maganu maasso iillitosi.
Psalms72:16 Baatto gide laashshito; ilaallate aana jajju wo'mo; Libaanoosi ilaalla gede qiniitunnita ikkito; hayisso baatto guggushshitannohu gede, katammateno mannu wo'mo."
Psalms72:17 Su'misi hegerera maassaminoha ikko; su'misi arrishsho heedhanno geeshsha hee'ro; baattote aani daga baala isinni maassanto; daga baala, «Isi maassammoho» yitanno."
Psalms72:18 Callisi dhagge assannohu, Israeelete Magani Kaaliiqi galatamo."
Psalms72:19 Galataminohu su'misi hegere hegerera maassamo; galatisino baatto baala wo'mo! Hamii'ni! Hamii'ni!
Psalms72:20 Isseyi beetti Daawiti huuccatto gooffu.
Psalms73:1 Maganu wodana subbinorira, Israeelete hiittoo shaqqadooti!"
Psalms73:2 Ani kayinni gufi're hoogoommo; uwammora shiimurilla gatinoe.
Psalms73:3 Bushuulleho qiniinonsata afe, hattenne boonaleeyye lae hinaasummo."
Psalms73:4 Jawaatoota ikkitino daafira, dhibbunna qarru diamadannonsa."
Psalms73:5 Mannu gede diqarrantanno; wolu gede digawajjantanno.
Psalms73:6 Kunnira, boo'na irridhu; saonna sarxe haraqidhu."
Psalms73:7 Illensa coomu ketti assino; wodaninsara bunshe wo'mitino.
Psalms73:8 Bunshetenni ceeggifattanni coyidhanno; boo'natenni woloota okkitanno.
Psalms73:9 Maganu aana busha coyidhanno; mannu aanano afii-wo'ma coyidhanno.
Psalms73:10 Kunninni kainohunni, Maganu manni nafa insawa higanno; insa yiture baala macciishshanno."
Psalms73:11 Insano, «Maganu ma afino? Wo'munkura Aliidihu egenninori nooni?» yitanno."
Psalms73:12 Kuneeti bushuullu togooreeti; jirote aana jirolla lexxitanno.
Psalms73:13 Anino wodana'ya beebba qarrisoommo; beebballa cubbo qorophoommo.
Psalms73:14 Barra wo'ma shetto afoommo; soodanno kiiro qi'miidamoommo.
Psalms73:15 Hatto yee coyi'roommoha ikkoommero, mannikkira sao asse hoogoommo."
Psalms73:16 Konne coye afammora hedoommo; kuni kayinni anera qarraho.
Psalms73:17 Qullaawu Minikkira eummohu gedensaanni, cubbaataammu gawalo afoommo."
Psalms73:18 Insa lixu giddo worootto; ubbe gooffanno gede assitto.
Psalms73:19 Hedeweelcho ba'u; higgannokki gede ikkite gooffu.
Psalms73:20 Ati kaatto woyite, haaqii'noonni haaqee gede hawantanno."
Psalms73:21 Wodani'ya aaramanno yannara, giddo'ya fooggaltanno woyite,"
Psalms73:22 afoommori nookkiha jallaaga ikkummo; ate albaannino saadate gedeeho.
Psalms73:23 Ikkirono wo'manka woyite ani ate ledo noommo; atino qiniiticho anga'ya amadoottoe.
Psalms73:24 Amaalekkinni massagoottoe; gedensaannino ayirrinyunni atewa gamba assittoe.
Psalms73:25 Gordoho ate ka'a ayi nooe? Baattote aanano ate afi'rummohu ka'a wolu maassannoe?
Psalms73:26 Maali'yanna wodani'ya goofiro nafa, Magani'ya kayinni wodani'yara jawaantete; hegere geeshsha kaayyo'yaati."
Psalms73:27 Kuneeti atewiinni faffannori ba'anno; ate agurtannore baala hunatto.
Psalms73:28 Anera kayinni Maganunniwa gamba yaa woyyitannoe; Tsiyooni waalchira uurre dhaggenniha loososi kulate, Mooticha Magano golo'ya assi'roommo."
Psalms74:1 Magano! Horonta mayira agurittonke? Qanchikki ge'reewira hanqikki mayira buwi?
Psalms74:2 Balaxxe kalaqoottota songokki, woxxoottoha utuwakki, aanasi hee'roottoha Tsiyooni ilaala qaagi."
Psalms74:3 Diinu diige huninoha Qullaawa Mine, konne co'o bainoha ka'anna kawa ha'rante lai."
Psalms74:4 Baarigaarrakki Qullaawa Minekki qeexaa'litanno; hakkiichono qeellete malaate uurrissanno.
Psalms74:5 Insa haqqa dolannohu gede, waalchuwa meesanetenni boccu."
Psalms74:6 Qolteno haqqetenni seekkinoonni uduunne baala, meesanetenninna meenchunni cancantu."
Psalms74:7 Qullaawa Minekkino giirtu; Magansi'nannihe darga batteessitu.
Psalms74:8 Insano co'o assite huntankera ka'u; Magano magansi'nanni darga qullaawa darga baala giirtino.
Psalms74:9 Malaattano dila'neemmo; kunni ka'a himanaanchuno dihee'ranno; tini ikkitono mageeshsha keeshshitannoro afinohu dino.
Psalms74:10 Magano! Baarigaaru mamooti geeshsha qacifatannohe? Su'makki shollishino gedeennilla hee'ranno?
Psalms74:11 Kaa'la mayira giwittonke? Angakki badhera mayira qolitto?
Psalms74:12 Magano! Ati bi're hundinni kayisse mootete; baattote aanira gato haadhe abbootto.
Psalms74:13 Ati baara wolqakkinni lamewa badootto; wayi giddo hee'ranno moyicho umo cancanootto.
Psalms74:14 Lewaataani yinanniha baaru moyicho umo cancanootto; maalasino halallitte gobbara hee'ranno mannira sagale assite ootto.
Psalms74:15 Xo'annokki bu'anna xashshuwa lolaasootto; jajjabba lagga kayinni mooshshootto.
Psalms74:16 Barruno hashshuno ateho; arrishshonna agana kalaqoottohu ateeti.
Psalms74:17 Ati baattote qaccera danna worootto; arronna hawadono ati kalaqootto.
Psalms74:18 Kunni kalaqamikkire hedi; Magano! Baarigaarrakki qacifattannohe gara lai! Kuni hawanyu manni su'makki xonsiisino.
Psalms74:19 Ate anga galino manna moyichoho uyitooti; gadadaminoha mannakki horonta habbooti.
Psalms74:20 Eootto gondooro qaagi; baattote aana tunsino darga baala, hawanyootu wo'mitino."
Psalms74:21 Qarraataammu saalfatte higgoonke; qarraataammunna buxane ate galattohe.
Psalms74:22 Magano ballo, kai! Mannikkira coyi'rami; hawanyu manni barra wo'ma qacifatannoheta habbooti."
Psalms74:23 Baarigaarrakki adawarshanna, boollaqi'ransa habbooti."
Psalms75:1 Magano galanteemmohe; lowimmakkino dudumbeemmo; dhaggenniha loosokki kulleemmo.
Psalms75:2 Maganu, «Hedoommo yanna iillituro, halaalaancho yoo yeemmo."
Psalms75:3 Baattonna baattote aana noori baalu daaqanno yannara, ani baattote tuuqqa kaajjisheemmo."
Psalms75:4 Boonaleeyye, ‹Boollaqidhinoonte› bushuulleno, ‹Boo'nitinoonte› yeemmonsa."
Psalms75:5 Haxo sangaaggitannokki gedenna, naaxxitannokki gede kuleemmonsa» yaanno."
Psalms75:6 Yoo soojjaatinninna galchiminni, woy aliyyenninna wodiidinni didagganno."
Psalms75:7 Yoo yaannohu Maganoho; mito bushaho yee mito keereensanno.
Psalms75:8 Kaaliiqihu hanqisi finiinchi angasi no; finiinchoho dimbissannota woyinete xajje wonshanno; iseno duneenna cubbaataammu atalunkunni cingiishshidhanno.
Psalms75:9 Ani kayinni Yaiqoobi Maganire hegere geeshsha duduweemmo; isira galatunni faarseemmo.
Psalms75:10 Bushuullu wolqa hiiqqaqqanno; keeraanote wolqa kayinni dhaabbachishanno.
Psalms76:1 Maganu Yihudu gobbara egennaminoho; su'misino Israeelete ayirradoho.
Psalms76:2 Yerusaalamete Katamira Tsiyooni Ilaalira hee'ranno.
Psalms76:3 Hakkiicho hee're, diinu maxxa, wonqo, bisenna olu bagado baala cancanino."
Psalms76:4 Magano! Ati lowo geeshsha ayirradoho! Diinakki qeelte ilaallate aaninni higatto yannara, xirchikki waajjishannoho."
Psalms76:5 Bareedda baala mulqantino; reyote goxano goxxino; wolqansanna hayyonsa baala mullare ikkitino.
Psalms76:6 Yaiqoobi Magano! Rufittonsa yannara, faradaasinenna faradinsa reyitino."
Psalms76:7 Magano! Ati baalunku waajjannoheho. Hanqatto woyite albakkiinni uurrannohu dino.
Psalms76:8 Ati gordoho heedhe yookki macciishshiishsheenna, baatto waajjite sammi yitu."
Psalms76:9 Magano! Kuni ikkinohu, ati kadantinore wodate yoo lallawattora kaitto yannaraati."
Psalms76:10 Mannu hanqi bati'ri deerrinni atera galatulla lexxannohe; oluwiinni gattinori ayyaanakki ayirrissanno.
Psalms76:11 Magani'ne Kaaliiqira xa'nitinoonnire uuyye; qooxeessaho heedhinoonni gashshaano baala, waajjinanni Maganira afansha abbe."
Psalms76:12 Isi boonaleeyye gashshaano shollishanno; jajjabba mootoolla masisanno.
Psalms77:1 Qoonqo'ya naggi asse Maganunniwa hige raarummo; macciishshannoe gede woxaratoommo.
Psalms77:2 Qarru barra Mooticha hasi'reemmo; hashsha wo'ma anga'ya diriirse huucci'ranni galoommo; kayinnilla, shesho diafi'roommo."
Psalms77:3 Magano! Atere hedeemmo yannara dadilleemmo; heeshshi gotti asse laeemmo woyite jalli assie.
Psalms77:4 Hashsha wo'ma goxano ho'littoe; shetto batidhinoehura coyi'rano didandoommo.
Psalms77:5 Albi yannare hedummo; bi'reereno qaagummo.
Psalms77:6 Hashsha wodani'yanni malanni galeemmo; wodani'yanni malanni umi'yara,"
Psalms77:7 «Mootichu hegerera tuge agurannoni? Kunni ka'a caaqqi yee dilaannonke?
Psalms77:8 Bagamannokkihu baxillisi goofinoni? Hexxonnihu qaalisi soorraminoni?
Psalms77:9 Maganu marara hawinoni? Maarosi hanqoho soorrinoni?» yoommo.
Psalms77:10 Hakkunni gedensaanni, «Wo'munkura Aliidi Magani anga, albi gede jawaata gibbino; lowo geeshsha gawajjamoommo» yoommo."
Psalms77:11 Kaaliiqa! Loosootto looso qaageemmo; alba assootto dhagge addintanni qulli yitannoe.
Psalms77:12 Loosoottore baala hedeemmo; dhaggenniha loosokki baala heeshshi gotti asse laeemmo.
Psalms77:13 Magano! Ati loosatto loosi baalu qullaawaho. Ate Maganinke gedeehu jawu magani dino.
Psalms77:14 Maalale assatto Magani ateeti; gosate mereero wolqakki leellishatto.
Psalms77:15 Yaiqoobinna Yooseefi sircho mannakki, wolqakkinni gatisootto."
Psalms77:16 Magano! Wayibba ate affe waajjitu; baaru diimeno shafantu.
Psalms77:17 Gomichu xeena dirrisino; gordu gugino; belequ raga baalaho bilicci yiino.
Psalms77:18 Gugattokki luuli base tuqa iilli; belequ gobba baala xawisi; baattono qece yite huxidhu.
Psalms77:19 Ati baaru giddoonni higge ha'rootto; bati'ru wayira giddoonni higge saootto; ha'rumikki kayinni illete dileellino.
Psalms77:20 Ge'reewoho albaanni ha'ranno allaalaanchi gede, mannakki Musenna Aarooni widoonni qolte massagootto."
Psalms78:1 Manna'ya, rosiiseemmo'nere macciishshe; macca'neno qaali'ya widira qolle."
Psalms78:2 Coye'ya maammaashshunni hanafeemmo; hundinni kayise maaxamino coye xawiseemmo.
Psalms78:3 Kuni macciishshinoommohunna anfoommohu, ninkera annuwanke kultinonkeho."
Psalms78:4 Kaaliiqi wolqa, loosino loosonna assino dhagge, oosonkera dimaanxeemmo; dagganno ilamarano kulleemmo."
Psalms78:5 Yaiqoobira hajajo, Israeelete seera uyino; annuwankeno oosonsara rosiissanno gede hajajino."
Psalms78:6 Hatto assinohuno, dagganno ilama affe, oosonsara rosiissanno gedeeti."
Psalms78:7 Kunni garinni Magano hexxitanno. Isi assinore baala dihabbanno; hajajosino ayirrissanno.
Psalms78:8 Albi akaakkansa gede haxawarrootanna maahoyye gibbinore diikkitanno; albiri kaajjite Magano diaddaxxitinoreeti; Maganohono ammanantino gedeenni diheedhino.
Psalms78:9 Efireemi ooso olu bagado amaxxite heedhenni, olu barra badhera higge xooqqino."
Psalms78:10 Maganu ledo e'ino gondooro diagadhino; seerisi garinni gala gibbino.
Psalms78:11 Loosino loosonna leellishinonsa dhaggeno habbino.
Psalms78:12 Gibitsete gobbara Tsoaani yinanni xawira, annuwansa la'anna Maganu maalale loosino."
Psalms78:13 Baara lamewa beehe, waa gammalu gede asse uurrise giddoonni qole sayisinonsa."
Psalms78:14 Barra gomichunni, hashsha giirate xawaabbinni massaginonsa."
Psalms78:15 Halallitte gobbara kinna dare, baattote giddonni lowo waa uyinonsa."
Psalms78:16 Kinchu giddonni buicho fushshino; waano xashshimma lolaasino.
Psalms78:17 Insa kayinni, cubbo cubbu aana leddanni Magano hanqissu; halallitte gobbara Wo'munkura Aliidihura hajajama gibbu."
Psalms78:18 Halchitino sagale aannonsa gede qarrissanni, guulte Magano jiffu."
Psalms78:19 «Halallitte gobbara sagale qixxeessara dandaannoni?
Psalms78:20 Kincho ganeenna wayi xashshimma lolahino; buddeenano hatto asse aara dandaannoni? Mannisira maalano qixxeessa dandaannoni?» yitanni Maganu aana busha coyidhino.
Psalms78:21 Kaaliiqi konne coye macciishshe hanqi; mannisi aana giira bushshi; hanqisino insa aana lexxi.
Psalms78:22 Kuni ikkinohuno, iso addaxxanna, gatisannonsatano ammana gibbinohuraati."
Psalms78:23 Ikkollana kayinni gomicho iiminni hajajino; gordu waalchuwa fanino.
Psalms78:24 Ittanno gede, «Menna» yinanni sagale xeenimma dirrisinonsa; gordu sagaleno uyinonsa."
Psalms78:25 Kunni garinni mannu sokkaasinete sagale itino; Maganuno, ikkite gattanno geeshshi sagale soyinonsa."
Psalms78:26 Gordunni soojjaati bubbe bubbissanno gede assi; wolqasinni wodiidi bubbe soyi.
Psalms78:27 Maala bushshimma, intanni ceano baaru shaafi gede asse dirrisinonsa."
Psalms78:28 Tenne ceano qachinsa mereero, dukkannansa gaangaawira dirrisinonsa."
Psalms78:29 Maganu halchonsa wonsheenna, insano itte lowo geeshsha duubbu."
Psalms78:30 Ikkollana kayinni, halchitinore ee hee'reennansanni, ittannorino afiinsara hee'reennanni,"
Psalms78:31 Maganu hanqi aanansa dirri; insa giddonnino umo afidhinore shii; Israeelete giddonni wedella gudi.
Psalms78:32 Hatto assanni hee'reennanni cubbo loosa diagurtino; assino maalalennino iso diaddaxxatino.
Psalms78:33 Kunnira, dirinsa yaaddotenni goofanno gede assino; barrinsano mulenni qocci yii."
Psalms78:34 Insa giddonni gama shiita, gattinori isiwa higgino; aagintaabbanni iso huuccidhanno."
Psalms78:35 Maganu golonsa ikkinota, Wo'munkura Aliidi Magani gatisaanchonsa ikkinota qaaggu."
Psalms78:36 Ikkeennano, afiinsanni awaawurtinosi; arrawinsannino dogginosi."
Psalms78:37 Wodaninsa isi ledo dino; ledosi e'ino gondooro diayirrissino.
Psalms78:38 Isi kayinni maarannoho; cubbonsa agurinonsata ikkinnina dihuninonsa; batinye hige hanqosi hoolino; duucha hige aarasi ittisino.
Psalms78:39 Fule galagale higannokki fooli gede, reyitannore ikkitinota qaagino."
Psalms78:40 Halallitte baattora batinye higge hajajama gibbinosi; moola gobbara duucha higge dadillissinosi.
Psalms78:41 Marro higge Magano jiffinosi; Israeelenniha Qullaawa Magano aarsitinosi.
Psalms78:42 Insa wolqasi habbino; diininsa anganni gatisinsa barrita diqaaggino.
Psalms78:43 Gibitsete Tsoaani xawira assinoha, maala'linannihanna dhaggeeffantanniha loososi habbino."
Psalms78:44 Hadhannota wayibbansano mundeete soorrino; bu'ansano aggannokki gede assino.
Psalms78:45 Mundeensa xuuxanno gede toronde, baatto huntanno gede beche'naama soyino."
Psalms78:46 Gidensa itanno gedenna, jajjansa gudanno gede kanchafare soyino."
Psalms78:47 Woyinete kaashsho kaadetenni, laaltanno haqqe qorrunni gudi."
Psalms78:48 Saadansa kaadetenni, ge'reewonsano banqotenni shii."
Psalms78:49 Hanqisi qoomama aanansa dirrisino; qoomamanna qarra reyote sokkaasinera soyino.
Psalms78:50 Hanqosi diittisino; insano reyotenni digatisino; lubbonsa qoomamunni shiino.
Psalms78:51 Umo ilantinota Gibitsete ooso baala shee gudino.
Psalms78:52 Hakkunni gedensaanni, mannasi ge'reewu gede asse massage fushshino; halallitte gobbara albaanni hige haa're ha'rinonsa."
Psalms78:53 Keerunni haa're ha'rinonsa; insano diwaajjitino; diinnansa kayinni baaru egemmino.
Psalms78:54 Qullaawa baatto, isi umisi amadinotewa, ilaalaame gobba haa're abbinsa."
Psalms78:55 Mannisi alba hige ha'ri deerrinni, daga albinsanni shorrino; baattono siiwotenni beehinonsa. Dagate minnano mannisira uyino."
Psalms78:56 Insa kayinni Wo'munkura Aliidi Magano jiffinosi; maahoyye gibbinosi; hajajosino diayirrissino.
Psalms78:57 Annuwansa gede maahoyye gibbe badhe wodhitinosi; shokkashshu maxxi gede hexxinannikkire ikkitino.
Psalms78:58 Gaaraho magansidhannowa hanqissinosi; seekkinoonni misillanni aarsitinosi.
Psalms78:59 Maganuno konne assoote lae hanqe, Israeelete manna horonta giwi."
Psalms78:60 Mannu mereero worinoha dukkanasi, galanno darga Seelo agurino."
Psalms78:61 Wolqasi malaate qafadisiisino; ayirrinyisi egenshiishsha ikkinoha, Taaboota diinaho sayise uyino."
Psalms78:62 Mannisira lowo geeshsha hanqe, diinu shaannonsa gede assino."
Psalms78:63 Wedellansa giira itte shitu; seennensano adhannohu hoogi.
Psalms78:64 Qeesootansano bagadu shiino; meentinsano wi'la didandiino.
Psalms78:65 Mootichuno goxanotenni kainohu gede ikke kai; woyinete xajje agino bareedi gede ikki.
Psalms78:66 Baarigaarrasi badheegise shorri; hegere saalira tuginsa.
Psalms78:67 Yooseefi sircho didoorino; Efireemi ga'reno dihasi'rino.
Psalms78:68 Kayinnilla Yihudu ga'renna, baxinoha Tsiyooni Ilaala doorino."
Psalms78:69 Hakkiicho, gordoho nooha minesi lawannoha, Qullaawa Mine mi'nino; baattote gede hegerera kaajje hee'ranno gede assino."
Psalms78:70 Borojjichosi Daawiti doodhino; ge'reewu allaalewiinni haa'rinosi.
Psalms78:71 Ge'reewo allaalannowiinni abbe, Israeelete mootenna Maganu manna agarannoha assinosi."
Psalms78:72 Daawitino taalu wodaninni agarinonsa; hayyotenni massaginonsa.
Psalms79:1 Magano! Daga utuwikki giddora e'u; Qullaawa Minekkino batteessitu; Yerusaalameno diiggu.
Psalms79:2 Borojjikki reeshsha allaattete, keeraanote maalano dubbu moyichira uyitino."
Psalms79:3 Diinu Yerusaalamete gaangaawira mundeensa wayimma lolaasino; reyino mannano madaarannohu hoogino.
Psalms79:4 Mulenke noo gosano xontinonke; gaangaawinkera heedhannori oso'litinonke; qacifattinonke.
Psalms79:5 Kaaliiqa, Hegerera hanqoottonke gedeennilla hee'ratto? Laalakkino giirate gede bubbino gedeennilla heedhanno?"
Psalms79:6 Mannakki shite gudde, mulla darga assitinona,"
Psalms79:7 ate egentinohekki daganna, magansidhannohekki gosa aana aarakki dirrisi."
Psalms79:8 Annuwanke cubbi daafira yite qorichishshootinke; lowo geeshsha shentoommona, maarokki rakke soyinke."
Psalms79:9 Maganonkenna gatisaanchonke ballo! Kaa'linke; su'mikkira yite gatisinke; cubbonkeno agurinke.
Psalms79:10 Daga mayira, «Maganinsa hiikko no?» yitannonke. Ati borojjikki mundeera insa rabbissanna, illenkenni la'neemmo gede assinke."
