Proverbs19:29 Haariimaasinete qorichu, gowwootaho gana qixxaabbe no."
Proverbs20:1 Woyinete xajje coyi'rammicha assitanno; agu giwamaancho assanno; agaasinete hoode ha'ra gowwimmate.
Proverbs20:2 Mootete hanqi doobbiichu ittana gedeeho; iso hanqisanno manchi lubbosira reyo abbi'ranno.
Proverbs20:3 Gibbotewiinni fafa ayirrinyeho; gowwu kayinni gibbo baxanno.
Proverbs20:4 Cee'maleessu manchi yannatenni diloosi'ranno; gide gamba assi'nanni yannara lae hooganno.
Proverbs20:5 Mannu wodanira noo hedo diimete wayi gedeete; wodancha afi'rino manchi kayinni hakkiinni hinkii'lanno.
Proverbs20:6 Mannu baalu umisi danchumma duduwanno; ammanamino mancho kayinni maminni anfanni?
Proverbs20:7 Ammanaminohunnitinna halaalaanchu manchi ooso, hiitto ba'raadhinote!"
Proverbs20:8 Yoote barcimira ofollino moote, mannu wodanira bunshe nooronna hoogginoro afanno."
Proverbs20:9 «Wodani'ya keeraanchoho; cubbuno dinoe» yaannohu nooni?
Proverbs20:10 Taalinokki keenaasinchinna safaraasinchi, lamunku Kaaliiqi albaanni battete."
Proverbs20:11 Qaaqquullu danchummanna bunshe, loossanno loosinni anfanni."
Proverbs20:12 Macciishshitanno maccanna la'anno ille, lamenta Kaaliiqi kalaqino."
Proverbs20:13 Goxano bati'rittoro, buxatto; jawaatte loosi'rittoro kayinni duuwatto."
Proverbs20:14 Hidhanno manchi hidhannore dinaadanno; hidhe ha'rihu gedensaanni kayinni, ba'raa'rummo yaanno."
Proverbs20:15 Hayyo coyi'ranno arrawi, culkunninna duumu dilqinni roore ayirradoho."
Proverbs20:16 Egenninokkihura waase ikkanno manchi, imaanasi fushshe aa digattanno."
Proverbs20:17 Hanaanqe intoonni sagale coommitanno; ikkollana galle honsanna, afooho bushsha bushsha yitanno."
Proverbs20:18 Amaalete gedensaanni hendanni hedo qiniitanno; kunnira ma'littokkinni gaadoho fultooti.
Proverbs20:19 Hemaanchu fojo dimaaxannona, coye daddalannoha gamba assidhooti."
Proverbs20:20 Annasi woy amasi xonannohu, barri-male tunsichu giddora eanno."
Proverbs20:21 Muddamme gamba assinoonni jiro, geedote maasso di""ikkitanno."
Proverbs20:22 «Rabba qo'lummokkinni diagureemmo» yitooti; kaa'lannohena, Kaaliiqa addaxxi."
Proverbs20:23 Kaaliiqi hanaaqu keenaasinchonna, taalinokki safaraasincho giwanno."
Proverbs20:24 Mannu ha'ranno doogo kulannohu Kaaliiqaati; hatto ikkina, ha'ranno doogo mannu umisinni hiitto ikke afannoyya?"
Proverbs20:25 Mannu muddame Kaaliiqira xano xa'ne, galagale gaabbiro, woshshaado ikkitanno."
Proverbs20:26 Egennaamu moote bushuulle meemmiisse fushshanno; insano mararikkinni qorichishanno.
Proverbs20:27 Giddoyidi hedo Kaaliiqi caabbichooti; wodanankeno fonqolte la'anno.
Proverbs20:28 Moote gashshootu aana keeshshannohu, halaalenna danchumma loosirooti."
Proverbs20:29 Wedellaho ayirrinyinsa wolqansaati; geerraho gaamaarrensa awuuwensaati.
Proverbs20:30 Hamuruurrissanno gana bunshe huntanno; haxuulano giddoyidi mannimma xalashshitanno.
Proverbs21:1 Mootete wodani Kaaliiqi anga no; isino lolahanno wayi gede hasi'riwa haa're ha'rannosi.
Proverbs21:2 Mannaho ha'ranno doogo baala garalla labbanno; Kaaliiqi kayinni wodanu mu'ra laanno.
Proverbs21:3 Kaaliiqi kakkalotenni roore, keeraanchimmanna halaale loosa baxanno."
Proverbs21:4 Boonaleessaho, boollaqi'rannohuranna bushaho caabbichinsa cubboho."
Proverbs21:5 Jawaatu manchi hedo jirotenni xaadissanno; muddamaanchu kayinni buximate uwanno.
Proverbs21:6 Awaawurre gamba assinanni jiro, fooraru gedeetenna reyote woshshaadooti."
Proverbs21:7 Dancha coye assa baxxannokki daafira, busha manna assino barshi co'o asse hunanno."
Proverbs21:8 Sao loosannohu doogo shokkashshote; keeraanchunniti kayinni suwashshote.
Proverbs21:9 Afoo busha galte ledo mitto mine galantenni, gobba hee'ra woyyate."
Proverbs21:10 Bushuullu bunshe halchitanno; ayerano mararro diafidhino.
Proverbs21:11 Boonaleessu qoricha adhanno yannara, hawanyu egenno afi'ranno; busuluno kullisiro egenno lexxanno."
Proverbs21:12 Keeraanchu Magani, cubbaataamu mini giddo ikkannore seekke la""anno; bushuulleno ba'anno gede assanno."
Proverbs21:13 Buxichu raarera umo duwe giwannoha, qarrame raareenna kaa'lannosihu dihee'ranno."
Proverbs21:14 Maanxe uyinanni afanshi hanqo qiissanno; kikki'late amande uyinoonnirichi, aara gabbi assanno."
Proverbs21:15 Keeraano halaalu fulanno woyite hagiidhitanno; bunshe assitannori kayinni massanno.
Proverbs21:16 Egennote doogo so'rinoha, reyo agarte noosi."
Proverbs21:17 Techo qawaaxxo hasi'rannohu buxanno; woyinete xajjenna buuro baxannohu dureessa diikkanno.
Proverbs21:18 Bushuullu danchu mannira abbitino qarri, wirri yee umonsa amadanno."
Proverbs21:19 Afoo bushanna hanqaaleette galte ledo hee'rantenni, molo baattora hee'ra woyyate."
Proverbs21:20 Egennaamu manchi mine jironna danchu uduunni hee'ranno; gowwu kayinni nooha baala billaallise gudanno.
Proverbs21:21 Keeraanchimmanna shaqqille baxanno manchi seeda diro hee'ranno; wolu mannino ayirrisannosi.
Proverbs21:22 Egennaamu manchi wolqaataammu katama qeele angara qo'lanno; hexxitino qiishono diiganno.
Proverbs21:23 Afoosinna arrawosi agadhannohu, lubbosi qarrunni gatisi'ranno."
Proverbs21:24 Boonaleessunna naaxxaleessu manna arrassanno; boollaqi'ranni isonoo leellishanno.
Proverbs21:25 Cee'maleessu looso baxannokki daafira, halcho calla shitannosi."
Proverbs21:26 Cee'maleessu barra wo'ma yoranni hosanno; keeraanchu kayinni honqooqoo'mikkinni aanno.
Proverbs21:27 Cubbaataammu kakkalo battete; busha hedonni heedhe shiqishshanno woyite roore giwissanno.
Proverbs21:28 Afinokkire farci'rannohu baanno; halaale coyi'rannohu kayinni kaajje hee'ranno.
Proverbs21:29 Bushu manchi assinore morome higa giwanno; halaalaanchu kayinni baalanka coye wodaninni assanno.
Proverbs21:30 Mannu egenno, wodanchanna hedo, Kaaliiqi yiinore ittissara didandiitanno."
Proverbs21:31 Farado olaho qixxeessinanni; qeelle aannohu kayinni Kaaliiqaati.
Proverbs22:1 Lowo jironni danchu su'mi woyyanno; ayirrinyuno birrunninna culkunni rooranno.
Proverbs22:2 Buxichono dureessano kalaqinohu Kaaliiqa ikkinohura, isi albaanni lamunku taaloho."
Proverbs22:3 Egennaamu manchi bushare afiro maaxamanno; hawanyu kayinni ee qarramanno.
Proverbs22:4 Umo heeshshi assanna Kaaliiqa waajja, jirote, ayirrinyehonna heeshshote."
Proverbs22:5 Shokkashshu manchi doogora, utunna woshshaado no; umosi agadhannohu kayinni hakkiinni xooqanno."
Proverbs22:6 Oosote heedhanno gara rosiinsiro, lophite nafa hattenne dihabbanno."
Proverbs22:7 Dureessu buxane gashshanno; liqii'rannohu liqiissannohura borojjicho ikkanno.
Proverbs22:8 Bunshe wixannohu qarra mixxanno; woloota assi'ranno beebba diagurtannosi.
Proverbs22:9 Sagalesi buxichoho beehanno daafira, shooshaqu manchi maassamanno."
Proverbs22:10 Haariimaancho giddonni fushshiniro, yekkeerama diheedhanno; gibbonna xonono uurritanno."
Proverbs22:11 Keeraanchu wodanihunna shaqqadu arrawihu, mootete jaala ikkanno."
Proverbs22:12 Kaaliiqi egenno seekke laanno; yawaawulu qaale kayinni diiganno.
Proverbs22:13 Cee'maleessu, «Gobba doobbiichu noona, mininni fulummoro itannoe» yaanno."
Proverbs22:14 Foora mancho afii diime baleeti; Kaaliiqi hanqinohu hakko mare uwanno.
Proverbs22:15 Oosote wodanira hambe heedhanno; seejjo kayinni hambe giddonsanni fushshite huntanno.
Proverbs22:16 Jiro umisira lexxaranna, dureessaho aara yee buxicho gadadisannohu, isi umisi buximate aana uwanno."
Proverbs22:17 Maccakki kawa qolte egennaamu coyi'rannore macciishshi; wodanakkino egenno'ya widira qoli.
Proverbs22:18 Giddokki wodhite maaxi'rittoro, qaagittoronna coyi'rittoro hagiirsiissannohe."
Proverbs22:19 Kaaliiqa addaxxatto gede, xa konne coye atera egensiiseemmohe."
Proverbs22:20 Kuneeti sajjoo maammaashsha borreessoommohe; kurino egennonna dancha seejjo giddo amaddinoreeti.
Proverbs22:21 Halaalu maatiro rosiissannohe; soyinohehurano halaalaancho dawaro abba dandaatto.
Proverbs22:22 Noonsari dinooreetina buxanenniha ittooti; gadadaamma yoote darga xiibbooti.
Proverbs22:23 Kaaliiqi insara coyi'ramannonsa; gadadissannonsareno gadadisanno.
Proverbs22:24 Hanqaaleessu manchi ledo jaaloontooti; aaramino manchi ledono hadhooti.
Proverbs22:25 Hatto ikkittoro, isi ikkanno gari rosame, giddonni ho'la giwannohe."
Proverbs22:26 Wolu adhino asalira waase ikkite, umokki woshshaadote giddora eessidhooti."
Proverbs22:27 Aattore hoogittoro, goxatto daallasa nafa adhitannohe."
Proverbs22:28 Annuwakki wortinoha albi danna xiibbooti.
Proverbs22:29 Jawaata loosaasincho egennootto? Isi shollaataammu manni albaanni ikkikkinni, mootoollate albaanni uurranno."
Proverbs23:1 Ayirradu manchi ledo itattora ofollatto woyite, albakkiinni noore wodanchite lai."
Proverbs23:2 Itate kokke fa'nituherono, atenee ittisi'ri."
Proverbs23:3 Xagarrote shiqinshoonnita ikkitannona, coommitino sagale doggoonkehe."
Proverbs23:4 Jirote yite atenee orbaassooti; hakko daafurinni gatate egennaamo ikki.
Proverbs23:5 Jiro iima hige buuwanno allamurchi gede, ati la'anna hedeweelcho qoola assidhe buubbe ba'anno."
Proverbs23:6 Do'nichu manchi sagale ittooti; coommitannoti sagalesi halchishshoonkehe.
Proverbs23:7 Wodanisinni sagale fushshitannore calla hedanni, goowi alita iti agi yaannohe."
Proverbs23:8 Itise kae tushshiishannohe; guwisittosi guwishshino mullare ikke gatanno.
Proverbs23:9 Dancha coyekki mullare asse hunannona, gowwaho sirnya hasaabbooti."
Proverbs23:10 Alba worroonni danna xiibbooti; annanna ama afidhinokki ooso baatto adhitooti.
Proverbs23:11 Kaaliiqi golonsaatina, insa daafira isi coyi'ramanno."
Proverbs23:12 Wodanakki seejjote widira, maccakkino egennote qaaliwa qoli."
Proverbs23:13 Wodambu dishaannona, ooso seejjate huluullantooti."
Proverbs23:14 Wodambunni gana isinni, lubbo reyotenni gatisate."
Proverbs23:15 Beetto'ya, ate wodani egennaamo ikkiro, anera tashshi yaannoe."
Proverbs23:16 Arrawikki dancha coyi'ranno woyite, lubbo'ya hagiidhitanno."
Proverbs23:17 Wodanikki cubbaataamma hinaasoonke; barra baala Kaaliiqa waajjatenni hee'ri.
Proverbs23:18 Hatto assittoro, hexxokki diba'anno."
Proverbs23:19 Beetto'ya macciishshi; egennaamo ikki; wodanakkino halaalaancho doogo widira qoli.
Proverbs23:20 Agaasinete ledo hossooti; lowo maala ita baxxannori ledono waartooti.
Proverbs23:21 Dimbaasinenna itaasine buxxanno; goxanote batinyino hoccaame uddano uddisiisanno.
Proverbs23:22 Ilinohehu annikki yaannore macciishshi; amakkino geedhitanno yannara mishshootise.
Proverbs23:23 Halaale afi'ri ikkinnina hu'nitooti; egenno, afanna wodanchano hooggooti."
Proverbs23:24 Keeraancho beetto afi'rino annira, lowo geeshsha tashshi yaannosi. egennaamo beetto ilinohuno hagiidhanno."
Proverbs23:25 Annikkinna amakki hagiidhitannohe gede ikki iltinoheta tashshi assise.
Proverbs23:26 Beetto'ya ballo, yeemmore seekkite macciishshi; ani ha'reemmo doogo higge ha'ri."
Proverbs23:27 Foora mancho qile bale gedeete; saaliweelo meyatino woshshaadote.
Proverbs23:28 Mulqidhannori gede dugganno; lowo manna yawaawuloota assitanno.
Proverbs23:29 Raarannohu ayeti? Dadillannohu ayeti? Mannu ledo giwamannohu ayeti? Gaabbannohu ayeti? Beebbatenni madi'rannohu ayeti? Ille duu'mannohu ayeti?
Proverbs23:30 Agunni gale hosannoha diikkino? Haaro agatto hasanni ha'rannoha diikkino?
Proverbs23:31 Woyinete xajje kokkete coommitanno daafira, birillete xabbanno woyite ise widira higge la'ooti."
Proverbs23:32 Gedensaanni hamashshu gede qassanno; buutete gede idditanno.
Proverbs23:33 Illete xawute ganannohe; garunni hedanna coyi'ra didandaatto.
Proverbs23:34 Goxoottowa daallasu doyannohe; ka'anna kawa suutto ga'nitanni noottoha lawannohe.
Proverbs23:35 «Gannoonnieha ikkanno; kayinnilla diqaageemmo. Awwaaltinoeha ikkanno; kayinnilla leellinoeri dino. Kunnira kae agatto hasi'ro ikka?» yaatto.
Proverbs24:1 Busha manna hinaassooti; ledonsa hosateno halchitooti.
Proverbs24:2 Wodaninsanni wole gawajjate heddanno; coyidhanno coyi baalu xagarrote.
Proverbs24:3 Mine hayyotenni minnanni; ogimmatenni uurrinsanni.
Proverbs24:4 Egenno heedhuro, wolambinaatu uduunninna jiro mine wo'mitanno."
Proverbs24:5 Wolqaataamo ikkantenni egennaamo ikka woyyate; wolqa egenno roortanno.
Proverbs24:6 Olaho fulate albaanni amaalama hasiisanno; lowo mali hee'riro qeelle afi'nanni.
Proverbs24:7 Gowwaho egenno xeertidhe no; danchare hasaambanni woyiteno yee afannori dino.
Proverbs24:8 Bunshe malannoha, xagaraamoho yinanni."
Proverbs24:9 Hawanyu malanno mali cubbo callaho; haariimaancho mannu baalu giwanno.
Proverbs24:10 Qarru barra wolqiweelittoro, jawaatte diafatto."
Proverbs24:11 Reyote widira bobbahanno manna gatisi; gorramate hadhanni noore gargari.
Proverbs24:12 «Ani diafoommo» yiittoro, wodana la""anno Magani diafanno? La""anni noohehu diegennino? Mannaho loosisi garinni aannohu di""isooti?"
Proverbs24:13 Beetto'ya, malawu danchahona iti; malawu leono coommitannote."
Proverbs24:14 Egennono lubbokkira hattootena afi; ise afi'rittoro geedo biiffannohe; hexxokkino diba'anno.
Proverbs24:15 Bushu manchi gede keeraanchu mine duggooti; galannowano diiggooti.
Proverbs24:16 Keeraanchu 7 hige uwiro nafa kaanno; bushu kayinni baote aana uwanno.
Proverbs24:17 Baarigaarikki qarrameenna hagiidhitooti; gufi'ranno woyiteno tashshi yoonkehe.
Proverbs24:18 Kaaliiqi konne coye dibaxanno; baarigaarikki aaninnino hanqosi hoolanno.
Proverbs24:19 Bushu manni ikkito la'e aarantooti; insa la'eno hinaassooti.
Proverbs24:20 Bushu geedo diafi'rino; caabbichisino xoanno.
Proverbs24:21 Beetto'ya, Kaaliiqa waajji; mooteno ayirrisi; insara hajajantannokkiri ledono sumuu yitooti."
Proverbs24:22 Hattoo manni hedeweelcho baanno; Maganu woy moote abbitanno qarra afinohu dinona.
Proverbs24:23 Aane noo maammaashshino egennaammu coyidhinoho. Yoo yaatto woyite, godowa hossooti."
Proverbs24:24 Busha, «Ati keeraanchoho» yaannoha, mannu rumannosi; gosano gibbannosi."
Proverbs24:25 Busha rufannohu kayinni, hagiirre afi'ranno; dancha maassono hoode hadhannosi."
Proverbs24:26 Suwashsho dawaro qola, baxillu malaateeti."
Proverbs24:27 Gobbayidire balaxxe biddi assi'ri; gatikki loosono guxxi; hakkunni gedensaanni mine mi'ni.
Proverbs24:28 Jaalikki aana beebbatenni naqqassooti; arrawikkinni doggooti.
Proverbs24:29 «Assinoeta asse qo'leemmo; rabba'yano qo'leemmo» yitooti.
Proverbs24:30 Cee'maleessu manchi gateenni hige saoommo; jallaagu manchi kaashshi widoonni hige ha'roommo.
Proverbs24:31 Baalankare utu amade no; baattono ishinu egemme no; huxxuno diigame baino.
Proverbs24:32 Anino konne coye heeshshi gotti asse lae, umi'yara seejjo adhoommo."
Proverbs24:33 Shiima geeshsha goxi; shiima yanna liphi assi; shiima geeshsha anga gamba assidhe fooliishshi'ri.
Proverbs24:34 Hatto ikkite heedheenna buxima mulqi'rannohu gede, hoongu bagado amaxxino manchi gede hedeweelcho daannohe."
Proverbs25:1 Tini Selemooni masaluwa Yihudu moote Hiziqiyaasi gashshooti giddo noo manni borreessinote.
Proverbs25:2 Magano coye maaxasira ayirrinsannisi; mootoolla kayinni coye xawo fushshansara ayirrinsanninsa.
Proverbs25:3 Mootoollate hedo gordu gede xeerto, baaru gede diime ikkitinohura, iillinara didandiinanni."
Proverbs25:4 Birra ko'rishshe ximbiiwittoro, daashshannohuno isinni danchare seekkanno."
Proverbs25:5 Hattonni mootete albinni busha mala hooli; gashshootisino halaalu aana xintaminoha ikkanno.
Proverbs25:6 Mootete albaanni leellama hasidhooti; jajjabbu ledo qote taalate halchitooti.
Proverbs25:7 Ofolloottowiinni kayinseenna ayirradu manni albaanni shollattontenni, «Kawa amo» yineenna mare ofolla woyyitannohe."
Proverbs25:8 Halaalu wolunniha ikkeenna garante saalfatattokki gede, mitto coye affanni heedhenni muddante gashshaanonniwa massitooti."
Proverbs25:9 Coye coyi'ramattohu ledo coyi'rami ikkinnina, wolu fojo fantooti."
Proverbs25:10 Hakkunni ka'a kayinni, macciishshannohu mishannohe; mitte hige bainoha su'makki qolte seekkidhe diafatto."
Proverbs25:11 Garunni coyi'noonni coyi, birru mereero worroonni culki gedee xu'maati."
Proverbs25:12 Egennaammu seejjo macciishsha, culku qalawate woy culku irri gedeete."
Proverbs25:13 Qiidino wayi fooggalo gabbi assannonte gede, ammanamino sokkaanchi soqqinohu wodana tashshi assanno."
Proverbs25:14 Aannokkire eemmo yaanni duduwanno manchi, xeenu nookki gomichinna bubbe gedeeho."
Proverbs25:15 Wodaninni coyi'ra gashshaancho ammansiissanno; ga'labbichu hasaawi miqicho eanno.
Proverbs25:16 Malawo ikkannohe geeshsha calla iti; quwa sayisse itittoro tushshiishannohe.
Proverbs25:17 Bagannohehanna giwannoheha ikkannona, jaalikki minira batinyeegge martooti."
Proverbs25:18 Jaalisi aana afinokkire coyi'rannohu, bisete, dullunna qunxoonni maxxi gedeeho."
Proverbs25:19 Qarru yannara yawaawula mancho hexxa, lellenqitino hinkonni corqatenna, naafitte lekkanni ha'rate ledo rodoote."
Proverbs25:20 Dadilline hee'neenna faarso faarsa, qiidi'ne hee'neenna uddano mulqatenna, madate aana caarsannoricho dunate gedeeti."
Proverbs25:21 Baarigaarikki hudi'riro itisisi; goo'rirono hayikkisisi.
Proverbs25:22 Hatto assittoro, saalfate umo heeshshi yaanno; Kaaliiqino assoottorira danchumma qolannohe."
Proverbs25:23 Aliyye bubbe abbitanno bubbe gede, hemeno mannu alba tunsiissanno."
Proverbs25:24 Afoo busha galte ledo mitto mine galantenni, gobba hee'ra woyyate."
Proverbs25:25 Xeerto gobbanni daannoha dancha duduwo macciishsha, goo'ne hee'ne qiidino waa agate gedeeti."
Proverbs25:26 Cubbaataamu ikkito rosanno keeraanchi, sabbaawino xashshinna boo'raabbino buicho gedeeho."
Proverbs25:27 Malawo batisi're ita dancha diikkitino; lowo geeshsha janjanni gede hasi'ra ayirrinye diuyitanno.
Proverbs25:28 Umosi qeelinokki manchi, huxxu diigameenna fano noo katami gedeeho."
Proverbs26:1 Arri kaadenna, gide gamba assi'nanni yanna xeeni gede, gowwaho uyinanni ayirrinyi dibiifanno."
Proverbs26:2 Ka'anna kawa buubbanno cea gawajjitannokkinte gede, beebbatenni rummanni rumo assitannori dino."
Proverbs26:3 Liche faradoho, bixaalu gaangootaho hasiisannonte gede, gowwu badherano siqqo maltino."
Proverbs26:4 Isi gede ikkattona, gowwaho agadhino garinni qoltooti."
Proverbs26:5 Hedosi gede ikkinokkita afanno gede, xa'mosira gowwa dawaro qoli."
Proverbs26:6 Gowwaho sokka soqqa, meessi lekka mudhate, woy shaannore agate ledo mittete."
Proverbs26:7 Gowwootu maammaashshi, naaffe rarra'ino lekka gedeeho."
Proverbs26:8 Gowwaho ayirrinye aa, corqaayyete aana usurroonni kinchi gedeeti."
Proverbs26:9 Gowwu maammaahanno maammaashshi, dimbaanchu anga noo utichi gedeeho."
Proverbs26:10 Doogo saanni noo gowwa, woy dimbaancho loosoho wodhannohu, leelliha baala qase madiissanno manchi gedeeho."
Proverbs26:11 Gowwimmasira marro higannohu, tufosi qole itanno woshichi gedeeho."
Proverbs26:12 Umosi egennaamo asse kiiranno manchinni roore, gowwu manchira hexxo noosi."
Proverbs26:13 Cee'maleessu manchi, «Doogote doobbiichu no; lowo doogorano doobbiwu no» yee mininni difulanno."
Proverbs26:14 Cufanu tanqu mereero hosannonte gede, cee'maleessuno ma'nasira gangalatanni hosanno."
Proverbs26:15 Cee'maleessaho xilteho worino anga fushshe, afooho massi'ra nafa daafuroho."
Proverbs26:16 Cee'maleessaho, afinore coyi'rannohu lamalu manninni roore, isi woyyannoha lawannosi."
Proverbs26:17 Mulla kae manni coyira eannohu, doogo ha'ranni noo woshicho macca amadinohu ledo mittoho."
Proverbs26:18 «Haariimannilla noommo» yaanni olliichosi dogannohu, bagado godo'lanno macharaaraami gedeeho."
Proverbs26:19 
Proverbs26:20 Haqqe gooffuro giira xo'annonte gede, hemaanchu nookkiwa gibbo diheedhanno."
Proverbs26:21 Cilaatte kashilo, haqqe giira kalaqqannonte gede, hanqaaleessu manchi gibbo halashshanno."
Proverbs26:22 Heme sagalete gede, kushshi yite coo'mitanno."
Proverbs26:23 Giddo bunshe amade hee're suumetenni dogannohu, birra aanaho xallinoonni midaano gedeeho."
Proverbs26:24 Wodanunni gudise baxannokkihu, goowi alita suumetenni doganno."
Proverbs26:25 Wodanisira batte wo'mitinona, shaqqadu arrawinni coyi'reennahe amma'ntootisi."
Proverbs26:26 Xagarro giddo maaxi'riro, bunshesi songote albaanni reqecci yitanno."
Proverbs26:27 Woleho bale umannohu, u'minotera isinni umanno; wolu aanira kincho gongo'mishannohura, kinchu aanaho jigannosi."
Proverbs26:28 Mannu giwannohura nookkire coyi'ranno; ikkollana, manna beebbatenni bokkeessa bao abbitanno."
Proverbs27:1 Barru maa abbannoro diafoottona, ga'a daafira adawadhitooti."
Proverbs27:2 Ati atenee jaccantenni wolu jajihero woyyate; afiikki naadahentenni wolu naadihero woyyate.
Proverbs27:3 Gowwu kalaqanno qarri, kinchunninna shaafunni roore ayirranno."
Proverbs27:4 Hanqunna aaru mararro diafi'rino; hinaasu kayinni hakkiinni baasanno.
Proverbs27:5 Xawo fulinokki baxillinni, faajjete rufa woyyate."
Proverbs27:6 Marmarame sunqihero nafa qahokki amma'nitooti; madiissirono jaalu woyyanno.
Proverbs27:7 Duuwinoha malawu giwisannosi; hudi'rinohura kayinni qaraarinori nafa coommannosi.
Proverbs27:8 Dargasi agure ha'ranno manchi, minese agurte buubbanno ceicho gedeeho."
Proverbs27:9 Buurunna su'naru wodana tashshi assanno; danchu manchi amaaleno hatto hagiirsiissanno.
Proverbs27:10 Jaalakkinna annikki jaala agurtooti; xeertote noo rodiinni, mule noo olliichi woyyatena, qarramatto barra rodiikki minira hadhooti."
Proverbs27:11 Beetto'ya, xontannoerira dawaro qola dandeemmo gede, egennaamo ikki; aneno hagiirsiisie."
Proverbs27:12 Egennaamu manchi bushare afiro maaxamanno; hawanyu kayinni ee qarramanno.
Proverbs27:13 Egenninokkihura waase ikkanno manchira, imaanisi amadamanno; wosinchoho waase ikkannohura jajjisi adhamanno."
Proverbs27:14 Gute kae qoonqosi naggi asse olliichosi keere haa'rannohu, rumannohu gede kiiramanno."
Proverbs27:15 Coyi'rammitte manchonna, xissanno mini mittoho."
Proverbs27:16 Diilallo uurrinse, zayiteno cu'mine anfannikkinte gede, coyi'rammitte manchono hoolle didandiinanni."
Proverbs27:17 Siwiilu siwiila gamaxannonte gede, mannuno manna gamaxanno."
Proverbs27:18 Laaltanno haqqicho agadhannohu gumase itanno; mootichasi agadhannohuno ayirranno.
Proverbs27:19 Wayi hincilaallote gede ikke alba leellishannonte gede, mannu akatino wodanisi giddo leellanno."
Proverbs27:20 Reyonna waamma, «Duuwoomma» yitannokkinte gede, mannuno halcho, «Ikkitinoe» diyaanno."
Proverbs27:21 Birranna culka giiratenni fonqolle la'nanninte gede, mannu ewelumma bande anfannihuno, isi daafira wolootu dudubbanno duduwinniiti."
Proverbs27:22 Gowwa gidu gede uduluumaho worre udullirono, gowwimmasi aanisinni diho'ltanno."
Proverbs27:23 Ge'reewikki dana badde afi; saadakkino ille aanaho worte towati.
Proverbs27:24 Jiro hegerera diheedhanno; ayirrinyuno ilamate ilama geeshsha diiillanno.
Proverbs27:25 Moola hayisso midde hoolteenna haaro hayisso mudhuro, ilaalu aana noota shaqqado hayissono gamba assi'ratto."
Proverbs27:26 Ge'reewu ordanni imaana ga'natto; meunnino baatto hidhatto.
Proverbs27:27 Meu ado ateranna maatekkira sagale ikkitanno; minekki soqqamannorirano iillitanno.
Proverbs28:1 Bushu manchi shorrinikkinni xooqanno; keeraanchu kayinni doobbiichu gede bashshi assikkinni hee'ranno.
Proverbs28:2 Mannu bushiro gashshaano dikeeshshitanno; egennaammunna wodancha afidhino gashshaano kayinni, gobba noowa geissanno."
Proverbs28:3 Buxane gadadisanno gashshaanchi, gide huntanno barada gedeeho."
Proverbs28:4 Seera ayirrisannokki manchi busha manna galatanno; seera agadhannohu kayinni busha giwanno.
Proverbs28:5 Bushu manni halaalu maatiro diegennino; Kaaliiqa hasidhannori kayinni seekkite egentino.
Proverbs28:6 Yawaawulu dureessinni, ammanamino buxichi woyyate."
Proverbs28:7 Seera agadhanno beetti egennaamoho; tafaafurrootu ledo hosannohu kayinni annasi saalfachishanno.
Proverbs28:8 Qallotenninna hanaaqunni jiro gamba assi'rannohu, buxane mararannohura qixxeessanno."
Proverbs28:9 Seerasi ayirrisannokki manchi huuccatto, Maganoho battete."
Proverbs28:10 Suwadda busha doogo qole haa're ha'rannohu, isi umisi umino balera uwanno; keeraanchoho kayinni geedo seekkannosi."
Proverbs28:11 Dureessu umosi egennaamo asse kiiranno; wodancha afi'rino buxichi kayinni isi ayimma xunse egennino.
Proverbs28:12 Keeraano qeeltanno yannara, lowo geeshsha hagiidhinanni. Bushuullu roorre afidhanno yannara, kayinni mannu maaxamanno."
Proverbs28:13 Cubbosi maaxannohu dilatanno; aagintaawannohunna agurannohu kayinni maaro afi'ranno.
Proverbs28:14 Wo'ma woyite Kaaliiqa waajjanno manchi ba'raa'rinoho; wodanasi kaajjishannohu kayinni bushawa uwanno.
Proverbs28:15 Buxane gadadisannohu bushu gashshaanchi, ittananno doobbiichinna kubbe amadanno dagunchi gedeeho."
Proverbs28:16 Wodancha xe'ino gashshaanchi mararro diegennino; hanaaqo giwannohu kayinni lowo diro hee'ranno.
Proverbs28:17 Manna shiinohu, reya geeshsha bararraaqanni hee'ranno; ayino kaa'loonkesi."
Proverbs28:18 Sumbetenni hee'rannohu gatanno; shokkado doogo ha'rannohu kayinni balete uwanno.
Proverbs28:19 Baatto loosi'rannohu sagale duuwanno; mullawa hossannori hoode ha'rannohu kayinni buxanno.
Proverbs28:20 Ammanamino manchi lowo maasso afi'ranno; jirote muddamannohu kayinni, qorichishamikkinni digatanno."
Proverbs28:21 Godowa hosa dancha diikkitanno; mitu kayinni shiima sagalera halaale dawisanno.
Proverbs28:22 Hafuuraamu manchi jirotella hagaaganno; buxima daggannosita diegennino.
Proverbs28:23 Arrawunni coommishamannohunni roore, seejjannohu gedensaanni baxille afi'ranno."
Proverbs28:24 Annanna ama moore, «Cubbo di""ikkino» yaannohu, mulqi'rannohu ledo mittoho."
Proverbs28:25 Hafuuraamu manchi gibbo kalaqanno; Kaaliiqa addaxxannohu kayinni duuwanno.
Proverbs28:26 Umosi addaxxannohu gowwaho; egennaamu kayinni gatanno.
Proverbs28:27 Buxichoho aannohu dihooganno; alba shawwu yee saannohu kayinni rumamanno.
Proverbs28:28 Bushuullu gashshoote amaddanno yannara, mannu maaxamanno. Insa ba'anno yannara kayinni, keeraano hala'litanno."
Proverbs29:1 Batinye hinge seejjineenna, mokkookke higa giwannohu, hurannokki gede ikke hedeweelcho hiiqqamanno."
Proverbs29:2 Keeraano gashshitanno yannara, mannu hagiidhanno; bushuullu gashshitanno yannara kayinni, mannu dadillanno."
Proverbs29:3 Egenno baxanno beetti anna hagiirsiisanno; fooru meenti hoode ha'rannohu kayinni, jirosi billaallisanno."
Proverbs29:4 Taashshe gashshanno moote gobba geisanno; woxe baxannoha ikkiro kayinni diiganno.
Proverbs29:5 Jaalasi afuunni dogannohu, lekkasira woshshaado wodhanno."
Proverbs29:6 Bushu manchi loosino cubbinni amadamanno; keeraanchu kayinni hagiidhanni faarsanno.
Proverbs29:7 Keeraanchu manchi buxanete daafira coyi'ramanno; bushu manchi kayinni hattoore diegennino.
Proverbs29:8 Haariimaasine katamaho lowo qarra kalaqqanno; egennaammu kayinni hanqo qiissitanno.
Proverbs29:9 Egennaamu manchi gowwu ledo coye yoote shiqishi'riro, gowwu hanqanni oso'lanno; sammino diyaanno."
Proverbs29:10 Manna shitannori, fayyaaleessa mancho gibbanno; keeraancho manchono shitara hasidhanno."
Proverbs29:11 Gowwu manchi hanqosi gudise leellishanno; egennaamu kayinni aarasi cincatenni sayisanno.
Proverbs29:12 Gashshaanchu kaphu coye macciishshannoha ikkiro, isira woroonni gashshitinori baalu bushuulle ikkitanno."
Proverbs29:13 Buxichonna buxicho gadadisannoha, Kaaliiqi taashshe kalaqino."
Proverbs29:14 Moote buxane taashshe laannoha ikkiro, gashshootisi seeda diro hee'ranno."
Proverbs29:15 Ooso gananna seejja egennaamma assitanno; seejjo bainohu kayinni amasi saalfachishanno.
Proverbs29:16 Bushuullu gashshituro cubbu bati'ranno; mitto barra kayinni keeraano hakkuri ubbanna illensanni la'anno.
Proverbs29:17 Oosokki seejjite lossittoro, fooliishsho afi'ratto; insano wodanakki tashshi assitanno."
Proverbs29:18 Ajuuja afi'rinokki manni ragimaleho; Maganu seera agadhannohu kayinni ba'raa'rinoho.
Proverbs29:19 Yoottore macciishshiro nafa dihajajamannohena, soqqamaanchokki afuu callunni seejjitooti."
Proverbs29:20 Hedikkinni muddame coyi'ranno manchinni, gowwu manchira roore hexxo noosi."
Proverbs29:21 Soqqamaanchikkira anjenni kayisse hasi'rinore baala uyittoro, gedensaanni noohere baala gudise adhara hasi'ranno."
Proverbs29:22 Hanqaaleessu manchi gibbo kayisanno; aaramanno manchi sao batisanno.
Proverbs29:23 Boonaleessu manchi shollanno; umosi heeshshi assannohu kayinni ayirranno.
Proverbs29:24 Lubbosi cee'minohu, mooraanchu ledo hosanno; yoote alba xa'mineenna ammanirono, qorichishamanno; halaale coyi'ra hoogiro kayinni, Maganu qorichishannosi."
Proverbs29:25 Manna waajjannohu woshshaado eanno; Kaaliiqa addaxxannohu kayinni keere afi'ranno.
Proverbs29:26 Lowo manni gashshaanchu yaannore agadhanno; taashshannohu kayinni Kaaliiqa callaati.
Proverbs29:27 Suwashshu manni shokkashsho manna dibaxanno; shokkashshu mannino suwashsho giwanno.
Proverbs30:1 Maasa gobba manchi Yaaqe beetti Aguuri, kunninni aane noo coye coyi'rino: Mittu manchi Maganunniwa hige, «Ani horonta qeelamoommo; hiitto ikke hee'reemmo?"
Proverbs30:2 Mannimmatewiinni fule saadate gedeeha ikkoommo; mannaho noo wodanano diafi'roommo.
Proverbs30:3 Anera egenno dinoe; Qullaawu Maganire mittoreno diafoommo.
Proverbs30:4 Iimira gordo mare dayinohu ayeti? Bubbe angatenni cu'minohu ayeti? Waa uddanosinni xaaxe amadannohu ayeti? Baattote danna worinohu ayeti? Afoottoha ikkiro, su'misi ayeti? Beettisi su'mino ayeti?"
Proverbs30:5 «Kaaliiqi uyino hexxo wonshanno; irkidhannosirira isi wonqonsaati.
Proverbs30:6 Rufannohekki gedenna kaphaanchoho yaannohekki gede, isi yiinokkire yitooti."
Proverbs30:7 «Magano, reyammora albaanni, atewiinni 2 coye hasi'reemmona wonshie."
Proverbs30:8 Dogatenninna kapho coyi'ratenni gatisie; hasiissanno sagale uyie; kayinnilla buxicho woy dureessa assitootie.
Proverbs30:9 Duuwummoro, ate haweemmo; buxummoro mooraancho ikke, ate Magani'ya su'ma xonsiiseemmo» yee woxaratino."
Proverbs30:10 Rumannohehanna qarra abbannoheha ikkannona, soqqamaancho mootichisi albaanni bushiishshooti."
Proverbs30:11 Annansa runtannorinna, amansano naaddannokki ilama no."
Proverbs30:12 Lowo geeshsha battaabbe heedhe, insanaa keeraano assite kiirtannori no."
Proverbs30:13 Boo'natenni ufuufante, manna mishshannori no."
Proverbs30:14 Hinko bisete gedeeri, kelta billawu gedeerinna, buxanenna gadadaamma marartannokkiha miiccannori no."
Proverbs30:15 Ulaaullete, «Uyie, uyie» yaannori, lame seenni noose. Hattonni, ikkinonke yaannokkiri shoolurichi no."
Proverbs30:16 Insano, jeennaateho, gaana manchooti, waa goodhe heedhanno baattootinna xo'annokki giiraati."
Proverbs30:17 Annasi arrassannohanna amasi mishannoha, illesi haraqeeyye kurkurtanno; maalasino allaatte ittanno."
Proverbs30:18 Lowo geeshsha maala'linannihu, shoolu coyi no."
Proverbs30:19 Insano, iima allamurchu buuwanno garaati, hamashshu kinchu aana ha'ranno garaati, markaawe baaru aanaanni hadhanno garaatinna, meyatinna labbaahu baxillunni xaadanno garaati."
Proverbs30:20 Foortuhu gedensaanni isenee xaphi assidhe, «Mitte bunsheno diassoomma» yitanno manchono hattoote."
Proverbs30:21 Baatto duqqa dundiitinokkihu, shoolu coyi no."
Proverbs30:22 Hakkuno, borojjichu moohaati, gowwu manchi duuwaati,"
Proverbs30:23 gimboonni mancho galte afi'ratenna, meya borojjicho mootittese ragi'rate."
Proverbs30:24 Baattote aana busulletenni egennaminori, shoolu shiimmaaddu kalaqami no:"
Proverbs30:25 Gooxaamu wolqa diafi'rinoho; ikkollana, sagalesi arro gamba assi'ranno."
Proverbs30:26 Weceece jawaata diikkitino; ikkollana, heedhannohu kinnate giddooti."
Proverbs30:27 Kanchafaru moote diafi'rino; ikkollana, baalunku amanyaatunni ha'ranno."
Proverbs30:28 Danda'le angatenni amandanni; mootete mine nafa heedhanno.
Proverbs30:29 Danchu garinni qaafannori, shoolu kalaqami no."
Proverbs30:30 Insano, wolqa saada baalanta roorinohu, ayeno waajje badhera xooqannokki doobbiichooti,"
Proverbs30:31 meichu gocooti, qa'naafanni ha'ranno kormaatinna, gosasi albaanni hawaqi're qaafanno mooteeti."
Proverbs30:32 Giwwimmakki naaxxaleessa assituheronna, bunshe malattoha ikkittoro, hanni galfatte ka'e, shiima geeshsha hedi."
Proverbs30:33 Ado shanfiro buuro fulanno; sano ganniro sananno fultanno; hattonni, hanqo kakkayisa gibbo abbitanno."
Proverbs31:1 Kunninni aante nooti, Maasa mootera Limueelira amasi uyitinosi seejjooti:"
Proverbs31:2 Baxeemmahehu beetti'ya, xa'ne afi'roommahehu, hanni atera maricho kulohe?"
Proverbs31:3 Mootoolla gudinoreetina, wolqakki meentu aana guxxitooti."
Proverbs31:4 Limueeli'ya, macciishshie! Mootoolla woyinete xajje aga dihasiissannonsa; woy dimbissanno agattora hagaaga dihasiissannonsa."
Proverbs31:5 Aggannoha ikkiro seera habbanno; buxanete yoono shokkishshanno.
Proverbs31:6 Dimbissanno agatto reyitanni nooriranna, heeshsho tunsitinoriralla hasiissanno."
Proverbs31:7 Agguro, buximansanna shettonsa habbanno."
Proverbs31:8 Coyidhe affannokkirira afoo ikkinsa; kaa'lannoha hoogginorira halaale fushshinsa.
Proverbs31:9 Insa daafira coyi'raminsa; buxanetenna gadadaammaho halaale fushshinsa.
Proverbs31:10 Maanaame galte ayi afi'rannose? Ise ilkunni roore muxxete.
Proverbs31:11 Ayiddaannise seekke hexxannose; isirano xeannosiri dihee'ranno.
Proverbs31:12 Lubbotenni noo geeshsha danchare assitannosita ikkinnina, isira bushare diassitanno."
Proverbs31:13 Ge'reewu ordanninna dancha shalonni, hisattino anganni uddano gantanno."
Proverbs31:14 Ise daddalu markaawe gede, xeerto gobbanni sagale gamba assitanno."
Proverbs31:15 Soodikkinni gutte ka'e, minise mannira sagale qixxeessitanno; soqqamaanoserano looso beekkanno."
Proverbs31:16 Loosi'nanni gobba umise la'e hidhitanno; afidhino woxinni kaashsho hirte kaassanno.
Proverbs31:17 Hallose kaajjishshe qodhite, looso jawaatte loossanno."
Proverbs31:18 Assitannori baalu ledinoronna hooginoro buuxxanno; hashsha minese caabbichu dixoanno.
Proverbs31:19 Uddano angasenni suqqite gantanno.
Proverbs31:20 Buxanetenna qarraataammaho, anga hiixattanno."
Proverbs31:21 Minise mannira iibbitanno uddano noonsa daafira, qorru yannara nafa diyaaddanno."
Proverbs31:22 Ma'nate aana karrannire angasenni seekkitanno; iseno duume haarrenni gannoonniha xuma imaana uddidhanno.
Proverbs31:23 Ayiddaannise gobbate geerri ledo, songanno yannara ayirrinsanniho."
Proverbs31:24 Uddanonna hiito angasenni gante, daddalaasinete hirtanno."
Proverbs31:25 Jawaatatenna ayirradote; albillittete daafirano diyaaddanno.
Proverbs31:26 Afiisenni egenno fultanno; manna shaqqillunni seejjitanno.
Proverbs31:27 Minese seekkite towattanno; loossukkinni ofolte diittanno.
Proverbs31:28 Oosose gotti yite ka'e, naaddannose; ayiddaanniseno,"
Proverbs31:29 «Danchare assinohu lowo meenti no; ati kayinni wo'manka roorete» yaanni jajannose.
Proverbs31:30 Xumme kaphoho; biinfilluno baanno; Kaaliiqa waajjitanno mancho kayinni galatantinote.
Proverbs31:31 Loossino loosi daafira ayirrissese; mannu albaannino naaddese.
Ecclesiastes1:1 Yerusaalamete moohinohu rosiisaanchu Daawiti beetti coyi'rino coyi kunninni aane nooho.
Ecclesiastes1:2 Rosiisaanchu: Haafaho, haafaho, haafu haafaati; baalunkuri haafaho!"
Ecclesiastes1:3 Mannu baattote aana daafuranno daafurinni maricho lexxanno?
Ecclesiastes1:4 Ilama sa'eenna ilama riqiwantanno; kalqe kayinni noowa heedhanno.
Ecclesiastes1:5 Arrishsho fulte e'anno; fultinowa higate muddantanno.
Ecclesiastes1:6 Bubbe wodiidira higge bubbissanno; aliyyera higgeno doyitanno. Doyite doyite galagalte higganno.
Ecclesiastes1:7 Wayi baalu lolahe baara eanno; baaruno horonta diwo'manno. Wayi galagale fulino dargira higanno.
Ecclesiastes1:8 Baalunku coyi daafursannoho; tenne mannu tire coyi'ra didandaanno. Ille la'e diduubbanno; maccano macciishshite dibagganno.
Ecclesiastes1:9 Alba ikkino coyi galagale ikkanno. Alba assinoonniha xaano assinanni. Kunnira kalqete aanaanni mittuno haaru coyi dino.
Ecclesiastes1:10 Ayeno, «Kuni haaro coyeti!» yiiro nafa, hakku coyi ninke ilammammora albaanni nooho."
Ecclesiastes1:11 Alba hee'rino manna qaagannohu dino. Daggara noo ilamano xa noo ilama diqaagganno.
Ecclesiastes1:12 Ani rosiisaanchu Israeelete moote ikke Yerusaalamete hee'roommo.
Ecclesiastes1:13 Tenne kalqe aana ikkino coye baala buuxe afate mixi'roommo. Maganu mannaho duhisiisino duhi lowo geeshsha bati'ra ikkinota afoommo.
Ecclesiastes1:14 Kalqete aanaanni ikkino coye baala laoommo. Ikkollana baalunkuri haafaho; diilallo cu'mate gedeeti.
Ecclesiastes1:15 Shokkashshu suwara didandaanno; nookkihu kiiramara didandaanno.
Ecclesiastes1:16 Ani kayinni wodani'yanni, «Kunni albaanni Yerusaalame gashshitinori baalunkunni roore egennaamooti; egennonna hayyo maatiro seekke afoommo» yoommo."
Ecclesiastes1:17 Afanna egenno, gowwimmanna macharaarre maatiro bade afate mixi'roommo. Kunino haafaho; diilallo cu'mate gedeeti."
Ecclesiastes1:18 Hayyo lexxitu deerrinni yaaddo batidhanno. Egenno lexxitu deerrinni qarru bati'ranno.
Ecclesiastes2:1 Ani wodani'yanni, «Hagiirru maatiro afate anenee hagiirsiiseemmo!» yee hedoommo. Ikkollana kunino haafaho."
Ecclesiastes2:2 Osolu gowwimma ikkinota, hagiirruno mullare ikkinota huwatoommo."
Ecclesiastes2:3 Surre'ya amadante heedheennanni umo'ya agattotenni hagiirsiise egenno afi'rate kaoommo. Mannu kalqete aana hee'ranno yanna tenne haranchote giddo woyyanno coye maricho loosa hasiissannosiro afate hasi'roommo.
Ecclesiastes2:4 Qoleno jajjabbare assoommo; minna mi'noommo; woyineno kaasi'roommo.
Ecclesiastes2:5 Caalu haqqe kaasi'roommo. Tenne haqqe giddono addi addi laalo uyitanno haqqe no.
Ecclesiastes2:6 Lophitanno haqqe dubbo asse kaasoommo. Tenne haqqera hayikkinsanni wayi eelanno kofammano umoommo.
Ecclesiastes2:7 Labbaahanna meya faantoota hidhoommo. Mine ilantinori wolootu faantootino nooe. Anera albaanni Yerusaalamete heedhinorinni roore lowo lalo, ge'reewonna me""e ceoommo."
Ecclesiastes2:8 Gashshoommo gobba baalantenni mootimma'ya minira lowo culkanna lowo birra gamba assi're duu'noommo. Guwisannoe labballinna meentino nooe. Hagiirsiisannohu woluno lowo meenti nooe.
Ecclesiastes2:9 Anera albaanni Yerusaalamete heedhinorinni roore lowo geeshsha ayirrado ikkoommo. Egenno'yano ledo'ya keeshshitino.
Ecclesiastes2:10 Ille'ya la'inore baala agure disaoommo; wodani'ya halchinore mittoreno assa diaguroommo. Wodani'ya loosi'ya baalunni hagiidhino. Kunino daafuri'ya waagaati.
Ecclesiastes2:11 Hakkunni gedensaanni, loosoommo loosonna daafuroommo daafuro baala laoommo. Kuni baalunku haafaho; diilallo cu'mate gedeeti. Kalqete aana lexxinanniri mitturino dino."
Ecclesiastes2:12 Mittu moote, albi mootoolla assitinorella assanno. Kunnira egenno, macharaarrenna gowwimma maatiro bade afate hasi'roommo."
Ecclesiastes2:13 «Xawaabbu tunsichunni, egenno gowwimmatenni woyyitannota afoommo."
Ecclesiastes2:14 Egennaammu hadhanni noowa affino; gowwootu kayinni diaffanno» yinanni. Ikkollana lamunku reyitannoreeti.
Ecclesiastes2:15 Ani wodani'yanni, «Gowwaho iillitanno kaayyo anerano iillitannoe; egennaamo ikka'yanni maa lexxoommo?» yee hedoommo. Kunino haafaho."
Ecclesiastes2:16 Kunni ka'a egennaamono gowwano qaagannosihu dihee'ranno; dagganno yannara baalunku hawamanno. Hada egennaamuno gowwu gede reyannoho!
Ecclesiastes2:17 Kalqete aana noori baalu dadillisannoha ikkinohura heeshshonti giwissinoe. Mannu assannori baalu haafaho. Diilallo cu'mate gedeeti.
Ecclesiastes2:18 Jiro'ya baala ane gedensaanni daannohura agure ha'reemmota ikkitino daafira, kalqete aana daafuroommo daafuri haafaho."
Ecclesiastes2:19 Ane darga amadannohu egennaamohorono gowwahoro bande dianfoonni. Ikkollana ani egenno'yanni daafure gamba assoommohura anna ikkanno. Kunino haafaho.
Ecclesiastes2:20 Kunnira heeshsho'ya dirinni daafuroommo daafurira gaabboommo.
Ecclesiastes2:21 Noohe ogimmanni, egennotenninna hayyotenni daafurte loosoottoha mittoreno daafurinokkihura agurte ha'ratto. Kunino haafaho; garano di""ikkino."
Ecclesiastes2:22 Lubbotenni noo geeshsha mannu loosisi daafira yaadanni hee'ra maa kaa'litannosi?
Ecclesiastes2:23 Barra baala loosisi daafira yaadanninna caaccaawanni hee'ranno. Wodanisi hashshano difooliishshi'ranno. Kunino haafaho.
Ecclesiastes2:24 Mannaho daafure loosi'rinohunni hagiidhanni itatenna agate ka'aanni woliri kaa'lannosiri dino. Konne uyinohu nafa Magano ikkinota afoommo.
Ecclesiastes2:25 Maganu yiikkinni itanninna aganni hagiirre afi'rannohu nooni?
Ecclesiastes2:26 Tashshi assannosihura Maganu hayyo, egennonna hagiirre aannosi. Cubbaataamoho kayinni Magano hagiirsiisannohura aanno gede gamba assatenna duunate dilgo calla aannosi. Kunino haafaho; diilallo cu'mate gedeeti."
Ecclesiastes3:1 Kalqete aana ikkannori baalunku yanna afi'rino.
Ecclesiastes3:2 Ilamate yanna no; reyate yanna no. Kaasate yanna no; buqqisate yanna no.
Ecclesiastes3:3 Shaate yanna no; gatisate yanna no. Diigate yanna no; minate yanna no.
Ecclesiastes3:4 Dadillate yanna no; hagiidhate yanna no. Wi'late yanna no; sirbate yanna no.
Ecclesiastes3:5 Kinna billaallisate yanna no; kinna gamba assateno yanna no. Baxillunni hanqafamate yanna no; babbaxxateno yanna no.
Ecclesiastes3:6 Hanse afi'rate yanna no; afi'noonniha hoogateno yanna no. Gamba asse worate yanna no; billaallise hunateno yanna no.
Ecclesiastes3:7 Darate yanna no; gowate yanna no. Sammi yaate yanna no; hasaawate yanna no.
Ecclesiastes3:8 Baxate yanna no; giwate yanna no. Olaho yanna no; keereho yanna no.
Ecclesiastes3:9 Loosi'rannohu daafurisinni maricho lexxanno?
Ecclesiastes3:10 Mannu daafuranno gede Maganu duhisiisinoha loosu duha laoommo.
Ecclesiastes3:11 Maganu wo'mankare yannasinni biifise loosino. Mannu wodanira hegerimmate hedo worino. Ikkollana Maganu kaimunni gawalote geeshsha loosannore afate mannaho egenno diuyino.
Ecclesiastes3:12 Kunnira, mannaho lubbotenni hee're dancha looso loosate ka'aanni hagiirsiisannosiri nookkita afoommo."
Ecclesiastes3:13 Qoleno mannu baalu itanninna aganni daafurisinni hagiidhanno. Tinino Maganuwiinni afi'rino eltooti.
Ecclesiastes3:14 Maganu loosinori baalu hegereha ikkinota afoommo; lendannirinna xeinsanniri dino. Konne assinohuno mannu ayirrisannosi gedeeti.
Ecclesiastes3:15 Xa noohu baalu albanni nooho; ikkara noohuno albanni ikke nooho. Maganu alba loosinonkalla haaro assanno.
Ecclesiastes3:16 Kalqete aana halaalaancho yoo darga cubbu, halaalu darga beebba amadde noota afoommo."
Ecclesiastes3:17 Anino wodani'yanni, «Wo'munkuri baxxannoti yanna noo daafira, Maganu cubbaataamono halaalaanchono yoonniwa abbanno» yee hedoommo."
Ecclesiastes3:18 Qoleno, «Mannu saadate gedeeha ikkinota afanno gede, Maganu fonqolanni noosi» yee hedoommo."
Ecclesiastes3:19 Mannunnitinna saadanniti kaayyonsa mittete; taalote; baalunku reyitannoreeti; baalunkura mittu gari fooli noonsa; mannu saadatenni diwoyyanno; baalunku mullareeti.
Ecclesiastes3:20 Mannuno saadano mittu dargira hadhanno; lamunku bushshunni kalaqantinohura galagalte bushsha higganno.
Ecclesiastes3:21 Mannu lubbo iimira hadhannotanna saadate lubbo qolte baatto e'annota afinohu ayeti?
Ecclesiastes3:22 Mannunniti kaayyosi tenne ikkitinohura, loosisinni hagiidhate gobbaanni woliri noosikkita afoommo. Reyihu gedensaanni ikkannore la""anno gede assannosihu ayeti?"
Ecclesiastes4:1 Xaano kalqete aana assinanni beebba afoommo; gadadantinori sheshifachishannonsaha hoogge wi'litanna laoommo. Roorre baala gadadissannonsarita ikkitinohura kaa'lannonsaha diafidhino.
Ecclesiastes4:2 Anino, «Xa lubbotenni noorinni roore alba reyitinori ba'raadhinoreeti» yoommo."
Ecclesiastes4:3 Wo'munkunni roore kayinni horo ilaminokkihunna kalqete aana assinanni beebba lainokkihu ba'raa'rinoho.
Ecclesiastes4:4 Qoleno mannu halchinore afi'rate daafure loosanno gara baala laoommo; mannu hatto ikkannohu olliichosi hinaasino daafiraati. Kunino haafaho; diilallo cu'mate gedeeti.
Ecclesiastes4:5 Anga xaaxi're ofollannohu cee'maleessu hudetenni reyanno.
Ecclesiastes4:6 Ikkollana, lamente anganni loonsanni haafamantenni wodanu fooliishsho ledo, mitte anganni loonsoonnihu shiimu rooranno. Kunino diilallo cu'mate gedeeti."
Ecclesiastes4:7 Xaano tenne kalqera nooha haafu coye afoommo.
Ecclesiastes4:8 Callisi hee'rannoha mitto mancho afoommo. Ila woy rodoo diafi'rino; loosisi kulle didandiinanniho; noosi jirono illesi la'e diduubbino. «Togo daafureemmohu ayeraati? Umo'ya hagiirruwiinni mayira hooleemmo?» yee diegennino. Kunino haafaho; wottote heeshshooti.
Ecclesiastes4:9 Loosi're dancha guma afi'rate, mitto calla ikkantenni lame ikka woyyitanno."
Ecclesiastes4:10 Mittu uwiro mittu kayisanno. Uweenna kayisannosihu nookkihura aanne'e!
Ecclesiastes4:11 Qiidu yannara lamu mitteenni goxxuro iibbannonsa. Callisi goxannohura hige maminni iibbannosi?
Ecclesiastes4:12 Mittu manchi callichisi dandaannokki dano, lamu ittisa dandiitanno. Sase qiqqishonni gannoonni siiwo rakke dita'anno."
Ecclesiastes4:13 Seejjo adhannokkihunni gowwu geerchu mootenni, busulu buxichu wedellichi woyyanno."
Ecclesiastes4:14 Kuni wedellichi, usurunni tidhaminoha woy gashshootisi giddo buximatenni ilaminoha ikkara dandaanno."
Ecclesiastes4:15 Tenne kalqera hee'ranno manni baalu mootete darga amadanno wedellichi hoode ha'ranna laoommo.
Ecclesiastes4:16 Isi moohe gashshanno manni, kiiro diafi'rinoho. Isi gedensaanni daanno manni kayinni iso dijajanno. Kunino haafaho; diilallo cu'mate gedeeti."
Ecclesiastes5:1 Maganu minira eatto yannara qaafokki agadhi. Macciishshate shiqa gowwootu shiqishshanno kakkalonni roortanno. Insa bushanna dancha badde diegentino.
Ecclesiastes5:2 Coyi'rate muddantooti; Maganoho mitore aate muddante xano xa'nitooti. Maganu gordoho no; ati kayinni baattote aana nootto. Kunnira, batinye coye coyidhooti."
Ecclesiastes5:3 Jawaawurru loosu batinyinni daannonte gede, manchu gowwimma coyisi batinyinni anfanni."
Ecclesiastes5:4 Maganu gowwootunni dihagiidhannona, Maganoho xa'nittoro rakke xanokki wonshi'ri."
Ecclesiastes5:5 Xano wonshattokkiha ikkiro kayinni xa'na hoogittoro woyyate.
Ecclesiastes5:6 Cubbu giddora eessannohena, arrawikki hasi'rire coyi'rara worte agurtooti. Hatto assite ka'e, Maganu Mini soqqamaanchira, «Afummokkinni xa'noommo» yitooti. Maganu arrawikkinni kainohunni loosi'roottore hunara mayira hasi'ratto?"
Ecclesiastes5:7 Haaqeete batinyinna coyi batinyi haafaho. Kunnira Magano ayirrisi.
Ecclesiastes5:8 Mitte gobbara buxane beebba assi'nannanna halaale dawinsanna affe dhaggeeffattooti. Rooreho rooru no; insa wo'munkura aleenni hige laannohu no.
Ecclesiastes5:9 Moote nafa baatto loonse gamba assinoonni jajjinni hee'ranno.
Ecclesiastes5:10 Woxe baxannohura woxu diikkannosi; duroo'mara hasi'rannohu diduuwanno. Kunino haafaho.
Ecclesiastes5:11 Jiro batidhu deerrinni, itannohu bati'ranno; illetenni la""ate ka'aanni, loosi'rinohu maa lexxanno?"
Ecclesiastes5:12 Loosanno manchi kayinni, iti geeshshano itiro, coommino goxicho goxanno; dureessaho kayinni jirosi goxano diuyitannosi."
Ecclesiastes5:13 Kalqete aana mitto dadillisanno coye afoommo. Hakkuno, mannu bushu barrira ikkitannoe yee lowo jiro gamba assi'ranno. Tini jirono hedeweelcho gooffe beettoho sa'ukkinni gattanno."
Ecclesiastes5:14 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Mannu amasi godowi giddonni mullu ilaminonte gede, galagale mullu higanno. Daafurisi giddonni mittoreno anga adhe diha'ranno."
Ecclesiastes5:16 Ilamino garinni mulla anganni galagale ha'rasi dadillissannote. Daafurisi baalu diilallo cu'mate gedeeha ikke gatanno.
Ecclesiastes5:17 Dirosi baala tunsichunni, yaaddotenni, caaccaawatenni, aaramatenninna dhiddotenni gudanno."
Ecclesiastes5:18 Kuneeti ani afoommohu danchunna biifino coyi, mannu Maganu worinosi geeshsha kalqete hee're loosi'rinoha itanninna aganni hagiidhate."
Ecclesiastes5:19 Maganu mannaho jironna qiniite uyisironna, kunninni hagiidhanno gede assisiro, daafurisi gumira galaxxannoha ikka hasiissannosi. Tinino Maganu uyino eltooti."
Ecclesiastes5:20 Maganu wodanaho hagiirre worinosihura, mannu heeshshosi daafira diyaadanno."
Ecclesiastes6:1 Kalqete aana mannaho lowo geeshsha ayirrinoha wole busha coye afoommo.
Ecclesiastes6:2 Maganu mannaho jiro, qiniitenna ayirrinye aanno; hasiisannore mittoreno dixeisanno. Ikkollana jirosinni hagiidhanno gede kaayyo diuyinosi; isi daafurroha wolu itanno. Kunino haafaho; lowo geeshsha dadillisannoho."
Ecclesiastes6:3 Mittu manchi 100 ooso iliro, lowo dirono hee'riro, kayinnilla wodanisi harshammi yaa hoogironna, garunni madaarama hoogiro, isinninni ama godowa kisidhinohu woyyate."
Ecclesiastes6:4 Hakku, ama godowa kisidhinohu, mulla haafa ilame tunsicho ha'ranno; su'misino hawame gatanno."
Ecclesiastes6:5 Arrishsho laa hoogironna, mittoreno afa hoogiro nafa, hakko manchinni roore fooliishsho noosi."
Ecclesiastes6:6 Hakku manchi hagiidhikkinni 2,000 diro hee'riro nafa, lamunku martuwa marte mitto darga hadhanno."
Ecclesiastes6:7 Mannu daafurannohu kokkesiraati. Ikkollana, «Duuwoommo» diyaanno."
Ecclesiastes6:8 Egennaamu gowwa mayinni rooranno? Buxichu hee'nanni gara afasinni maricho lexxanno?
Ecclesiastes6:9 Kunnira, lexxate haafamantenni, noohunni hagiidha woyyate. Kunino haafaho; diilallo cu'mate gedeeti."
Ecclesiastes6:10 Ikkannohu baalu albanni ikkanno yinoonniho; mannu ikkannoti albanni anfoonnite. Ayino jawaantetenni roorannosihu ledo yekkeeramara didandaanno.
Ecclesiastes6:11 Coyi bati'ri deerrinni, gowwimma lexxitanno; kunino mannaho kaa'lannori dino."
Ecclesiastes6:12 Caalu gede ikkite sa'anno yanna tenne haranchotenna, tidhitinokkite giddo mannaho woyyannore afinohu ayeti? Woy kayinni reyihu gedensaanni tenne kalqera ikkannore, mannaho kula dandaannohu ayeti?"
Ecclesiastes7:1 Dancha shittonni danchu su'mi rooranno; ilamate barrinni reyote barri woyyanno.
Ecclesiastes7:2 Lubbotenni noohu duuchunku reyannoha ikkinota qaaganno gede, jilu minira ha'rantenni wi'late minira ha'ra woyyate."
Ecclesiastes7:3 Albu koffi yiiro nafa, wodana xawisanno daafira oso'lantenni dadilla woyyate."
Ecclesiastes7:4 Egennaammu wodani wi'late mine no; gowwootu wodani kayinni jilu mine no.
Ecclesiastes7:5 Gowwootu guwishshinni egennaammu rufa woyyate.
Ecclesiastes7:6 Gowwu osoli giirate giddo xoxanno uti gedeeho; kunino haafaho.
Ecclesiastes7:7 Beebba loosa egennaamo mancho gowwissanno; gubbo ita wodana huntanno.
Ecclesiastes7:8 Baalunkurira hanafontenni gumulo woyyate; boonaleessunkunni cincaaleessu woyyate.
Ecclesiastes7:9 Koma amada gowwimma ikkitino daafira, ati hanqoho muddantooti."
Ecclesiastes7:10 «Xaahunni roore albi diri hiittoo danchaati?» yitooti. Egennaamu togoo coye dicoyi'ranno.
Ecclesiastes7:11 Kalqete aana noo manni baalunku egenno afi'ra hasiissannosi; egenno afi'ra iqqa afi'rate gedeeti.
Ecclesiastes7:12 Egenno woxu gedee caaleeti. Egenno kayinni egennaammu lubbo gargaratenni roortanno.
Ecclesiastes7:13 Hanni Maganu assinore hedi! Isi shokkishinoha ayi suwisanno?
Ecclesiastes7:14 Baalunkuri qinaannohe yannara hagiidhi. Qarru daannohe yannara kayinni, Maganu hagiirreno dadilleno soyannota habbooti. Albillitte ikkannoreno afinohu dino."
Ecclesiastes7:15 Kunni haafu diri'yanni, lowo coye afoommo. Keeraanchu keeraanchimmasinni hee're rahe reyanna, bushu kayinni bunshesinni hee're seeda diro hee'ranna laoommo."
Ecclesiastes7:16 Umokki hu'nattona, lowo geeshsha keeraancho ikkitooti; lowo geeshshano egennaamo ikkitooti."
Ecclesiastes7:17 Yanni-male reyattona, lowo geeshsha busha ikkitooti; gowwano ikkitooti."
Ecclesiastes7:18 Magano waajjannohu wo'mankare qeele saanno daafira, bunshetennino ikko danchummatenni quwa sa'ooti."
Ecclesiastes7:19 Mittu katamira heedhannorinni tonne gashshaasinenni roore, mitto mancho egennosi wolqaataamo assitannosi."
Ecclesiastes7:20 Mitte so'rono assikkinni, wo'manka woyite dancha looso calla loosannohu baattote aana mittuno dino."
Ecclesiastes7:21 Mannu coyi'rannore baala guungeessitooti; wo'manka coye macca worte macciishshattoha ikkiro kayinni, soqqamaanchikki xonannahe macciishshatto."
Ecclesiastes7:22 Atino batinye higge woloota xonoottota wodanikki afino.
Ecclesiastes7:23 Konne baala egenno'yanni fonqole laate wo'naaloommo; lowo geeshsha egennaamo ikkate mixi'roommo. Ikkollana, wolqa'yara aleenni ikkinoe."
Ecclesiastes7:24 Iillate dandiinannikkita lowo geeshsha diime ikkitino daafira, heeshsho maa ikkitinoro buuxe afate ayino didandaanno."
Ecclesiastes7:25 Ani kayinni, egennonna coyi baalu ikkito buuxe afate diinaggaawoommo. Bunshe gowwimma ikkitinotanna gowwimmano macharaarre ikkitinota afate mixi'roommo."
Ecclesiastes7:26 Reyote aleenni qaraarannoha mitto coye afoommo. Kunino, baxillisenni woshshaadde, shibote gede halloho marmarantanno manchooti. Magano waajjannohu isewiinni gatanno; cubbaataamu kayinni amadamanno."
Ecclesiastes7:27 Rosiisaanchu, «Dawaro afi'rate hasi'ranni shiimu shiimunni gumulo iilloommo coyi kuneeti» yaanno."
Ecclesiastes7:28 Xaa geeshsha hase afoommokkiri no. Kumu labballi giddonni mitto afoommo; baalunku meenti giddonni kayinni mitte nafa hoogoommo.
Ecclesiastes7:29 Maganu manna suwise kalaqinota calla afoommo. Mannu kayinni, lowo geeshsha shokkashshoho."
Ecclesiastes8:1 Coye tira dandaannohu hayyichu gedeehu ayi no? Hayyo mannaho alba xawissanno; albu aaninni xirchono hooltanno.
Ecclesiastes8:2 Mootete ammanamatto gede, Maganoho xa'nootto xano wonshi; mooteteno hajajami."
Ecclesiastes8:3 Moote hasi'rire assara dandaanno daafira, albisinni muddante fultooti; albasiinni hawa gede ikkitooti."
Ecclesiastes8:4 Moote hasi'rire assara dandaanno daafira, «Togo mayira assitto?» yaannosihu dino."
Ecclesiastes8:5 Hajajosi wonshinohu digawajjamanno; egennaamu yannanna halaale egennino.
Ecclesiastes8:6 Mannaho qarru bati'risirono, wo'munkurira yannanna dargu noosi."
Ecclesiastes8:7 Albillittete ikkara noore afinohu nookki daafira, togo ikkanno yaa dandaannohu dino."
Ecclesiastes8:8 Lubbosi reyotenni gatisi'raranna reyanno barra soorri'rara dandaannohu dino. Kunni oliwiinni ayino giwe gatara dandaannokkinte gede, bunshe assitannore bunshensa digatissannonsa."
Ecclesiastes8:9 Kalqete aana loonsannire buuxe laoommo; mittu woloota kade gashshanno wolqa afi'ranno.
Ecclesiastes8:10 Cubbaataammu madaarantanna afoommo; madaarshuwiinni higguri kayinni hakko bunshe assitu qachiranni insa guwissino. Kunino haafaho.
Ecclesiastes8:11 Mannu isi, bunshe mayira loosanno? Diwoleteetina, bunshe loossinore ranke qorichisha hoongeennaati."
Ecclesiastes8:12 Cubbaataammu xibbe higge cubbo loossanni seeda diro heedhuro nafa, halaalunni Magano waajjitannorira kayinni woyyannonsata afoommo."
Ecclesiastes8:13 Cubbaataammaho kayinni diseyannonsa. Magano waajjitannokki daafira dirinsa caalu gede ikke mulenni saanno.
Ecclesiastes8:14 Kalqete aana nooha woleno haafu coye afoommo. Cubbaataammu keeraanote iillannoha, keeraanono cubbaataammaho iillannoha adhitanno. Kunino haafaho."
Ecclesiastes8:15 Kunnira, mannaho tenne kalqe aana noo geeshsha uyinoonnisi kaayyo itanninna aganni umosi hagiirsiisate ka'aanni, woyyanno coyi nookkita afoommo. Maganu uyinosi yanna geeshsha mannu loosisinni hagiidhanni hee'ra hasiissannosi."
Ecclesiastes8:16 Egenno afi'ratenna kalqete aana noo coye buuxate, hashshanna barra goxummokkinni gale hosoommo."
Ecclesiastes8:17 Mannu aye geeshshano daafure Maganu loosanno looso afara dandaannokkita buuxoommo. Egennaammu, «Ninke anfoommo» yitanno. Kayinnilla affara didandiitanno."
Ecclesiastes9:1 Konne baala laummohu gedensaanni, keeraanotenna egennaammu loosi, wole agurranna baxxannohunna gibbanno coyi baalu Maganu anga noo gede afoommo. Ikkollana, albillittete ikkara noore afinohu dino."
Ecclesiastes9:2 Keeraanchunna cubbaataamu, danchunna bushu, fayyaaleessunna lagaawinohu, kakkalannohunna kakkalannokkihu kaayyo mittete; keeraanchunna cubbaataamu, xaarannohunna xaaro waajjannohu mittoho."
Ecclesiastes9:3 Kalqete aana baalunkurinni roore bushu coyi no. Hakkuno baalunku gawalo mitte ikkaseeti. Mannu wodanira bunshe wo'mitino. Wodanisira bunshenna macharaarre wo'mitino gedeenni hee'ranno. Hakkunni gedensaanni reyanno.
Ecclesiastes9:4 Lubbotenni noohura hexxo noosi. Kunnira, reyino doobbiichinni lubbotenni noo woshichi woyyate."
Ecclesiastes9:5 Lubbotenni noori reyitannota affino; reyitinori kayinni, mittoreno diaffanno. Afidhannorino dino; horonta hamboonnireeti."
Ecclesiastes9:6 Baxillinsa, gibbonsanna hinaasinsa insa ledo mitteenni reyino; tenne kalqe aanaanni ikkanno coyi baalaho horonta beeqqaano di""ikkitanno."
Ecclesiastes9:7 Maganu loosokki baxinohena hadhe, yaadittokkinni sagalekki ittanninna woyinekki agganni hagiidhi."
Ecclesiastes9:8 Wo'manka woyite waajjo uddano uddi'ri; umikkino bulloonke.
Ecclesiastes9:9 Daafurikkira aamaminohehu woyyanno coyi konneetina, Maganu kalqete aana uyinohehu kunni tidhinokki dirikkinni, ayiddaamakki baxi; ledose hagiidhi."
Ecclesiastes9:10 Reyittohu gedensaanni marattowa loosu, hedo, egennonna hayyo dinona, nootto geeshsha noohe wolqa baalantenni loosi."
Ecclesiastes9:11 Tenne kalqe aana laoommohu wolu coyino no. Rakke doddannori wo'ma woyite diqolchitanno; bareedda wo'ma woyite diqeeltanno; egennaammu wo'ma woyite diduubbanno; busullaaddu wo'ma woyite diduroo'mitanno; egennaammu wo'ma woyite diayirritanno. Ikkollana, wo'munkura yannanna kaayyo xaaddannonsa."
Ecclesiastes9:12 Ikkollana, busha yanna mamoote xaaddannosiro afinohu dino. Duubbe marte woshshaadote e'anno cea gedenna hedeweelcho meemmote giddora eanno qulxu'mi gede, mannuno hedeweelcho busha yannanni xaadanno."
Ecclesiastes9:13 Kalqete aana, anera roore ikkinoha egennote lawishsha afoommo."
Ecclesiastes9:14 Shiimu manni hee'rannohu shiimu katami no. Mittu jawu moote gawajjansara daye doyisse amadinsa; gidde eanno bushshano tuuli.
Ecclesiastes9:15 Hakko katamira mittu egennaamu buxichi no; egennosinnino katama gatisi. Ikkollana konne buxicho qaaginosihu dino.
Ecclesiastes9:16 Kunnira, «Egenno wolqatenni roortanno; buxichu egenno kayinni dinaandanni; coyi'rannoreno ale kayisannohu dino» yoommo."
Ecclesiastes9:17 Gowwoota gashshanni raaranno gashshaanchi cancinni, suutunni coyi'rannohunnihu, egennaamu qaali rooranno."
Ecclesiastes9:18 Olu bagadinni egenno woyyate. Mittu cubbaataami kayinni, lowoha dancha coye hunanno."
Ecclesiastes10:1 Reyino teenni su'naru buuro boshshanno. Hattonni shiima gowwimma lowo egennonna ayirrinye huntanno.
Ecclesiastes10:2 Egennaamu wodani qiniitira hedanno; gowwu wodani kayinni gurara hedanno.
Ecclesiastes10:3 Gowwu ha'ranno doogga baala xeate; gowwimmasino mannaho leellishi'ranno.
Ecclesiastes10:4 Cinca lowo hanqo gabbi assitannona, roorrichikki hanqannohe yannara dargakki agurtooti."
Ecclesiastes10:5 Kalqete aana laoommoti mitte busha no. Tinino gashshaanchuwiinni fultanno so'rooti.
Ecclesiastes10:6 Gowwootu ayirrado darga amaddeenna, dureeyye kayinni shota darga ofoltino."
Ecclesiastes10:7 Faantootu farado guluffeenna, ayirraddu kayinni, lekkatenni hadhanna afoommo."
Ecclesiastes10:8 Bale umannohu balete uwara dandaanno; huxxa diigannohano hamashshu qasannosiha ikkanno.
Ecclesiastes10:9 Kinna galchannohu raanti'rara dandaanno; haqqe bocannohu madi'rannoha ikkanno.
Ecclesiastes10:10 Badino siwiila gamaxi'rannokkihu, wolqasi beebba guxxanno; egenno kayinni danchu gumira iillishshanno."
Ecclesiastes10:11 Hamashshu qasihu gedensaanni, jalli assa kaa'litannori dino."
Ecclesiastes10:12 Egennaamu manchi afiisinni fulanno coyinni, ayirrinye afi'ranno. Gowwa kayinni, afiisinni fulanno coyi hunannosi."
Ecclesiastes10:13 Gowwu coyi gowwimmatenni hanafame, busha makkallenni goofanno."
Ecclesiastes10:14 Gowwu manchi coye batisanno; albillittete ikkara noore kayinni, afinohu dino. Reyihu gedensaanni ikkannoreno kulannosihu dino."
Ecclesiastes10:15 Katama fule egenninokki daafira, gowwa daafuru shaannosi."
Ecclesiastes10:16 Aju moote nooseteranna, gutte agge dimbitanno gashshaano noose gobbara aanne'e!"
Ecclesiastes10:17 Ayirradu sirchinni ilamino mootenna, dimbate ikkikkinni jawaante afi'rate yite hasiisanno yannara ittannonna agganno gashshaano noose gobba, lowo geeshsha ba'raadhinote."
Ecclesiastes10:18 Minu tuuqa hoongiro ga'ranno; cee'maleessu manchi mini xissanno.
Ecclesiastes10:19 Ita hisanyoote, aga hagiirre uyitanno; wo'manka kayinni woxunni hidhinanni."
Ecclesiastes10:20 Coyekki massite kultanno cea heedhanno daafira, wodanikkinni nafa moote bushiishshooti; ma'nakkira heedhe nafa dureessa runtooti."
Ecclesiastes11:1 Sagalekki wayi aana tugi; lowo barri gedensaanni, galagalchite afi'rattona."
Ecclesiastes11:2 Baattote aana bushu coyi mayi daannoro diafoottona, Jirokki 7 woy 8 darga beekke wodhi."
Ecclesiastes11:3 Wayi gomichu giddo wo'mihu gedensaanni xeena ikke dirranno; haqqu wodiidira woy aliyyera hige uwiro, hakko uwinowalla hee'ranno."
Ecclesiastes11:4 Bubbete raga galaalchannohu diwixi'ranno; gomicho laannohu dimixxanno.
Ecclesiastes11:5 Bubbete gara afoottokkinte gede, lubbo woy foolu amate godowi giddora hiitto ikke eannoro diegennootto. Hattonni, wo'manka kalaqino Magani loosanno gara afa didandaatto."
Ecclesiastes11:6 Kuni woy ku'u woyyannoro, woy wo'munku seyannoro afoottokki daafira, soodono wixi; hashsha geeshshano wixa agurtooti."
Ecclesiastes11:7 Xawaabbu danchaho; arrishsho afa illete hagiirsiissanno.
Ecclesiastes11:8 Mannu lowo diro hee'rirono, hee'rino diri baalunkunni hagiidho. Kayinnilla, tunsichu diri roore ikkannota qaagona. Daannori baalu haafaho."
Ecclesiastes11:9 Ati wedellichu, wedellichimmakkinni tashshi yoohe; wedellichimmakki yannara wodanikki hagiidho; wodanikki hedinoha, illekki la'inoha assi. Ikkollana kunni baalunku coyira Maganu yoote shiqishannohetano habbooti."
Ecclesiastes11:10 Anjenna wedellichimma mulenni sa'annotena, yaaddo wodanikkinni, qarra abbannore manninatikki aaninni hoo'li."
Ecclesiastes12:1 Bushu barri dayikkinni, «Tashshi diyiinoe» yaatto diri iillikkinni anjekki yannanni Kalaqaanchokki qaagi."
Ecclesiastes12:2 Hatte yannara arrishsho, aganunna beeddahe tunsitanno; gomichuno xeenu gedensaanni galagale higanno."
Ecclesiastes12:3 Hexxinanni cigile qece yitanno; jawaata lekka daafurtanno; hinko kiiro xe'e sagale corqa hoogganno; ille jaaroorte laa gibbanno.
Ecclesiastes12:4 Macca doogonniha, daammunnihanna muuziiqu luulo macciishsha gibbanno. Kayinnilla, ceate qaale macciishshine baqqi yinanni."
Ecclesiastes12:5 Gooddo fula waajjishshanno; lekkatenni ha'ra qarra ikkitanno. Umu awuuwanno; meessi wolqanni qaafa didandiinanni; halcho baala ba'anno. Hatte yannara mannu hegere minisira ha'ranno; wi'laanu doogote wi'lishshanno.
Ecclesiastes12:6 Birru cagaage ta'eenna, culkunni seekkinoonnihu caabbicho worranni uduunnichi hiiqqamikkinni Magano qaagi; waa goshoonshanni siiwo giddo ta'anno; wayi gambayichino gamaho hiiqqamanno."
Ecclesiastes12:7 Maalu bushsha ikkinohura, galagale bushsha higanno; lubbo kalaqinose Maganiwa hadhanno."
Ecclesiastes12:8 Rosiisaanchu, «Haafaho! Haafaho! Baalunkuri haafaho!» yii."
Ecclesiastes12:9 Hayyichu rosiisaanchi egennaamo ikkinohura mannaho egenno rosiisino. Isino maammaashsha xiinxallihu gedensaanni, aante aantetenni qixxeesse worino."
Ecclesiastes12:10 Seyino coye afi'rate xiinxallino. Halaalaancho yoo ammanamatenni borreessino.
Ecclesiastes12:11 Egennaammu qaali, saada allaallanni siqqo qaraamete gedeeho; xaadinsoonni maammaashshi gobbe amaddanno misimaarra gedeeho. Kuri aamaminohuno, mittu allaalaasinchi Maganuwiinniiti."
Ecclesiastes12:12 Beetto'ya, quwa sa""attokki gede qorophi; maxaaffa borreessine digundanni; xiinxallate batinyi daafursanno."
Ecclesiastes12:13 Coyi baalunku gumulo kuneetina, macciishshino. Kuni mannu wo'munkura hasiisinohona, Magano ayirrisi; hajajosino agadhi."
Ecclesiastes12:14 Maganu baalanka coye, maaxaminohano ikkiro mannu looso baala, danchano bushano yoote shiqishanno."
SongOfSongs1:1 Faarso wo'manta roortannoti Selemooni faarso tenneeti.
SongOfSongs1:2 Baxillikki woyinete xajjenni roore coommannoha ikkino daafira, suumekkinni sunqie."
SongOfSongs1:3 Buudhatto shitto tanni yite su'niitanno; su'mikkino shitto baalantenni roore su'naannoho. Seennu baxannohehuno kunniraati.
SongOfSongs1:4 Anga'ya amadde goshooshie; mitteenni dondo! Moote'ya holgikkira eessie; hakko mitteenni hagiidhineemmo. Baxillekki woyinete xajjenni roore naandeemmo; kunnira, seennu baalu lowo geeshsha baxannohe."
SongOfSongs1:5 Ki'ne Yerusaalamete seenni macciishshe! Ani kolishshote; ikkollana kayinni xumate. Ane kolishshimma Qeedaari dukkana labbanno; xumme'ya Selemooni gashshooti mini dukko gedeete.
SongOfSongs1:6 Dana'ya kolishshiishshinoti arrishshotena, kolishshimma'ya daafira arrassitinoonte""e. Ama'ya ooso roduuwi'ya, ane ledo giwantino daafira, woyinete kaashshi agaraancho assitinoe; kunnira umo'ya agadhate yanna diafi'roomma."
SongOfSongs1:7 Baxillaancho'ya, hanni ge'reewokki hosiisi'rattohu mamaatiro kulie! Barru taalootira caa'lanno gede assattohu hiikkooti? Ate hasi'ranni, alba diphitino mancho gede ikke mayira raataaweemma?"
SongOfSongs1:8 Ati seennu baalunkunni roore xuma, darga afoottakkiha ikkiro, ge'reewu ha'ruma la'anni ha'ri. Meu wilii'lekki, allaalaasinete dukkanna mule allaa'li."
SongOfSongs1:9 Baxillaancho'ya, Feriooni faradi gaare giddo noota, xuma ganya lawatta."
SongOfSongs1:10 Kiccakki maccate butichinni biiffinote; goowikkino irrunni gaamaarinoho.
SongOfSongs1:11 Ninke lende birru shura afi'rinoha, culku irra seekkisiinseemmohe."
SongOfSongs1:12 Moote haranchu daallasi aana gaffi asse hee'reenna, shitto'ya su'niilli mine wo'mi."
SongOfSongs1:13 Baxillaanchi'ya, guntuti'ya qarrira noohu, gujuujjete su'nari gedeeho."
SongOfSongs1:14 Baxillaanchi'ya, Ayini-Gaadi woyinete kaashshi darga, fulino arfaasi gedeeho."
SongOfSongs1:15 Baxillaancho'ya, ati xumate! Hiitto biifoottate! Illekki luulakkote."
SongOfSongs1:16 Baxillaancho'ya ati xumaho. Addintanni banxanniho; daallasinke shaqqado hayissooti.
SongOfSongs1:17 Mininke tuuqqa daguwunnite; qalchuno hoommetenni gannoonniho.
SongOfSongs2:1 Ani Saarooni adalchinna, lagichaho fulanno daraarchi gedeetella."
SongOfSongs2:2 Baxillaancho'ya meentu giddo, utu mereero fulino arfaasi gedeete."
SongOfSongs2:3 Baxillaanchi'ya wolu wedelli ledo taashshiniro, dubbu giddo laalanno haqqichi gedeeho; anino hagiidhanni caalisi hunda fooliishshi'roomma; laalosino coommitannote."
SongOfSongs2:4 Jilu minira haa're massie; baxillisi anera baandira ikkie.
SongOfSongs2:5 Baxillu amadeenna xiwamoommana, woyinete leo itissine jawaachishshe""e; laalo uyitine hagiirsiisse""e."
SongOfSongs2:6 Guracho angasi barkisannoe; qiniitichotenni hanqafannoe.
SongOfSongs2:7 Ki'ne Yerusaalamete seenne! baxillu umisi hasi'ra geeshsha, kayissinannikki gedenna baqqi assitinannikki gede, gaarraanchunna bulaate su'minni eegameemma'ne."
SongOfSongs2:8 Kuneeti baxillaanchi'ya huuro, ilaallate aana kubbitanni daggu; isino gaarrate aana dodanni dayi."
SongOfSongs2:9 Baxillaanchi'ya geedimo, woy aja gaarraancho lawanno. Kuneeti mininke gaatara uurranno; masikootete widoonni qole la""anno; dukkote widoonni qole illaallisanno."
SongOfSongs2:10 Baxillaanch'ya, «Baxillaaancho'ya kai! Xuma'ya ballo amo mitteenni ha'nona!"
SongOfSongs2:11 Kune xeenu birrino; hawaduno saino.
SongOfSongs2:12 Baattote aana daraaro leeltino; faarsote yanna iillitino; gobbankera lembooli huuro leeltanni no.
SongOfSongs2:13 Balase laala hanaffino; woyinete daraaro su'niilli baatto wo'mino; kunnira baxillaancho'ya kai; ane xuma, mitteenni ha'nona amo!"
SongOfSongs2:14 Ati boonu qarra maaxantino lemboolcho gedeeti; albikki xumahona, mitte hige laoyya! Huurokki baxissannotena, mitte hige macciishshoyya!» yaannoe."
SongOfSongs2:15 Woyinenke daraartinona, woyinenke huntannokki gede, yeedaala, shiimmaadda yeedaala amaddenke."
SongOfSongs2:16 Baxillaanchi'ya aneho; anino isite; daraarote mereero hoshshasi allaa'lanno.
SongOfSongs2:17 Hashshi tunsichi ho'la geeshsha, soodo bubbe bubbissa geeshsha, baxillaancho'ya ballo, geedimu woy aju gaarraanchi gede, boonnaame ilaalla aanaanni doddanni higi."
SongOfSongs3:1 Hashsha wo'ma daallasi'ya aana hee're, lubbo'ya baxxannoha afi'rate hasi'roomma; diinaggaawe hasi'roomma; afi'ra kayinni didandoomma."
SongOfSongs3:2 Katamu giddo noota, ruukkadonna hala'lado doogga baala ha'ramoomma; lubbo'ya baxxannoha afi'rate hasi'roomma; afi'ra kayinni didandoomma."
SongOfSongs3:3 Ha'rantanni katama agartannori affinoe; anino, «Lubbo'ya baxxannoha affinini?» yee xa'moomma."
SongOfSongs3:4 Insawiinni shiima geeshsha saanni hee'renni, lubbo'ya baxxannoha afi'roomma. Fulannokki gede seekke cu'mi'roomma; ama'ya minira adhe ha're, ani ilamoomma holgira eessi'roomma."
SongOfSongs3:5 Ki'ne Yerusaalamete seenne! Baxillu umisi hasi'ra geeshsha, kayissinannikki gedenna baqqi assitinannikki gede, gaarraanchunna bulaate su'minni eegameemma'ne."
SongOfSongs3:6 Wiliilete gede hossi yiinohu, su'narunna kaarbete foole afi'rinohu, kuni halallinni daannohu maati?"
SongOfSongs3:7 Kuneeti Selemoonihu ayirradu barcimi daanni no; Israeelete wolqaataammi giddonni doorroonniri, 60 ayirradda agaraasine dukkisse no."
SongOfSongs3:8 Baalunku bagado amandanni gara egentinoreetinna, olunni fullakkinoreeti. Hashsha dagganno dano gargarate, mittu mittunku bagado qodhitino gedeenni galtanno."
SongOfSongs3:9 Moote Selemooni ofollannohu, ayirradu barcimisi, Libaanoosi daguwinni seekkinoonniho."
SongOfSongs3:10 Ayirrado barcimasi dukkino tuuqqa, aanaho birra xallinoonnireeti. Irki'rannorichi culkunni seesiinsoonniho; ofollannowa xiillicha hocco aanaho dimboonni; giddoyidosi Yerusaalamete seenni baxillinsanni goode seesiisino."
SongOfSongs3:11 Ki'ne Tsiyooni seenne, moote Selemooni la""ate amme! Isi, amasi wortinosita ayirrinyu ba'latto umoho wodhe no; tenne ba'latto, hagiirrunnihu adhamasi jili barra wodhanno."
SongOfSongs4:1 Baxillaancho'ya, ati hiittoo xumaati! Hiitto biifootta! Guggu'laanchikki giddoonni la'niro, illekki luulakkote. Umikki dananchi, Geleaadi Ilaalinni dirrannoha, koliddaanna me""e lawanno."
SongOfSongs4:2 Hinkokki giddonsa mitte maseena heedhukkinni, lakkuwa qalannohu, ordansa hanxe hayishshinoonnihu, waajjuullu ge'reewi gede baxissannote."
SongOfSongs4:3 Suummakki gujuujjete gede biiffinote; hasaawatta woyiteno lowo geeshsha baxissanno; lamenti kiccakki guggu'laanchikki giddoonni la'niro, lamewa balka yitinota roomaanete laalo labbanno."
SongOfSongs4:4 Goowikki, Daawiti shae gedee seedaati; goowikki irrino, Daawiti shae aana suntoonnita kume wonquwanna, olu bagado lawanno."
SongOfSongs4:5 Lamunku guntutikki, lakko qalame, dubbu daraaro giddo hosannoha bulaate wilii'le lawanno."
SongOfSongs4:6 Hashshinohu sooda geeshsha, tunsichuno sa""a geeshsha, kaarbete ilaaliwa, hixaanu gaariwa mare fooliishshi'reemmo."
SongOfSongs4:7 Baxillaancho'ya, manninatikki xumaho; kullannireno diafi'rootta."
SongOfSongs4:8 Idayicho'ya, amo ane ledo Libaanoosi Ilaalinni dirri; Libaanoosi Ilaalinni amo; Amaana Ilaali guunxonni dirri; doobbichunna dagunchu hee'rannowiinni, Seniirinna Hermooni ilaallanni dirrite amo."
SongOfSongs4:9 Ayirrado rodoo'ya, idayicho'ya, la""atta garinna goowikki irri wodana'ya moorino."
SongOfSongs4:10 Ayirrado rodoo'ya, idayicho'ya, baxillikki hiitto hagiirsiisannoho! Baxillikki woyinete xajjenni roore tashshi assanno; su'niillikkino shitto baalanta rooranno."
SongOfSongs4:11 Baxillaancho'ya, suummakkinni malawu leo lolakkanno; arrawikkinnino malawunna ado burqitanno; uddanokki foolino, Libaanoosi dubbi fooli gedeeho."
SongOfSongs4:12 Ayirrado rodoo'ya, idayicho'ya, ati, kinchu huxxinni qoqqomboonni gati gedeete; wolu eannokki gede cunfe agurroonni buicho lawatta."
SongOfSongs4:13 Ati, doorroonniti roomaanete laalo, ha'nashshunna naardoosi shitto noo gate lawatta."
SongOfSongs4:14 Naardoosi, su'niitanno irde hixichi, duuwanchu, hixaanu gede su'naannohu addi addi haqqi noose. Qolteno giddose kaarbe, daraaranno argiisinna, su'niitannoti addi addi haqqe fultanno."
SongOfSongs4:15 Ati gate lolakkanno buichootinna, xoannokki waati; Libaanoosi ilaalla hundinni, burqanno xashshi gedeete."
SongOfSongs4:16 Ati aliyye bubbe kai! Ati wodiidi bubbeno kawa amo. Dagge haqqe'ya giddo bubbisi; diilallono, danchu fooli giddo wo'minota ikkito. Baxillaachi'ya haqqe giddora dayona; doorroonni laalono itona."
SongOfSongs5:1 Ayirrado rodoo'ya, idayicho'ya, kuneeti kaashshi'ya dargira eoommo; kaarbe'yanna shitto'ya daraaro xinqi'roommo; malawi'ya leo qasonte ledo itoommo; woyinete xajje'yanna ado'ya agoommo. Ki'ne baxillaasine, baxillunni kassi yitina geeshsha itte, agge."
SongOfSongs5:2 Ani goxoomma; wodani'ya kayinni baqqi yee no. Baxillaanchi'ya haaqeete, «Ayirrado rodoo'ya, idayicho'ya, kullannire afi'roottakkiti lemboolcho'ya, eeggatena waalcho fanie. Umi'yara loju eelino; danancho'ya hashshi kifiifo shanshitino» yee, waalcho gangananna macciishshoomma."
SongOfSongs5:3 Uddano'ya fushshiroomma; galagale hiitto uddi'reemma? Lekka'yano hayishshi'roomma; galagale hiitto xursiisi'reemma?
SongOfSongs5:4 Baxillaanchi'ya cufanu xullo widoonni qole angasi diriirsi; isi daafira giddo hellee'ya shafantu.
SongOfSongs5:5 Kunnira, baxillaanchi'yara cufana fanammara kaoomma; cufanu waawancho amadummata, anga'yanni kaarbe lolakku; qubbe'yanni kaarbe cocco'u."
SongOfSongs5:6 Baxillaanchi'yara cufana fanoommasi; isi kayinni ha're kaino. Huurosi macciishshate lowo geeshsha quqquxamoomma; diinaggaawe hasi'roommasi; afi'rammasira kayinni didandoomma. Woshshi'roommasi; isi kayinni yee diyiinoe.
SongOfSongs5:7 Ha'rantanni katama agartannori affinoe; ganteno madiissitinoe; hakkuri katama agartannori, uddano'ya mulqite adhitino."
SongOfSongs5:8 Ki'ne Yerusaalamete seenni, baxillaancho'ya affinoonniha ikkiro, ani baxillisinni kainohunni xiwamoommata, kultinannisi gede, eegameemma'ne."
SongOfSongs5:9 Ati meentu baalunku mereero biifoottati, halaalinta baxillaanchikki wolootuwiinni baxxinohoni? Kageeshshi geeshsha eegamattankehu, isi wolootuwiinni mayinni baxxeennaati?"
SongOfSongs5:10 Baxillaanchi'ya addinta xumahonna jawaataho; tonnu kumi labballi giddo iso lawannohu dino.
SongOfSongs5:11 Albisi filu culki gede xawanno; dananchisino shaqalahonna kolishsho kuulaati.
SongOfSongs5:12 Illuwasi xashshu mule anfannihunna, adotenni hayishshinoonni lembooli gede biiffanote."
SongOfSongs5:13 Kiccasi su'naanno haqqi fulanno darga labbanno; suummasi tanni yee su'naannoha, kaarbete foole coccoanno daraarchi gedeete."
SongOfSongs5:14 Anguwasi dilqu migira afi'rinoha culku daabba labbanno; manninatisi bulu dilqinni seesiinsoonni ilki gedeeho.
SongOfSongs5:15 Lekkuwasi culku aana kaasantinota, cala yaanno kinchi tuuqqa labbanno. Danisi daguwunni biifinoha, Libaanoosi Ilaala lawanno."
SongOfSongs5:16 Afiisi malawimma coommanno; suudisi baalu baxisannoho. Yerusaalamete seenne, baxillaanchi'yanna jaali'ya togooho!"
SongOfSongs6:1 Ati meyata baala roorootta xuma, baxillaanchikki hiikka ha'rino? Ninke ate ledo hanseemmona, hiikka ha'rinoro kulinke."
SongOfSongs6:2 Baxillaanchi'ya, itaranna daraaro gamba assi'rara, su'niitanno haqqe fultannowa gatisira ha'rino."
SongOfSongs6:3 Baxillaanchi'ya aneho; anino isite; isino daraarote giddo itanni no.
SongOfSongs6:4 Baxillaancho'ya, ati Tiritsa katami gedee xumaati; Yerusaalamete gede biifoottate. Baandira amadde hadhanno olanto gede, waajjishanno xirchi noohe."
SongOfSongs6:5 Ane qafadde usuranya assitannoena, eeggatena illekki ane aaninni hooli. Dananchikki Geleaadinni dirrannoha, koliddaanna me""e lawanno."
SongOfSongs6:6 Hinkokki giddonsa maseena heedhukkinni, lakkuwa qalannohunna, hayishshinoonnihu waajjuullu ge'reewi gede baxissannote."
SongOfSongs6:7 Kiccakki guggu'laanchikki giddoonni la'niro, lamewa balka yitinota roomaanete laalo labbanno."
SongOfSongs6:8 Leyawu mootete meenti, settawu irkote meentinna, kiiro anfoonnikkihu aju seenni no."
SongOfSongs6:9 Ani baxeemmoti kayinni mitte callate; iseno kullannire afidhinokki lemboolcho gedee xumaati; ise amasera mittete; iltinose amano wo'munkunni roorsite baxxannose. Seennuno ise laanni guwisannose; mootete meentinna irkonnihu naadannose.
SongOfSongs6:10 Tini soodimari xawaabbi gedeeti, aganu gede biiffinoti; arrishshote gede xabbannoti, baandira amadde hadhanno olanto gede, waajjishanno xirchiti tini ayeti?"
SongOfSongs6:11 Lagaho kaasantino haqqe lattino gara laate, woyine ciirtinotanna roomaane daraartinota la""ate, kooke loonsanniwa dirroommo."
SongOfSongs6:12 Tenne giddo, mootete faradi gaare gulufe noommoha lawinoe."
SongOfSongs6:13 Ati Shulaamitte, amo higi; seekkine la'neemmohe gede amo. Lame gaamo mereero sirbanna, la'inaera mayira hasidhini?"
SongOfSongs7:1 Mootete ila lawattati, lekkakki fano koatte giddoonni la'niro, hiitto biiffinote! Giwoodikki qaru ogeessi seekkinoha, dilqu irra lawanno."
SongOfSongs7:2 Mudukkikki qadhitinota woyinete xajje wonshinoonni birille lawanno; hallikki, daraaro gaangeessine usurroonnita, qamadete nadala lawanno."
SongOfSongs7:3 Lamunku guntutikki, lakko qalaminore bulaate wilii'le lawanno."
SongOfSongs7:4 Goowikki, ilkunni seesiinsoonni shae lawanno; illuwakki, lowiidihu Hasebooni Katami, huxxi waalchi mule noo kofamma labbanno. Sanokki, alba Demaasiqo widira higginota, Libaanoosi shae labbanno."
SongOfSongs7:5 Umikki qoonchi Qermeloosi Ilaali gedeeho; dananchikki shuri mootete haarre lawanno; shurikki xumme mootete wodana moortanno.
SongOfSongs7:6 Baxillaancho'ya, ati hiitto biifootta! Hiitto xu'mootta! Baxillikki hiitto tashshi assanno!"
SongOfSongs7:7 Uurrinshakki, saattichu haqqa labbanno; guntutikkino saattichu hunduruurro lawanno."
SongOfSongs7:8 Saattichu haqqicho gidde, laalose hanqifi'ra baxeemmo. Guntutikki woyinete hunduruurro gegeeho; foolikki su'niitanno haqqicho gedeeho."
SongOfSongs7:9 Afiikki su'niilli, fila woyinete xajje gedeeho. Hatto ikkiro, woyinete xajje, baxillaanchi'ya suumenna, hinko mereero daaddanni dirrito."
SongOfSongs7:10 Ani baxillaanchi'yate; isino ane halchanno.
SongOfSongs7:11 Baxillaancho'ya, amo fulle xawo ha'nona; qacha e'ne hakko gallona."
SongOfSongs7:12 Gunteno woyinete kaashshi giddora ha'no; woyine daraartino gedeenninna, roomaaneno dartino gedeenni la'no. Hakkiicho baxille'ya leellisheemmahe."
SongOfSongs7:13 Inkoyete laalo su'niillinna, baxissannoti addi addi laalo qaenkera wo'mite no. Baxillaancho'ya, hatte laalo giddonni, le'inotanna mule xinqinoonnita atera wodhoommahe."
SongOfSongs8:1 Ati, ama'ya unuuna qane lophinohu, rodii'ya gedeeha ikkattoehu baino! Hatto ikkoommero, doogote afi're sunqeennahe, ayino dimishannoe."
SongOfSongs8:2 Ama'ya minira massi'reennahe, baxillu gara rosiisattoehu baino. Roomaanete laalonni coomminshoonnita, fila woyinete xajje hayikkisi'reemmahehu gatino."
SongOfSongs8:3 Guracho angasi barkisannoe; qiniitichotenni hanqafannoe.
SongOfSongs8:4 Ki'ne Yerusaalamete seenne! Baxillu umisi hasi'ra geeshsha, kayissinannikki gedenna, baqqi assitinannikki gede eegameemma'ne."
SongOfSongs8:5 Baxillaanchose irkidhe, halallinni daggannoti tini ayeti? Bi're amakki gamaa'mite iltuhewa, laalanno haqqichi hunda goxxe noottoha, baqqi asse kayisoommahe."
SongOfSongs8:6 Hegere baxillinni wodanikki giddo qa'misie; angakkira maatamu gede ane calla amadie. Baxillu reyote gedee jawaataati; hinaasuno waammate gedee kaajjadooti; baxillu giirate gede buwanno; baxillu Kaaliiqi buwanooti.
SongOfSongs8:7 Wayi batinyi baxillu giira xoyissa didandaanno; lolahuno fee haa're ha'ra didandaanno. Noosi jiro baalantenni baxille hidhara hasi'rannohu hee'riro, baxille woxunni anfannikki daafira, hakkonne mancho mannu arrassannosi."
SongOfSongs8:8 Unuunu leellinokkiti shiima rodoo noonke; adhannohu xa'mi'riro, rodoonke hiissineemmo?"
SongOfSongs8:9 Ise huxxa ikkitoommero, birru shae seekkineemmosehu baino. Huxxu waalcho ikkitoommero, Libaanoosi haqqenni cufana seekkineemmosehu baino."
SongOfSongs8:10 Kuneeti ani huxxaho; guntuti'yano huxxu shae gedeeho. Baxillaanchi'ya ledo hee'rummaro, hagiirrenna keere afi'reemma."
SongOfSongs8:11 Selemoonira Baaali-Hamooni yinanniwa, woyinete dargi noosi; woyinete dargano loossannorira kiraho uyino; mittu mittunku 1,000 kinchu birra abbitannosi."
SongOfSongs8:12 Woyinete dargi ane umi'yaho; Selemooni'ya, ati 1,000 kinchu birra gatisidhe, loosaasinete 200 kinchu birra uyi."
SongOfSongs8:13 Baxillaancho'ya, kaashshu giddo heedheenna, jaalla'ya huurokki macciishsha hasidhinona, hanni anerano huurokki leellishie."
SongOfSongs8:14 Baxillaancho'ya, rakke anewa amo; su'niitanno haqqe fultanno ilaalla aana, kukkubbanno geedimo woy aja gaarraancho lawi."
Isaiah1:1 Ani Isayaasi Amootsi beettooti. Tini sokka Ooziya, Iyoaataami, Akaazinna Hiziqiyaasi Yihudaho mookku waro, Yihudunna Yerusaalamete daafira kulloonniete."
Isaiah1:2 Kaaliiqi, «Gordonna baatto, macciishshe! Seekke lossi'roommoti ooso'ya anera gara gibbinoe."
Isaiah1:3 Handu nafa ceinoha annasi afino; harrichuno maddarannosiha egennino. Israeelete kayinni hattenne diegennino; manni'ya wodancha diafi'rino» yii.
Isaiah1:4 Ki'ne cubbaataame gosara, sao batidhino'ne dagara, bunshe loossinanni ilamara, ragimale heeshsho heedhinannirira aanne'e! Ki'ne ane Kaaliiqa Israeelete Qullaawa gibbine, badhe wodhitinoonnie."
Isaiah1:5 Bunshete aana bunshe leddinanni lende qorichinshanni'ne gede mayira ikkitinanni? Manninati'ne baalu dhiwamaancho ikkino; wodani'neno daaqino.
Isaiah1:6 Kunninni kainohunni umunni lekkate geeshsha fayyimma dino'ne; bisi'ne darshe, madanna malaa calla ikkino; mada'neno xaginseenna dihurtannote."
