Jeremiah34:7 Baabilooni moote olanto katama gawajjitu. Hakkiinni sa'e 2 qiinshoonnire Yihudu katamma Lakiishinna Azeqa miiccu.
Jeremiah34:8 Sedeqiyaasi manna Borojjimmatenni fushshate Yerusaalamete manni ledo sumuu yiino.
Jeremiah34:9 Ibiraawoota ikkitinore labbaahanna meya borojje borojjimmatenni fushshitu. Ayino fiixasi Israeelicha borojjicho assi'rannokki gedeno sumuu yitu.
Jeremiah34:10 Mannunna roorrootinsa baalu borojjensa wolassitanno gedenna layinkimeeshsho borojje assidhannokki gede sumuu yitu. Sumuu yitino garinni wo'manke borojjimmatenni fushshitunsa.
Jeremiah34:11 Shiima yanna gedensaanni kayinni hedonsa soorrite galagalte borojjimmatenni soqqamannonsa gede assitu.
Jeremiah34:12 Hatte yannara Kaaliiqi ane Ermiyaasira,"
Jeremiah34:13 Israeelete Magani Kaaliiqi, «Ani akaakka'ne Gibitsete gobbanni, borojjimmatenni fushshummo waro insa ledo gondooro eoommo."
Jeremiah34:14 Kunni gondoori garinni, Ibiraawootu borojji noonsari baalu 6 diro loosiisidhuhu gedensaanni lamalki diro borojjimmatenni fushshitannonsa gede hajajoommonsa. Ikkollana akaakkansa hajajantaeranna yoommore macciishshitara dihasidhino."
Jeremiah34:15 Kuneeti ki'neno shiima yannara albaanni, higgine ane tashshi assannoe coye assitinoonni. Baalunku ilamansa ikkitino borojje Israeeloota borojjimmatenni fushshate sumuu yitinoonni. Ane magansi'nanniwa Qullaawa Mine gamba yitine alba'yaanni gondooro e'inoonni."
Jeremiah34:16 Ikkollana gaabbitine badhera higgine su'ma'ya xonsiissinoonni. Mitti mitti'ne meyanna labbaa borojje borojjimmatenni fulanno gede assitinoonnire galagalchitine wolqatenni borojje assidhinoonni.
Jeremiah34:17 Kunnira ani Kaaliiqi, anera dihajajantinoonnie; ilama'ne Israeele borojjimmatenni fultanno gede diassitinoonninsa. Kunnira ani bagadu, dhibbunna hude shitanno'ne gede wore agureemmo. Ki'ne aana abbeemmo coye la'e gosa baala waajjite huxidhanno."
Jeremiah34:18 Yihudunna Yerusaalamete gashshaano, mootete mini roorrooti, qeesootunna albisootu baalu ledo middicha lamewa balka assite mereeroonni higge sa""atenni ane ledo gondooro e'ino. Ikkollana yitino coye agadha gibbe gondooro diigge huntino. Kunnira anino insa middicha assite dartu gede asseemmonsa."
Jeremiah34:19 
Jeremiah34:20 Shaannonsa diinira sayise eemmo; reeshshansa allaattetenna moyichoho sagale asseemmo.
Jeremiah34:21 «Yihudu moote Sedeqiyaasinna roorroota baala shaara hasanno diinira sayise eemmo. Qasa agurte noonsarira Baabilooni moote olantora galagalche sayise eemmonsa.
Jeremiah34:22 «Kune galagalte higge katama amaddanno gede hajajammoraati; katamano amadde giira qassanno. Yihudu katamma baala mannu hee'rannokkita ona asse agureemmo. Konne coye coyi'roommohu ani Kaaliiqaati» yiie.
Jeremiah35:1 Iyosiyaasi beetti Iyoaaqeemi Yihudaho moohi waro Kaaliiqi ane Ermiyaasira,"
Jeremiah35:2 «Rekaabootu ayiddira marte, Kaaliiqi Mini holguwa giddonni mittu giddora eessite aggannota woyinete xajje uyinsa» yiie."
Jeremiah35:3 Anino, (Wolu Ermiyaasi ilinohunniha Habazaaniya beetto) Azaaniya, roduuwisinna oososi baalate ledo haa're abboommo."
Jeremiah35:4 Insano Kaaliiqi minira Maganu manchi Agidaaliya beetti Hanaani rosaano holgira haa're massoommo. Hakku holgino roorrootu holginni aane waalcho agarannohu Shaluumi beetti Maiseya holgira aleenni hige nooho.
Jeremiah35:5 Ani woyinete xajje wonshinoonni maaqquwanna finiinna albansaanni wore, «Hanni tenne woyinete xajje agge» yoommonsa."
Jeremiah35:6 Insa kayinni, «Ninke woyinete xajje diangeemmo. Rekaabi ilinohu anninke Iyonaadaabi ninkenna oosonke woyinete xajje angeemmokki gede hoolinonke."
Jeremiah35:7 Mine mi'nineemmokki gede, baatto loosi'neemmokki gede hattono woyinete kaashsho kaasi'neemmokki gede kulinonke; dukkana qasidhine heedhe. Hatto ikkiro, tenne xeeda galtinanni gobbara seeda diro heedhinanni."
Jeremiah35:8 Ninkeno anninke Iyonaadaabi hajajinonkere wonshinoommo. Ninke, meentinke, labballunna seennu oosonkeno woyinete xajje diangoommo."
Jeremiah35:9 Galleemmo mine dimi'ninoommo; woyine kaasi'nanniwinna gide loosi'nanniwi dinonke.
Jeremiah35:10 Dukkanu giddo hee'nanni anninke hajajinonkere baala wonshinoommo.
Jeremiah35:11 Ikkollana Baabilooni moote Nabukadanatsoori daye tenne gobba amadi yannara, Baabilooninna Sooriyu olantowiinni xoonqe Yerusaalame daate hendoommo. Kunnira, kune dange Yerusaalamete hee'noommo» yitu."
Jeremiah35:12 Israeelete Magani Olantote Mootichi Kaaliiqi ane Ermiyaasira, hadhe Yihudu manniranna Yerusaalamete heedhannorira, «Ki'ne ani yoommota macciishshitine hajajama mayira gibbinanni?"
Jeremiah35:13 
Jeremiah35:14 Iyonaadaabi ilama nafa woyinete xajje aggannokki gede anninsa hajajinonsare agadhite woyinete xajje diaggino. Ki'ne kayinni ani marro marro hige kuloommo'nere diagadhitinoonni.
Jeremiah35:15 Qoleno, ki'ne mittu mittunku busha doogo'nenni higgine dancha coye assitinanni gede, soqqamaano'ya himanaano marro marro hige soommo. Insano wole maganna hoode hadhine magansidhinannikki gede qorophisiissino'ne. Ki'neranna annuwa'nera oommo baattora heedhinanni gede kultino'ne. Ki'ne kayinni yoommo coye macciishshatenna haja assate dihasidhinoonni."
Jeremiah35:16 Rekaabi beetti Iyonaadaabi sirchi anninsa hajajinonsa hajajo wonshitinona, ki'ne manni'ya kayinni anera dihajajantinoonnie."
Jeremiah35:17 Kunnira, ani Israeelete Magani Olantote Mootichi Kaaliiqi, kuneeti abbeemmo yoommoha busha coye Yihudunna Yerusaalamete manni aana abbeemmo. Konne asseemmohu kuloommo'nere macciishshanna, woshsheennano yee yaa gibbinoonnihuraati» yii."
Jeremiah35:18 Hakkunni gedensaanni ani Ermiyaasi Rekaabootaho, « ‹Israeelete Magani Olantote Mootichi Kaaliiqi, anni'ne Iyonaadaabi uyino'ne hajajo wonshitinoonni. Rosiisino'nere baala assitinoonni; kulino'ne seera baala agadhitinoonni."
Jeremiah35:19 Kunnira, Israeelete Magani Olantote Mootichi Kaaliiqi anera soqqamannohu, Rekaabi beetti Iyonaadaabi sirchi giddonni hegere geeshsha dihooganno› yiino» yee kuloommonsa."
Jeremiah36:1 Iyosiyaasi beetti Iyoaaqeemi Yihudaho moohihunni shoolki diro, Kaaliiqi ane Ermiyaasira,"
Jeremiah36:2 «Ani Kaaliiqi ate hasaawisummohehunni Iyosiyaasi moohi yannanni kayise techo geeshsha Israeelete, Yihudu manniranna wole gosa daafira coyi'roommo qaale xaanxoonni gogi aana borreessi."
Jeremiah36:3 Yihudu manni aanansa abbeemmo yoommo bao macciishshe miteekke higannoha ikkiro, anino saonsanna cubbonsa agureemmonsaha ikkanno» yiie."
Jeremiah36:4 Ani Ermiyaasino Neeriya beetto Baarooki woshsheenna, Kaaliiqi coyi'rinoere baala ani kulanna xaanxoonni gogi aana borreessi."
Jeremiah36:5 Hakkunni gedensaanni ani Baarookira, «Kunni ka'a Qullaawu Minira ea diuyinannie."
Jeremiah36:6 Ati kayinni Qullaawu Minira marte kulannahe borreessittoha Kaaliiqi qaale ita aga agure huucci'ranni noo mannira nabbawinsa. Yihudu katamma baalatenni dayino manni macciishshanna nabbawi.
Jeremiah36:7 Kaaliiqi lowo geeshsha aarame hanqe gudara kaino daafira, mannu baalunku miteekke gaabbe bunshesiwiinni hige Kaaliiqira eegamannoha ikkannona» yee hajajoommo."
Jeremiah36:8 Baarookino hajajoommosi garinni Kaaliiqi qaale Qullaawu Mini giddo nabbawi.
Jeremiah36:9 Iyosiyaasi beetti Iyoaaqeemi Yihudaho moohihunni ontikki diro honsikki aganira, Yerusaalamete hee'rannohunna Yihudu katammanni dayino manni baalu Kaaliiqi maaro afi'rate ita aga agure huucci'ri."
Jeremiah36:10 Mannu baalunku macciishshanna, Baarooki ani kulanna xaanxoonni gogira borreessino qaale nabbawi. Nabbawinohuno mootete mini borreessaanchi Saafaani beetti Gemaariya holgi widoonni hige saeeti. Kuni holgi noohuno Qullaawu Minira massannohu haaru huxxi waalchi mule aliidi nafari widoonniiti."
Jeremiah36:11 Gemaariya beetti Mikaya Kaaliiqi qaale Baarooki nabbawanna macciishshi.
Jeremiah36:12 Mikayano mootete mini borreessaanchi holgira ei. Eeanno woyiteno, borreessaanchu Elishamai, Shamaiya beetti Delaya, Akiboori beetti Elinaataani, Saafaani beetti Gemaariya, Hanaaniya beetti Sedeqiyaasinna wolootu gashshaanono hakkiicho ofolte no."
Jeremiah36:13 Mikayano Baarooki mannaho nabbawanna macciishshino qaale baala kulinsa.
Jeremiah36:14 Gashshaanono, Baarooki mannaho nabbawinoha xaanxoonni gogira borreessinoonni qaale haa're abbanno gede, Yihuda sokku. (Yihudu Netaaniyaho, Netaaniya Shelemiyaho, Shelemiya Kuushiho). Baarookino borronniha xaanxoonni goga haa're abbi."
Jeremiah36:15 Insano, «Hanni ofolte, angakki noo qaale macciishshineemmona nabbawinke» yitusi. Baarookino nabbawinsa."
Jeremiah36:16 Nabbawe kaihu gedensaanni, waajjite mimmitonsa la'anni Baarooki, «Konne coye mootete kula hasiissannonke» yitusi."
Jeremiah36:17 Hakkunni gedensaanni, «Konne baala hiitto assite borreessoottoro kulinke. Ermiyaasi kulannahe borreessootto?» yite xa'mitusi."
Jeremiah36:18 Baarookino, «Ee, mitto mittonka qaale isi kulannae ani xaanxoonni gogi aana kuulunni borreessoommo» yee dawarinsa."
Jeremiah36:19 Gashshaanono Baarooki, «Atinna Ermiyaasi hadhine maaxamme; heedhinoonniwa ayerano kultinoonte» yitusi."
Jeremiah36:20 Gashshaanono xaanxoonniha borrote goga massite borreessaanchu Elishamai holge worte, macciishshitino coye baala marte mootete kultu."
Jeremiah36:21 Mooteno hakkonne xaanxoonni goga mare abbanno gede Yihuda soyi. Isino borreessaanchu Elishamai holge worroonniha xaanxoonni goga haa're abbe, mootetenna mulesi uurrite noo gashshaanora nabbawi."
Jeremiah36:22 Hatti yanna hawado ikkitino daafira, moote mootete mine giira giirranniwa ofolle no."
Jeremiah36:23 Yihudu 3 woy 4 gafa nabbawi kiironni, moote nabbambisi geeshsha shiimu billawinni mure giirate tugi. Togo assanni xaanxoonniha borrote goga giire huni."
Jeremiah36:24 Mooteno ikko ledosi noo gashshaano konne qaale macciishshite horonta diwaajjitino; dadillitinota egensiisate imaanansano didartino.
Jeremiah36:25 Elinaataani, Delayanna Gemaariya moote xaanxoonni goga giire hunannokki gede huuccitusi. Isi kayinni insa yitinota dimacciishshino."
Jeremiah36:26 Hakkunni gedensaanni, moote beettosi Yirahime""eeli, Azirieeli beetti Serayinna Abidieeli beetti Shelemiya ledo ane Ermiyaasinna borreessaancho'ya Baarooki amaddanno gede hajaji. Kaaliiqi kayinni affannonkekki gede assi."
Jeremiah36:27 Moote Iyoaaqeemi ani kulanna Baarooki borreessinoha xaanxoonni goga giire hunihu gedensaanni Kaaliiqi,"
Jeremiah36:28 wole xaanxoonni goga haa're moote Iyoaaqeemi giire hunihu aana noo qaale layinkimeeshsho borreesseemmo gede kulie.
Jeremiah36:29 Moote Iyoaaqeemirano, «Kaaliiqi, ‹Baabilooni moote daye tenne baattonna aanase nooha mannanna saada gudeemmo yiino yitanni mayira borreessootto?› yite xaanxoonni goga giirte hunootto."
Jeremiah36:30 Kunnira, ate Yihudu mootera Iyoaaqeemira Kaaliiqi, ‹Sirchikki giddonni Daawitiha ayirrinyu barcima ragi'rannohu dihee'ranno. Reeshshakkino mullawa tungeenna barra arrishshote, hashsha qorraho hagamanno."
Jeremiah36:31 Cubbi'ne daafira ate, sirchokkinna ledokki gashshaano qorichisheemmo. Ani yoommota macciishsha gibbinoonni daafira, ki'nera, Yerusaalametenna Yihudaho hee'ranno manni baalaho hedoommo bao haa're abbeemmo› yiino yite kulisi» yiie."
Jeremiah36:32 Anino wole xaanxoonni goga haa're, borreessaanchu Baarookira oommo. Isino Yihudu moote Iyoaaqeemi giire hunihu aana noo qaale borreessi; mimmito lawannohu lowo qaali aanaho ledami."
Jeremiah37:1 Baabilooni moote Nabukadanatsoori Iyoaaqeemi hoole dargasi Iyosiyaasi beetto Sedeqiyaasi Yihudaho moohisi.
Jeremiah37:2 Sedeqiyaasino ikko ledosi gashshaano woy gobbasi manni Kaaliiqi ane widoonni coyi'rino qaale dimacciishshitino.
Jeremiah37:3 Moote Sedeqiyaasi kayinni, «Maganonke Kaaliiqa huuccinke» yee Shelemiya beetto Yehukaalinna qeesicha Maiseya beetto Soffooniyaasi anewa soyi."
Jeremiah37:4 Hatte yannara usuru minira eessitinoekki daafira, mannu mereero ha'ramanni noommo."
Jeremiah37:5 Baabilooni olanto Yerusaalame doyissite heedhe, Gibitsete olanto dannansa tayisse sa'e dagganni noota macciishshite agurte badhera higgu."
Jeremiah37:6 Hakkunni gedensaanni Kaaliiqi,"
Jeremiah37:7 «Israeelete Magani Kaaliiqi, ane huuccattoe gede manna soyihehura Yihudu mootera, ‹Kaa'litahera dagginoti Gibitsete olanto galagalte gobbansa higganno."
Jeremiah37:8 Hakkunni gedensaanni Baabiloonootu galagalte higge konne katama qasse amadde, aanaho giira qassanno."
Jeremiah37:9 « ‹Baabiloonootu galagalte daggara noona, agurte hadhinoha laweenna'ne dogantinannikki gede ani Kaaliiqi kuloommo'ne."
Jeremiah37:10 Baabiloonoota qeeltinanniha ikkiro nafa, madidhe dukkanu giddo goxxinori galagalte wolqa assidhe katama giirte huntanno› yiino yite kulisi» yiie."
Jeremiah37:11 Hatte yannara Baabilooni olanto, Gibitsete olanto dagganni noota macciishshite Yerusaalame agurte badhera higge hadhe no."
Jeremiah37:12 Anino ayiddi'yawiinni iillannoe iqqa adhammora Yerusaalametenni Biiniyaami gobba ha'rammora kaummo.
Jeremiah37:13 Biiniyaami waalcho iillanni hee'reennanni, agaraasinete roorrichi Hanaaniya beetti Shelemiya ilinohu Yiriya, «Baabiloonootunniwa fulte ba'anni nootto!» yee amadie."
Jeremiah37:14 Anino, «Dee'ni, ati yaatto gede ani Baabiloonootunniwa ba""anni noommoha di""ikkoommo» yoommo. Isi kayinni ani yoommota macciishsha giwe amade masse gashshaanote uyinoe."
Jeremiah37:15 Roorrootuno hanqite gansiissuehu gedensaanni, usuru mine assidhinohura borreessaanchu Yoonaataani minira eessite cuffue."
Jeremiah37:16 Hakkiichono baattote woroonni seekkinoonni darga lowo yanna usurame keeshshoommo.
Jeremiah37:17 Shiima yanna gedensaanni moote Sedeqiyaasi soye woshshiishe, «Kaaliiqi kulinohe coyi nooni?» yee calli'ya hee'reenna xa'mie. Anino, «Ee no» yee dawarummosihu gedensaanni lede, «Ati Baabilooni moote angara eatto» yoommosi."
Jeremiah37:18 Qoleno, «Ane usuru mine tugginiehu atera, woy ledokki gashshaanora woy mannikkira ma asseenna'neeti?"
Jeremiah37:19 ‹Baabilooni moote ateranna gobbakkira bala dituganno› yite himantu himanaano hanni xa hiikko no?
Jeremiah37:20 Moote mooticha'ya! Yeemmore macciishshattoe gedenna huucci'reemmore wonshattoe gede eegameemmohe. Ballo eeggatena usurranniwa hakka Yoonaataani minira sokkootie; hakkiira soyittoero reemmo» yoommo.
Jeremiah37:21 Kunnira, moote Sedeqiyaasi mootete mine agaraasinete mini giddo cunfannie gede hajajinoe; anino hakkiicho keeshshoommo. Katamu giddo intanniri horo hooga geeshsha barru barrunkunni tima diho'linoonnie."
Jeremiah38:1 Maataani beetti Shefaaxiya, Pashihuuri beetti Gedaaliya, Shelemiya beetti Yehukaalinna, Malkiya beetti Pashihuuri Kaaliiqi kulinoe coye mannaho rosiisoommota macciishshitu."
Jeremiah38:2 Anino, «Kaaliiqi, ‹Katamu giddo gatannoha baala bagadu, hudenna dhibbu gudanno; ha're Baabiloonootaho anga aannohu kayinni direyanno; lubbosino reyotenni gatisi'ranno› yiino» yoommo."
Jeremiah38:3 Qoleno, «Kaaliiqi, ‹Konne katama Baabilooni olantora sayise eemmo; insano katama amaddanno› yiino» yoommo."
Jeremiah38:4 Hakkunni gedensaanni gashshaano mootenniwa marte, «Kunni coyinni katamaho noo olantora wolqa hunanni no. Katamu giddo noo mannano togo assanni no. Mannaho bao agurranna mittono dancha coye halchannokki daafira, kuni manchi reya hasiissannosi» yitu."
Jeremiah38:5 Moote Sedeqiyaasino, «Ani dihanqeemmo'nena baxxini gede asse» yii."
Jeremiah38:6 Hakkunni gedensaanni, ane haadhe massite, mootete mine nootera mootete beetti Malkiya bale wayinnite giddora siiwotenni usurte dirrissue. Balete giddono sabba ikkinnina wayi dino; anino sabbaho lixummo."
Jeremiah38:7 Mootete mine soqqamannohu Itiyophiyu manchi Ebedimeleki balete tugginoeta macciishshi. Hatte yannara moote Biiniyaami Waalchira ofolle mannaho coye afanni no.
Jeremiah38:8 Ebedimelekino mootete mininni fule mare mootete,"
Jeremiah38:9 «Moote mooticha'ya! Kuni manni himanaancho Ermiyaasi balete tuge lowo sao assino. Katamaho sagale nookki daafira hudetenni reyanni no» yii.
Jeremiah38:10 Mooteno Ebedimelekira, «Kawiinni 3 manna haadhe marte, Ermiyaasi reyikkinni balete giddonni fushshi» yee hajajisi."
Jeremiah38:11 Ebedimeleki manna anga haa're mare, uduunnu mininni haa'rinoha akkala hocco siiwote aana xaaxe noommowa balete giddora dirrisi."
Jeremiah38:12 Siiwo ittannoekki gede akkala hocco kikki'late wodheemmo gede kulie; anino yiino gede assi'roommo.
Jeremiah38:13 Insano balete giddonni siiwotenni goshooshshe fushshite, mootete mine agartannori heedhannowa keeshsheemmo gede assitinoe."
Jeremiah38:14 Moote Sedeqiyaasi manna soye woshshee, Qullaawa Mine sayikki waalchi mule hee'reenna, «Mitto coye xa'mammoheraatina, maaxittokkinni kulie» yiie."
Jeremiah38:15 Anino daware, «Halaale kulummohero shaattoe. Amaalummoherono dimacciishshattoe» yoommosi."
Jeremiah38:16 Moote Sedeqiyaasino, «Ani sheemmohekki gedenna shitannoherirano sayise eemmohekki gede, lubbo kalaqinonke Kaaliiqi su'minni xaareemmo» yee hashaashe kulinoe."
Jeremiah38:17 Hakkunni gedensaanni ani Sedeqiyaasira, «Israeelete Magani Olantote Mootichi Kaaliiqi, ‹Baabilooni moote roorrootira anga uyittoro atino gatatto; kuni katamino digiiramanno; atinna minikki manni baalu gattinanni."
Jeremiah38:18 Insara anga aa giwittoro kayinni, Baabiloonootu konne katama amadde giira qassanno; atino digatatto› yiino» yoommosi."
Jeremiah38:19 Moote Sedeqiyaasi qole, «Ani ninke gibbe Baabiloonootunniwa e'inore waajjeemmo. Baabiloonootu insara sayisse uyituero gawajjitannoe yee yaadoommo» yiie."
Jeremiah38:20 Anino, «Sayisse diuyitannohena, kuleemmoheha Kaaliiqi yiino coye calla macciishshi; hakkunni gedensaanni qinaannohe; lubbokkino gattanno."
Jeremiah38:21 Insara anga aattokkiha ikkiro kayinni, Kaaliiqi anera ajuujatenni leellishinoeri no."
Jeremiah38:22 Kune, Yihudu moote mine gatino meento baala Baabilooni roorrootiwa haa'ne ha'nanni woyite, ‹Hexxoottoti jaallakki dogginohe; atera roorrensa leellishshinohe; xa kune sabbu amadinohe daafira, hakkuri hexxoottori jaallakki agurte hadhinohe› » yaanno."
Jeremiah38:23 Qoleno, «Meento'nenna ooso'ne baala Baabiloonootunniwa haa'ne ha'nanni; atino insa anganni digatatto; Baabilooni mooteno amade usuranya assannohe; kuni katamino giiramanno» yoommo."
Jeremiah38:24 Sedeqiyaasino daware, «Hee'ra hasi'rittoro konne coye ayerano cuqqi yitooti."
Jeremiah38:25 Roorrootu ane ledo hasaawoottota affuro, hasaamboommore affara xa'mitannohe. Qolteno, ‹Moote xa'meennahe kuloottosire maaxittonkero, shineemmohe› yitannohena,"
Jeremiah38:26 ati kayinni, ‹Reemmona galagalchite Yoonaataani miniralla qoltootie› yee moote huucci'roommo yiinsa» yiie."
Jeremiah38:27 Hakkunni gedensaanni roorrootu baalunku dagge xa'mitue; anino moote yii yiinoeta yoommonsa. Mootete ledo hasaambummore macciishshinohu nookki daafira ledde dixa'mitinoe.
Jeremiah38:28 Anino Yerusaalame amadantu barri geeshsha mootete mini agaraasine heedhannowa usurame keeshshoommo.
Jeremiah39:1 Sedeqiyaasi Yihudaho moohihunni honsikki diro tonnikki aganira Baabilooni moote Nabukadanatsoori olantosi baalate ledo daye Yerusaalame doyisse amadi.
Jeremiah39:2 Sedeqiyaasi moohihunni tonaa mitikki diro shoolki aganira honsikki barra Baabiloonootu katamu huxxa dhoosse e'u.
Jeremiah39:3 Yerusaalame amadantuhu gedensaanni, Nabukadanatsoori roorrooti: Nergali-Sharetseri, Samigari, Nebo-Sarsekiimi Rabisarisi, qaru roorrichi Nergali-Sharetserinna wolootuno no."
Jeremiah39:4 Moote Sedeqiyaasinna olanto baala Baabiloonoota affe xooqqu; insano hashsha mootete gateenni higge lamenka huxxa xaadisanno waalchi widoonni Yordaanoosi Lagichi widira higge xooqqu.
Jeremiah39:5 Baabilooni olanto faana gante Iyyaarko mule noo xawira iillite Sedeqiyaasi qafaddu. Hakkunni gedensaanni Hamaati gobbara Ribila Katamira noohuwa moote Nabukadanatsooriwa haadhe massitusi. Nabukadanatsoorino Sedeqiyaasi fonqole so'rosi bade afe,"
Jeremiah39:6 Sedeqiyaasi illesinni laanna oososi Ribila katamira shinanni gede assi; Yihudu roorroota baalankano shini.
Jeremiah39:7 Hakkunni gedensaanni Sedeqiyaasi ille giddonni fushshite hunte, isono cagaagetenni usurte Baabilooni haadhe hadhanno gede olantosi hajaji."
Jeremiah39:8 Baabiloonootu Yerusaalamete huxxa baala diigge, mootete minenna minna baala giirtu."
Jeremiah39:9 Hakkunni gedensaanni, agaraasinete roorrichi Nabuzardaani katamaho gatinohanna Baabiloonootu ledo karsamino manna Baabilooni haa're ha'ri."
Jeremiah39:10 Mittoreno afidhinokki buxane calla Yihudaho agure ha're woyinenna shaana kaasidhanno darga uyinsa.
Jeremiah39:11 Baabilooni moote Nabukadanatsoorino Nabuzardaani,"
Jeremiah39:12 «Marte Ermiyaasi danchu garinni towatisi; hasiisannore baala assisi; mittu coyinnino gadadissootisi» yee hajaji.
Jeremiah39:13 Kunnira, Nabuzardaani Nabushazibaani, Nergali-Sharetserinna wolootu Baabilooni roorrooti ledo,"
Jeremiah39:14 usurame noommowa mootete mine noohunni agaraasinete mininni fuleemmo gede assinoe. Saafaani beetti Ahiqaami ilinohu Gedaaliyano mini'yara haa're harie; anino manni'ya ledo hakkiicho hee'roommo.
Jeremiah39:15 Ani mootete mine noo usuri mine hee'reenna Kaaliiqi,"
Jeremiah39:16 «Marte Itiyophiyicha Ebedimeleki, Israeelete Magani Olantote Mootichi Kaaliiqi, coyi'roommonte gede kunni katamira bao ikkinnina ba'raa'ra diabbeemmo; kuni coyi ikkanna ati illekkinni la""atto."
Jeremiah39:17 Hatte yannara ani Kaaliiqi ate agareemmohe; waajjatto manni angara dieatto.
Jeremiah39:18 Ani keerunni agareemmohe daafira direyatto; ane hexxootto daafira bagadu dishaannohe. Konne coye coyi'roommohu ani Kaaliiqaati» yii.
Jeremiah40:1 Agaraasinete roorrichi Nabuzardaani Raama usurame noommowiinni tiriehu gedensaanni, Kaaliiqi coyi'rie. Hakkunnira albaanni ani Yerusaalametenninna Yihudunni qafande Baabilooni haa'ne ha'ni manni ledo cagaagetenni usurreennae keeshshoommo."
Jeremiah40:2 Nabuzardaani ane calli'yara, «Maganikki Kaaliiqi tenne baatto hunannota balaxe coyi'rino;"
Jeremiah40:3 asseemmo yiinore baala kune wonshino. Kuni coyi ikkinohuno manni'ne cubbo loosinohuranna Kaaliiqira hajajama giwino daafiraati.
Jeremiah40:4 Xa kune ani cagaagetenni usurroonnita angakki tire aguroommohe; ane ledo Baabilooni ha'ra hasi'rittorono kai; anino atera hasiisannore asseemmohe. Ha'ra giwittoro kayinni konniicho hee'ri. Kune baatto hala'ladotena hasi'rittowa hee'ra dandaatto» yiie.
Jeremiah40:5 Ani dawarummokkinni Nabuzardaani lede, «Baabilooni moote Yihudu katammara shoommohuwa Saafaani beetti beetti Akiqaami ilinohuwa Gedaaliyawa ha'ri. Isiwa marte hakkiicho mannikki ledo hee'ri; woy hasi'rittowa hadhe hee'ra dandaatto» yee, sinqenna afansha anga wore geegiissie."
Jeremiah40:6 Anino Gedaaliyawa Mitsipha ha'roommo; isiwa mare qafadamikkinni gatino manni ledo hee'roommo.
Jeremiah40:7 Qafadantukkinni gattino olantonna katamu gobbaanni hee'ranno manni baalu, Baabilooni moote Gedaaliya Yihudu gobbaranna qafadantukkinni gattino buxanera shoominota macciishshi."
Jeremiah40:8 Kunnira, Naataaniya beetti Ismaeeli, Qaareha ooso Yohanaaninna Yoonaataani, Tanihumeeti beetti Seeraya, Nexofa yinanni gobba manchi Eefayi ooso, Maikichu Yaizaaniya manninsa baalunku ledo Gedaaliyawa Mitsipha daggu."
Jeremiah40:9 Saafaani beetti beetti Gedaaliya insaranna manninsara, «Baabiloonootaho soqqama waajjitinoonte. Tenne baattora teessine heedhe; baalunku coyi qinaanno'ne gede Baabilooni moote anga galle."
Jeremiah40:10 Anino, ki'ne afoo ikke Baabiloonootu ledo hasaawate konne Mitsipha ledo'ne hee'reemmo. Ki'ne kayinni woyinete hunduruurro, ejersu zayitenna wole laalo gamba assidhine duu'nitinanni konne amaxxitinoonni katammara heedhe» yiinsa."
Jeremiah40:11 Moaabi, Amooni, Edoominna wole gobbara heedhanno Israeele, Baabilooni moote Yihudu manna gatisinotanna, Gedaaliya gashshannonsa gede worroonnita macciishshite,"
Jeremiah40:12 baalunku galagalte Yihudu gobba daggu. Darante hadhinowiinni galagalte higge Mitsipha noohuwa Gedaaliyawa daggu. Hakkono woyinete hunduruurronna wole haqqe laalo gamba assidhe duu'nitu.
Jeremiah40:13 Hakkunni gedensaanni, Yohanaaninna anga uyitukkinni gattino olanto roorrooti baalu Mitsipha noohuwa Gedaaliyawa dagge,"
Jeremiah40:14 «Amooni moote Bealiisi, ate shaanno gede Naataani beetto Ismaeeli soyinota diafootto?» yite xa'mitusi. Gedaaliya kayinni konne coye diammanino."
Jeremiah40:15 Yohanaani Gedaaliyara, «Mittuno afannohu dihee'rannona mare Ismaeeli sheemmona aguri; isi ate sheenna atewa gamba yiinohu Yihudu manni baalu billaalle ba""annowe; wolu Yihudu gobbara hee'ranno manni baalu ba""anno» yii."
Jeremiah40:16 Gedaaliya kayinni Yohanaani, «Ismaeeli beebballa bushiishoottona, konne coye isi aana assitooti» yiisi."
Jeremiah41:1 Lamalki aganira mootete ilama ikkinohu gashshaanchu Elishamai beetti Naataaniya ilinohu Ismaeeli 10 manni ledo Mitsipha gashshaanchu Gedaaliyawa dayi. Hakkiicho mitteenni ofolte sagale ittanni heedheenna,"
Jeremiah41:2 Ismaeelinna ledosi noori tonnunku ka'e, Baabilooni moote shoominoha Gedaaliya bisetenni gante shitu."
Jeremiah41:3 Ismaeelino Gedaaliya ledo Mitsipha noo Yihudootanna hakkiicho noore Baabilooni olanto baala shee gudi.
Jeremiah41:4 Layinki soodo Gedaaliya reyinota ayino afikkinni,"
Jeremiah41:5 settawu manni Sekeeminni, Seelonninna Samaariyunni kae dayi. Insano dadillite ereeda meexxite, uddanonsa darte, bisonsa huduuxxitino. Kaaliiqi minira shiqishshannoha gidu fushshaatenna hixaana anga haadhe no."
Jeremiah41:6 Ismaeelino Mitsiphanni fule wi'lanni nooha lawanni insanni xaadara shiqi. Insanni xaadanni hee'renni, «Gedaaliyawa amme» yiinsa."
Jeremiah41:7 Katamu mereerira iillituta Ismaeelinna ledosi noori konne mannano shite balete giddo tuggu.
Jeremiah41:8 Kunni manni giddonni 10 manni, «Loosu giddo qamade, hayixe, ejersu zayitenna malawo maanxoommona ballo shitootinke» yite Ismaeeli huuccidhu. Isino shiikkinni agurinsa."
Jeremiah41:9 Ismaeeli konne manna shee, moote Baasha Mitsipha gaangeesse manna waa dirri'ra hoolanno yee waajjino daafira, Yihudu moote Aasi waa kofate umino balera reeshsha wonshi."
Jeremiah41:10 Hakkunni gedensaanni Ismaeeli Baabilooni mootera olu hajajaancho ikkinohu Nabuzardaani Gedaaliya towatanno gede worroonniha mootete seennenna gatino manna baala amade Mitsipha usuri. Hakkunni gedensaanni konne manna qafade, Amooni gobba widira qole haa're ha'ri."
Jeremiah41:11 Yohanaaninna ledosi noori olantote hajajaano baala Ismaeeli assino bunshe macciishshite,"
Jeremiah41:12 mannansa baala anga adhite Ismaeeli ledo olantara hadhu. Hordoffanni marte iso lowo kofo Gebaoonite mule iillitusi.
Jeremiah41:13 Ismaeeli qafade haa're ha'rino manni baalu Yohanaaninna ledosi noore olantote hajajaano afe hagiidhe,"
Jeremiah41:14 dodanni mare Yohanaaniuu ledo karsami.
Jeremiah41:15 Ismaeeli 8 olantosi ledo Yohanaaniwiinni xooqe Amooni gobba fule bai.
Jeremiah41:16 Yohanaani ledo noori olantote hajajaano baala Ismaeeli Gedaaliya shiihu gedensaanni, Mitsiphanni qafade haa're ha'rino olanto, seenne, oosonsanna roorroota baala qoltu."
Jeremiah41:17 Insano Baabilooni moote shoominoha Gedaaliya Ismaeeli shiino daafira, Baabiloonootu shitannonke yite waajjite Gibitse hadhara ka'u. Xooqqe hadhuhu gedensaanni Beetelihemete mule Geruuti Kimihaami yinanniwa ofoltu."
Jeremiah41:18 
Jeremiah42:1 Olantote roorrooti, Yohanaaninna Hoshaiya beetti Azaariyaasi manna baala gamba assidhe ane Ermiyaasiwa dagge,"
Jeremiah42:2 «Ninke alba kiiro lowo mannaati; xa kune laattonte gede shiimu manni callu gantoommo. Kunnira eeggatena, doogo kulannonke gedenna ikkineemmo gara xawisannonke gede Maganokki Kaaliiqa huuccinke» yitue."
Jeremiah42:3 
Jeremiah42:4 Anino, «Maahoyye, yitinoonninte gede Maganonke Kaaliiqa huucceemmo'ne; Kaaliiqi qolanno'nereno maaxummokkinni kuleemmo'ne» yoommonsa."
Jeremiah42:5 Hakkunni gedensaanni, «Maganikki Kaaliiqi ate widoonni qole kulinonkere assa hoongummoro, Kaaliiqi afonke."
Jeremiah42:6 Seyirono bushirono Maganinke Kaaliiqi yiino gede ikkineemmo. Isi yiinota ikkinummoro baalunku coyi qinaannonke» yitue.
Jeremiah42:7 Tonnu barri gedensaanni Kaaliiqi coyi'reennae,"
Jeremiah42:8 Yohanaani, ledosi noore olantote hajajaanonna manna baala woshshe,"
Jeremiah42:9 «Huuccammo'nera sokkiniehu Israeelete Magani Kaaliiqi,"
Jeremiah42:10 ‹Abboommo'ne bao daafira dadilloommona, tenne baattora heedhiniro uurriseemmo'ne ikkinnina didiigeemmo'ne; kaaseemmo'ne ikkinnina dibuqqiseemmo'ne."
Jeremiah42:11 Baabilooni moote waajja agurre; ani ledo'ne noommo daafira isi anganni gatiseemmo'ne. Togo yoommohu ani Kaaliiqaati.
Jeremiah42:12 Ani mararaancho ikkoommo daafira, isono mararanno'ne gede asseenna, ki'ne gobba'nera heedhinanni gede aguranno'ne. Togo yoommohu ani Kaaliiqaati› yiino."
Jeremiah42:13 «Magani'ne Kaaliiqi yiinonte gede tenne gobbanni fultinoonte. Gibbine, ‹Dee'ni, olaho woshshinanni xurumbi, olu duduwinna hude nookkiwa ha'ne Gibitsete gobbara hee'neemmo› yitiniro kayinni, ki'ne Yihudu taraare togo yitiniro, Israeelete Magani Olantote Mootichi Kaaliiqi, ‹Hadhine Gibitsete gobbara hee'rate murcidhiniro,"
Jeremiah42:14 
Jeremiah42:15 
Jeremiah42:16 hakku waajjitinanni oli iillanno'ne; waajjitinanni hudeno hoode'ne hadhanno; hakkiicho Gibitsete gobbara reyitinanni.
Jeremiah42:17 Gibitsete gobba ha're hee'ra hasi'rannoha baala olu, hudenna dhibbu gudanno; insa giddonni mittuno digatanno; insa aana abbate hedoommo baonni gatannohu dino› yiino."
Jeremiah42:18 «Ani Israeelete Magani Olantote Mootichi Kaaliiqi ki'nera kuleemmo coyi, ‹Gibitsete gobba ha'ne hakkiicho hee'neemmo› yitiniro, kunni albaanni Yerusaalamete manni aana abboommo hanqonna aara ki'ne aanano abbeemmo. Mannu ki'ne aana ikkino coye lae masanno; la""anno'nehu baalu qacifatanno'ne; su'mi'neno rumonniha ikkanno. Konne darga layinkimeeshsho dila'inanni yoommo» yiinonsa."
Jeremiah42:19 Anino qole mannaho, «Ki'ne Yihudu taraare Kaaliiqi, ‹Gibitse hadhinoonte› yee kulino'ne. Anino hadhinannikki gede lede qorophisiiseemmo'ne."
Jeremiah42:20 Ki'ne, ‹Maganinke Kaaliiqi yiinore baala assineemmona, iso huuccinke› yitine wonshitinannikki coye coyi'ra'nenni reyo mulira abbidhinoonni."
Jeremiah42:21 Kune techo ani Kaaliiqi yiinore kuloommo'ne; ki'ne kayinni dimacciishshitinoonni.
Jeremiah42:22 Kunnira, hattenne heedhinara hadhinanni gobba Gibitsennitera olu, hudenna dhibbu gudanno'neta affe» yoommonsa."
Jeremiah43:1 Maganinke Kaaliiqi hajajinoere baala insara kule gudummohu gedensaanni,"
Jeremiah43:2 Hoshaiya beetti Azaariyaasi Qaareha beetti Yohanaaninna boonaleeyye baalu, «Coyikki kaphoho; Maganinke Kaaliiqi, ‹Gibitse hadhoonke› yee dikulinohe."
Jeremiah43:3 Baabiloonootu gadadisse, shitannonke gede, woy hasidhuro qafadde haadhe hadhannonke gede kakkayisinohehu Neeriya beetti Baarookiiti» yitusi."
Jeremiah43:4 Kunni garinni Yohanaani, olantote hajajaanonna mannu baalu Kaaliiqira hajajame Yihudu baattora hee'ra giwi."
Jeremiah43:5 Yohanaaninna olantote hajajaano Yihudu gobbara gatino manna baala Gibitse haadhe hadhu. Kunino, albaanni dagate mereero billaallinowiinni galagale gobbansa Yihuda higino mannaati."
Jeremiah43:6 Baabiloonootu roorrichi Nabuzardaani Gedaaliya anga wore ha'rinore Baarooki, anenna woloota qoleno mootete seenne, meentonna ooso haadhe hadhino."
Jeremiah43:7 Kaaliiqi yiinore macciishsha gibbe Gibitsete gobbara Xafinaasi Katami geeshsha hadhu.
Jeremiah43:8 Hakko Xafinaasi hee'reenna Kaaliiqi,"
Jeremiah43:9 «Shiima jajjabba kinna haadhe, mootete mini xullichira albaanni shiimu Israeelete manni la""anna waante aaniido dorunni xaallali."
Jeremiah43:10 Hakkunni gedensaanni, ani Israeelete Magani Olantote Mootichi Kaaliiqi, hedo'ya wonshannoha Baabilooni moote Nabukadanatsoori haa're abbeenna, tenne waamitto kinna aana ayirrinyunniha barcimasi wodhe gashshootu dukkanna qasi'rannota kulinsa."
Jeremiah43:11 Isino daye Gibitse amadanno; dhibbu shaanno gede hendoonnire dhibbu gudanno; qafadantanno gede hendoonniri qafadantanno; bagadu shaanno gede hendoonnire bagadu shaanno.
Jeremiah43:12 Kaphu maganna Gibitsenniti heedhanno galmuwara giira qaseemmo. Baabilooni mooteno kaphunnita magannansa giiranno; hasi'rirono qafade haa're ha'ranno. Allaalaanchu aanaho ga'nanno faalchi aaninni xinqine hoollanni iwiiwe gede, Gibitsete maganna xinqe hoole, ittisannosihu nookkiha fule ha'ranno."
Jeremiah43:13 Gibitsete gobbara Heliyopoliisi yinanni katamira noota kinnatenni seekkinoonni sooddiyye diiganno. Gibitsennita kaphu magannanna galmuwansa giiranno yiino» yite kulinsa.
Jeremiah44:1 Gibitsete gobbara Migidooli, Xafinaasinna Memfiisi yinanni katammara, qoleno Phatiroosi yinanniwa wodiidi gobbara noo Israeelooti baalaho,"
Jeremiah44:2 Ani Israeelete Magani Olantote Mootichi Kaaliiqi: «Yerusaalametenna Yihudu katamma baalate abboommo bao ki'ne umi'ne affinoonni; kune xaa geeshsha mannu hee'rannokkiha diigantinowa no.
Jeremiah44:3 Kuni ikkinohuno, bunshe assatenni hanqissinoe daafiraati. Kaphu magannarano kakkaltino; insa ki'neno akaakka'neno egentinoonnikki maganna magansidhino."
Jeremiah44:4 Ani giweemmoha hakkonne busha coye assitinannikki gede kulta'nera soqqamaano'ya himanaano marro marro hige soommo'ne.
Jeremiah44:5 Ki'ne kayinni kultino'nere dimacciishshitinoonni; hajano diassitinoonni; bunshe'newiinnino dihigginoonni. Kaphu magannara kakkalano diagurtinoonni.
Jeremiah44:6 Kunni daafira, Yihudu katammaranna Yerusaalamete dooggara hanqo'yanna aara'ya dirrise giirantanno gede assoommo. Kune techo la'inanninte gede diigante mulla darga ikkite gattino."
Jeremiah44:7 «Xaano ani Israeelete Magani Olantote Mootichi Kaaliiqi mitto coye xa'meemmo'ne. Ki'neno tenne bunshe mayira loossine tenne bao umi'nera, labballu, meentu, oosotenna qaaqquullu aana abbitine mannu taraare gooffanno gede assitinanni?"
Jeremiah44:8 Heedhinara dagginoonni gobbara Gibitsete noo magannara kakkaltinanni ane mayira hanqissinannie? Togo assatenni, umo'ne rumonniha assitine, daga baalate mereero ajiiffantannire ikkitinanni."
Jeremiah44:9 Alba annuwa'ne, mootoolla'nenna mootoolla'ne meenti, qoltineno ki'ne umi'nenna meenti'ne Yihudu katammaranna Yerusaalamete dooggara loossinoonni bunshe habbinini?"
Jeremiah44:10 Kune techo geeshsha umo'ne shollishshine heeshshi diyitinoonni. Ane ayirrisa gibbine ki'neranna annuwa'nera oommo woganna seera mishshinoonni.
Jeremiah44:11 «Kunnira, ani Israeelete Magani Olantote Mootichi Kaaliiqi, ki'nera hanqu albinni kae Yihudu baatto co'o asse hunammoraati."
Jeremiah44:12 Gibitsete hee'ra doodhitine hadhinoonnire Yihudu taraare tayiseemmo. Aju akkali gattinikkinni baalanka Gibitsete baattora hudenna bagadu gudanno'ne. Macciishshanno manni masanno; ajiiffantannire ikkitine su'ma'neno rumonniha assidhinoonni.
Jeremiah44:13 Yerusaalame qorichishummonte gede Gibitsete baattora heedhinoonnire bagadunni, hudetenninna dhibbunni qorichisheemmo'ne."
Jeremiah44:14 Gibitsete heedhinara hadhinoonniri giddonni gatannohu dihee'ranno; galagaltine Yihudu gobba higate halchitinanniri giddonni lowo geeshsha shiimu manni callu xooqe fulanno» yii.
Jeremiah44:15 Aliyyeenninna wodiidoonni noo Israeele baala Kaaliiqi kulinoere coyi'ranna macciishshitu. Meentinsa wole magannara kakkalinota afino manninna hakko uurre noohu meentinsa baalu,"
Jeremiah44:16 «Kaaliiqi su'minni kuloottonke coye baala dimacciishshineemmo.
Jeremiah44:17 Ninke assineemmo yinoommore kayinni assineemmo; gordu mootitte yinannitera maganonkera xiniinsi'neemmo. Annuwanke, mootoollankenna gashshaanonke Yihudu katammaranna Yerusaalamete dooggara assitino garinni xaano woyinete xajje fushshaate shiqinsheemmose. Konne coye assinanni hee'ni waro lowo qiniiti noonke; jirono noonke daafira mitto qarrano diafi'noommo."
Jeremiah44:18 Gordu mootittera kakkala agurrummonkunninna woyinete xajje shiqisha uurrinsummo kawa, lexxinonkeri dino; mannankeno bagadunna hude guddino» yitu."
Jeremiah44:19 Meentuno lede, «Ninke gordu mootittera tima ganneemmohu, kakkalleemmohunna woyinete xajje fushshaate shiqinsheemmohu galtenke affannaati» yee coyi'ri."
Jeremiah44:20 Anino konne coye coyi'rie mannira meya labballi baalaho,"
Jeremiah44:21 «Ki'nenna akaakka'ne, mootoolla'nenna roorrooti'ne, qoleno baatto'nera hee'ranno manni baalu Yihudu katammaranna Yerusaalamete dooggara hixaana giirtinita Kaaliiqi diafino yitineetinso hawinoha laweenna'neeti?"
Jeremiah44:22 Kaaliiqi assitinoonni bunshe baala lae sammi yaa didandiino. Isenkura baatto'ne mannu hee'rannokkita ona ikkitino. Baatto'ne shagaggi'nannitanna su'mi'neno rumonniha ikkinohu kunniraati.
Jeremiah44:23 Tini bao iillitino'nehu wole magannara kakkaltinoonnihuraatinna Kaaliiqi aana sao assitine seerasi, wogasinna wodhosi gibbinoonnihuraati» yoommonsa."
Jeremiah44:24 Qoleno manna baalaho roorenka meentoho, Kaaliiqi Gibitsete hee'rannohura Yihudu manni baalaho yiinore macciishshanno gede, Israeelete Magani Olantote Mootichi Kaaliiqi: «Ki'nenna meenti'ne gordu mootittera kakkalate xano xa'nitinoonni; xano'neno seekkitine agadhitinoonni; maahoyye danchatena heddinoonnire wonshidhe."
Jeremiah44:25 
Jeremiah44:26 Ikkollana ki'ne Gibitsete baattora heedhinanni Israeelooti baalu giddonni ayino, ‹Kaaliiqi halaaleeti› yee su'ma'ya ganannokki gede ani Kaaliiqi jawu su'mi'yanni xaaroommo."
Jeremiah44:27 Kune, ani ki'ne bushu albinni ikkinnina danchummatenni dilaeemmo'ne. Gibitsete baattora heedhinoonniri giddonni mittu nafa gattinikkinni bagadunna hude guddanno'ne."
Jeremiah44:28 Ki'ne giddonni shiimu manni callu gate Gibitsetenni Yihuda higanno. Gibitse ha'ri manni ani yoommoti wo'mitannoronna insati ikkitannoro hakka waro afanno.
Jeremiah44:29 «Ani coyi'roommo coyi wo'minota tenne gobbara heedhineenna qorichisheemmo'ne woyite affinanni.
Jeremiah44:30 Yihudu moote Sedeqiyaasi shaannosi gede diinisira Baabilooni mootera Nabukadanatsoorira sayise uummonte gede, Gibitsete moote Hoofira shitara hassannosirira diinnasira sayise eemmo yiino» yee kuloommonsa."
Jeremiah45:1 Yihudu moote Iyosiyaasi beetti Iyoaaqeemi moohihunni shoolki diro, Baarooki ani kuloommosire maxaafaho borreessi."
Jeremiah45:2 Anino, Israeelete Magani Kaaliiqi,"
Jeremiah45:3 « ‹Baarooki: Kaaliiqi qarri'ya aana dadille ledinoena anera bayisibao! Lowo geeshsha daafuroommo; fooliishshono diafi'roommo› yootto.
Jeremiah45:4 « ‹Ani Kaaliiqi kayinni minoommoha diigeemmo; kaasoommohano buqqiseemmo; baatto baalate aana togoo coye asseemmo.
Jeremiah45:5 Woluwiinni bade atera addire assammohera hasi'rootto? Konne coye agadhitooti; ani mannu baalu aana qarra abbammoraati. Woliri hoogirono marittowa baala reyattokki gede agareemmohe. Konne coye coyi'roommohu ani Kaaliiqaati› yiino yite kulisi» yiinoe.
Jeremiah46:1 Daga baalate daafira Kaaliiqi anera coyi'rinoe.
Jeremiah46:2 Gibitsete daafira: Iyoaaqeemi Yihudaho moohihunni shoolki diro, Baabilooni moote Nabukadanatsoori Gibitsete mooteta Nikau olanto Karkemiishi yinannihu Efiraaxisi Wayi mule hee'ranno katamira qeeli. Kunnira Kaaliiqi Gibitsete olantora:"
Jeremiah46:3 «Wonqo'ne qixxeessidhine, olaho fulle."
Jeremiah46:4 Ki'ne faradaasine! Faradi'nera bixaala qassine, umoho siwiilu gullee wodhitine, darga darga'ne amadde. Bagado'ne gamaxidhine, olu imaanano uddidhe yite kulinsa» yiie."
Jeremiah46:5 Qoleno, «Kune anera kayinni qeelantinanniti leeltanni nooe; waajjitine badhera gugattinanni heedhinoonni; waajjillu doyisse amade noo'ne."
Jeremiah46:6 Ki'ne jawaatootaho; rakkine doddinannireeti. Ikkollana xooqqine difultinoonni; Efiraaxisi Wayi mule qeelantinoonni.
Jeremiah46:7 «Abbayi Wayi dambali gede ka'annotinna, wo'me qacce gudise amadanno wayi gede, ikkitino gosa tini hiittenneeti?"
Jeremiah46:8 Abbayi Wayi dambali gede ka'annotinna, wo'me qacce baala amadanno wayi gedeeti Gibitsete. Tini gosa, ‹Kae baatto baala egemmeemma; katammanna giddo noo manna baala gundeemmo› yitino."
Jeremiah46:9 «Faradu alba hige ha'ranno gede, faradi gaareno waajjinanni garinni doddanno gede hajajje. Itiyophiyunninna Liibiyunni wonqo amaxxe dayino manni, maxxa amaxxe Liidiyunni dayinohu wolqaataamu manni ledo, jawaata olamaano sokke» yaanno."
Jeremiah46:10 Hakku barri, ani Olantote Mootichi Kaaliiqi diina'ya rabbisi'reemmo barraati; bise mundee agge goo'ro fulta geeshsha, lowo manna shakki assitanno. Ani Olantote Mootichi Kaaliiqi, aliyyeenni Efiraaxisi Wayi mule noo manna, kakkalamanno gede asseemmo."
Jeremiah46:11 Seemo beetto lawattati Gibitse, xaggakki kaa'litannori dinoote; hursannoherino dinona, Geleaadi marte buudhinanni xagicho hasi'ri."
Jeremiah46:12 Gosa baala saalakki affino; baatto baalate wi'lakki macciishshinoonni; olantokki insanaawa sarraaqante, mimmito haadhe ubbanno."
Jeremiah46:13 Baabilooni moote Nabukadanatsoori daye Gibitsete bala tugannota Kaaliiqi kulannie,"
Jeremiah46:14 «Gibitsete katammara Migidoolira, Memfiisiranna Xafinaasira, ‹Baalanka bagadu guda'neraatina, umo'ne gargadhate qixxaabbe› yiiyye."
Jeremiah46:15 Worbu magani'ne, woraamu Apiisi mayira uwi? Ani Kaaliiqi xiiwe tugeennaatiwe!"
Jeremiah46:16 Bagadaano'ne sarraaqante, mimmitu aana ubbanni, ‹Ka'e diinu bagadiwiinni xoonqe, gobbanke ha'ne manninke ledo xaandona› yitanno."
Jeremiah46:17 «Hakkiira marte Gibitsete moote Feriooni, ‹Afuu Callu› yite haaro su'ma fushshitannosi."
Jeremiah46:18 Ani Olantote Mootichi Kaaliiqi, mootete; qoleno ani Heeshshote Maganooti. Taaboori Ilaali ilaalla baalate aliidiha ikkinonte gede, Qermeloosi Ilaalino baaraho iimaanni noonte gede, ki'nera aleenni higinohu wolqaataamu daanno."
Jeremiah46:19 Ki'ne Gibitsete gosa, qafadantinaraatina uduunne'ne usudhe; Memfiisi Katamino diigame mulla darga ikkanno."
Jeremiah46:20 Gibitse biiffino adde gedeete; ikkollana aliyyenni daanno torondi qasannose.
Jeremiah46:21 Kiranyootu olantoseno maqallanni hee'noonni middo gedeete; ikkollana badhe higge xooqqanno. Yoonnihunna baote barri iillinonsa daafira, uurrite olama didandiitanno."
Jeremiah46:22 Diinu olanto wolqissanni hadhu bikkinni, Gibitse xooqanni noo hamashshi gede xiixxanno. Dubbo dollannihu gede, meesane adhite daggannonsa."
Jeremiah46:23 Diininsa kiirre dandiinannikkiha, kanchafaru gede bati'rinoha ikkino daafira, ulma dubbo ikkiturono, dolte shakki assitannonsa. Konne coye coyi'roommohu ani Kaaliiqaati."
Jeremiah46:24 Gibitsete gobba aliyye manni qeeleenna saalfattanno; konne coye coyi'roommohu ani Kaaliiqaati» yaanno.
Jeremiah46:25 Israeelete Magani Olantote Mootichi Kaaliiqi, «Ani Tebisiha kaphu magano Amooninna, woloota Gibitsete maganna, mootensanna roorrootansa hexxitannore baala, qorichisheemmo."
Jeremiah46:26 Shitansara hasidhannorira Baabilooni moote Nabukadanatsooriranna olantosira sayise eemmo; ikkollana gedensaanni Gibitsete baatto mannu hee'rannota ikkitanno. Konne coye coyi'roommohu ani Kaaliiqaati» yii.
Jeremiah46:27 «Borojjichi'ya Yaiqoobi ooso waajjitinoonte; Israeelete manna massinoonte; qafadantinoonniwiinni fafo gobbanni gatise fushsheemmo'ne. Hakkunni gedensaanni waajjishanno'neri nookkiha, keere heedhinanni."
Jeremiah46:28 Soqqamaano'ya Israeele, ani ledo'ne noommona waajjitinoonte. Giddonsa billaallisummo'ne gosa baala huneemmo; ki'ne higginara yee taalo qoricha eemmo'ne; kayinnilla co'o asse digudeemmo'ne. Konne coye coyi'roommohu ani Kaaliiqaati» yii."
Jeremiah47:1 Gibitsete moote Gaazaho bala tugara albaanni Filisxeemootu daafira Kaaliiqi,"
Jeremiah47:2 «Kune wayi aliyyenni kae, wo'me dayinohu gede ikke lolahanno; baattonna aanase noore baala, katammanna giddonsa noo manna baala egemmanno. Mannu baalu kaa'lote raaranno; baattote aana noohu baalu hururame wi'lanno."
Jeremiah47:3 Gulunfanni faradi hirbi, lami-qalete luulinna, faradi gaarete gugatto masisseenna wolqansa ba'ino daafira, annuwa oosonsa nafa caaqqi yite dila'anno."
Jeremiah47:4 Kuni ikkannohuno, Filisxeeme ba'annoti yanna daggino daafiraati. Reyotenni gatte Xiroosinna Sidoona kaa'litannori baalu, murantanno yanna iillitino. Ani Kaaliiqi, Kereeti Giddichonni dagginore, Filisxeemete ga're baala gudeemmo."
Jeremiah47:5 Gaazu manni manchite umo meexxanno; Asiqeloona mannino beeshshi're sammi yaanno. Gattino Filisxeemooti, bisonsa huduuxxitanni manchittannohu mamooti geeshshaati?"
Jeremiah47:6 ‹Kaaliiqi bise! Murmuratenni fooliishshi'rattahu mamooteeti? Eeggakkiitina koikki giddora higge fooliishshi'ri› yitinanni raartinanni.
Jeremiah47:7 Ani Asiqeloonahonna baaru gama, hee'ranno manna guddanno gede hajajoommona, ani yoommore wonshitukkinni hiitto ikkite higganno?» yee kulinoe."
Jeremiah48:1 Moaabi daafira Israeelete Magani Olantote Mootichi Kaaliiqi, «Katami'ne ba""anno daafira, Nebo Katamira heedhinanni mannira ki'nera aanne'e! Qiriyatayimi diinu angara eanno; jawaata qiisho'neno diigantanno; manni'neno saalaho uwanno."
Jeremiah48:2 Moaabi ayirrinyi baanno; Hasebooni Katama diinu amade, ‹Amme layinkita su'minsa ka""annokki gede assinona› yaanno. Diinu gaadanno'ne woyite, ki'ne Madimeeni manni beeshshidhine sammi yitinanni."
Jeremiah48:3 Horonayimi manni, ‹Baonna goofo iillitunke› yee raaranno."
Jeremiah48:4 Ki'ne Moaabi manna diinu gudanno; ooso'neno raartanna macciishshitinanni.
Jeremiah48:5 Luhiiti Katama raartanni fultanno; Horonayimi eelallitte dirritanno woyite, goofotenni kainohunni dadillite urtanno."
Jeremiah48:6 Mimmitinsara, ‹Lubbo'ne gatisi'rate, gobba harre gede ikkitine xooqqe› yitanno."
Jeremiah48:7 Moaabi manna, ki'ne wolqa'nenna jiro'ne hexxitinoonni; xa kayinni ki'ne umi'ne qafadantinanni. Kamooshi yinannihu magani'ne, roorrooti'nenna qeesooti'ne ledo qafadamanno."
Jeremiah48:8 Ani coyi'roommonte gede, katamma'ne hunannohu daanno; mittu katamino digatanno; lagichanna taalo gobba co'o asse hunanno. Konne coye coyi'roommohu ani Kaaliiqaati."
Jeremiah48:9 Molo baatto ikkitanno gede, Moaabira aanaho maxine fince; katammansano mannu hee'rannokkita ona ikkitanno» yii."
Jeremiah48:10 Kaaliiqi looso lashshi assannohu rumaminoha ikko; bisesi mundeetewiinni hoolannohu rumaminoha ikko.
Jeremiah48:11 Kaaliiqi, «Mittu uduunnichinni woleho galchinikkinni, coommilliseno soorramikkinni ofolte heedhanno xajje woyinennite gede, Moaabi gosano hundinni kayisse techo geeshsha wodahantukkinni heedhino; qafadanteno diegentino."
Jeremiah48:12 «Xa kayinni kune woyinete xajje wolu uduunnichira galchine uduunnicho hiiqqine hunnannihu gede, ani Moaabi gosa wolewa qole galche gobba diigge huntannore soyemmo yanna daggino."
Jeremiah48:13 Beeteli Israeele irraawisinte gede, Kamooshino Moaabi gosa irraawisanno."
Jeremiah48:14 «Ki'ne Moaabi gosa, ‹Ninke bagadaasinete; olahono fullankoommoreeti› yitine mayira adawadhitinanni?"
Jeremiah48:15 Moaabinna katammansa diigantanno; aju mannino gorramanno; Olantote Mootichi Kaaliiqi, ani Moote konne coyi'roommo."
Jeremiah48:16 Moaabira bao iillitino; diigamanno barrino rahino.
Jeremiah48:17 Maccaha ikkasi egentinoonniri, qarqarisira heedhinanni gosa baala, ‹Gashshootikki wolqa ayirrado, hiitto ikkite hiiqqantu?› yitinanni wi'lesi."
Jeremiah48:18 Qiishosi baala diigantanno gede assinohunna, Moaabi hunannohu konniicho noona, Dibooni Katamira heedhinanniri baalu, dirritine uulla bukote aana ofolle."
Jeremiah48:19 Aroeeri katamira heedhinanniri, doogote uurritine la'e; xooqanni noo mannanna, fule ba""anni noo meento xa'mitine ikkanni noore buuxxe."
Jeremiah48:20 Moaabi baatto diigante shollinyeho ubbino daafira, diddine wi'le; Moaabi gobba diigantinota Arnooni Wayiwa lallabbe."
Jeremiah48:21 Alichichu Arnooni Lagichira aliyyeenni noo gobba Hoolooni, Yahisanna Mefa""aati Kaaliiqi hanqe qorichisharaati."
Jeremiah48:22 Dibooni, Nebonna Beeti Dibilatayimi,"
Jeremiah48:23 Qiriyatayimi, Beeti Gamuuli, Beeti Meooni,"
Jeremiah48:24 Qiriyotinna Bootsira yinannita mulenna xeertote noota Moaabi katamma Kaaliiqi hanqe qorichishanno.
Jeremiah48:25 Moaabi wolqa hiiqqantino; dhukisino baino. Konne coye coyi'roommohu ani Kaaliiqaati» yii.
Jeremiah48:26 Kaaliiqi, «Moaabi gosa ane aana naaxxitinona, hayikkissine dimbisse; tufinsa aana gongo'mitanna mannu oso'lonsana."
Jeremiah48:27 Israeele moorunni diamadantino; ki'ne kayinni mooraanchimmate kiirtinoonninsa. Oso'linannite gede assitine kiirtine coyidhinanni kiironni umo'ne shaffinanni.
Jeremiah48:28 «Ki'ne Moaabi gobbara heedhinanni manni, katamma'ne agurtine fultine mine boonu gama mi'nitino ceicho gede ikkitine kinchu qarra suuqamme."
Jeremiah48:29 Moaabi gosa boo'nitinota, naaxxitinota, xelleqqissinotanna fenjeejjitinota afoommo."
Jeremiah48:30 Haxawarrimmansa afoommona, haafalla boo'nitino."
Jeremiah48:31 Kunnira, Moaabi manniranna Qiirihereesi manni baalunkura wi'leemmo."
Jeremiah48:32 Sibima Katami manna, sinnase Reyote Baara sa'e Yaizeeri Katami geeshsha iillitino haqqicho woyinennite gede hala'litinoonni. Kayinnilla, Yaizeeri manni woyinete laalonsa diinu huneenna wi'lannonte gede, ba'inanni heedhinoonni daafira anino ki'nera wi'leemmo."
Jeremiah48:33 Shaqqado Moaabi gobbanni hagiirrunna hisanyootu baino; woyinete xajje huuncinanni darga mooshsheemmo; woyinete xajjeno hagiirrunni kukkubbanni huuncannohu dihee'ranno; hagiirru huurono diheedhanno.
Jeremiah48:34 «Hasebooninna Eliaale manni qoonqonsa naggi asse raaranno. Raarensa Yahaatsi Katami geeshsha iillitanno; Zooaarinni Horonayimi Egilaati-Shilishiya geeshsha iillitanno; Nimiriimi Xashshi nafa moolanno.
Jeremiah48:35 Moaabi gobbara gaarrate aana kakkaltannokki gedenna magannansarano hixaana giirtannokki gede hooleemmo. Konne coye coyi'roommohu ani Kaaliiqaati.
Jeremiah48:36 «Suusulle ufuunfanni wi'linannihu gede Moaabira hururame wi'leemmo; afidhinori baalu goofinonsa daafira, Qiirihereesi mannira manchiteemmo."
Jeremiah48:37 Ereeda mudhite, umono meexxite, anga bicidhe xiddu uddanono uddidhino."
Jeremiah48:38 Moaabi hasi'nannikki uduunni gede asse hiiqqaqqoommo daafira minnanna gudumaalla wi'la callate.
Jeremiah48:39 Moaabi gosa hiiqqantino! Saalfatte alba shawwu yitino gara la'e! Afihu baalu qacifatannore ikkitanno. Konne coye coyi'roommohu ani Kaaliiqaati» yii.
Jeremiah48:40 Kaaliiqi, «Qoola fane eela hige buuwanno allamurchi gede Moaabi aana doyanno diini daanno."
Jeremiah48:41 Katammanna qiisho baala amadantanno; hatte yannara Moaabi olanto game amaddino mancho gede ikkitanno.
Jeremiah48:42 Moaabi gosa ane aana naaxxitino daafira diigantanno; layinkimeeshsho gosate gede dikiirantanno.
Jeremiah48:43 Moaabi gosa, ki'ne waajjillu, ubbinanni balenna amaddanno woshshaado agarte noo'ne. Konne coye coyi'roommohu ani Kaaliiqaati."
Jeremiah48:44 Moaabi huneemmo barri daanni noona, waajje xooqannohu balete uwanno; balete giddonni fule xooqannoha woshshaado amaddanno."
Jeremiah48:45 Xooqqanni daafurtinori Hasebooni caa'litara hasidhanno. Hasebooni Katami kayinni giiramanno; giirano hakkiinni fulte Moaabita gaaraame gobba ittanno.
Jeremiah48:46 Moaabi gosa, ki'nera aanne'e! Kamooshi maganira kumbuultannori baalu gooffino; oosonsa seennunna labballu qafadantanno."
Jeremiah48:47 Ikkollana Moaabira adhinoonnisire baala qoleemmo yanna dagganno. Moaabi daafira kuloommo himani konneeti. Konne coye coyi'roommohuno ani Kaaliiqaati» yii.
Jeremiah49:1 Amooni gosara Kaaliiqi, «Israeelete ragidhanno ooso dinoni? Molooki magani, Gaadi ga're giddonni fushshe hoole, Amoonootu amaddanno gede mayira assiyya?"
Jeremiah49:2 Ani Kaaliiqi yeemmota macciishshe: Kune Amooni gosa dannawu Katamira Raaba, olu luulo macciishshitanno gede asseemmo yanna dagganno. Katamu diigameenna gaangaawinsara noo qachi giiramanno; hakkunni gedensaanni Israeele adhantinota baattonsa qo'litanno."
Jeremiah49:3 Katami'ne diigamanno daafira, Hasebooni heedhinanni manni wi'le; Gayi katamino diigamanno. Molooki magani'ne, qeesooti'nenna roorrooti'ne ledo qafadamaraatina, ki'ne meentu garu baeenna'ne raataabbinanni wi'le; xiddu uddano uddidhine manchitte."
Jeremiah49:4 Ki'ne ammanama noo'nekki gosa, lagicha'ne mayira addaxxitinanni? Laashshannoha lagicha'ne mayira hexxitinanni? Qiniite'ne ku'litinanni, ‹Ayi kisannonke?› yitinoonni."
Jeremiah49:5 Kune ragu baalunkunni waajjille abbammo'neraati; baalunku lubbosi adhe xooqanno daafira, billaallino manna gamba assannohu dihee'ranno."
Jeremiah49:6 Ikkollana wole yannara, Amooni gosa galagalche duroonseemmo. Konne coye coyi'roommohu ani Kaaliiqaati» yii."
Jeremiah49:7 Edoomi gosa daafira Olantote Mootichi Kaaliiqi, «Edoomi gosara albi egenno ba'unsani? Amaalaasinensa mala aa hooggunsani? Egennonsa hiikka higgu?"
Jeremiah49:8 Eesawu sircho gudeemmo yanna iillitinona, ki'ne Dedaani Katami manni, xooqqine ba'ine, godu giddo maaxamme."
Jeremiah49:9 Mannu woyinete laalo xinqi'ranno woyite, aanaho xaro gatisanno; hashsha e'ino mooraanono hasidhino geeshsha calla adhite hadhanno."
Jeremiah49:10 Ani kayinni ki'ne Eesawu sircho co'o asse mulqeemmo; maaxantinanni darga baala reqecci asseemmo; ki'ne, ooso'ne, fiixi'nenna oollii'neno gooffinanni."
Jeremiah49:11 Giddo'ne noore annanna ama afidhinokki ooso anera agurre; galte afi'rinokki meentino ane hexxona.
Jeremiah49:12 Qorichu malinokkiri aneha hanqu finiincho cingiishshidhannoha ikkiro, ki'ne qorichishantinikkinni gattinanniha lawanno'neni? Horonta gattinanni gari dino; ki'neno hanqu finiincho cingiishshidhinanni."
Jeremiah49:13 ‹Bootsira Katami diigame mulla darga, masillunniha, qacifantannihanna rumonniha ikkanno› yee ani su'mi'yanni xaaroommo. Qooxeessisira noo katamma baalano diigante gattanno» yii."
Jeremiah49:14 Ani Ermiyaasi Kaaliiqi ki'ne Edoomi manni daafira, «Olantonsa gamba assidhe ki'ne qassanno gede, kulannonsa sokkaancho dagate soommo."
Jeremiah49:15 Mannu baalu mishanno'ne gede, dagate mereero maa'ne, mannahono woriidire asseemmo'ne."
Jeremiah49:16 Ki'ne kinnaamu boonira heedhinanniri, ilaalu birxe geeshsha iillitinoonniri, waajjishiishshi'nenna wodani'ne boo'na doggino'ne. Allamurchu gede mine ilaalu aana mi'nitinirono, hakkiichinni dirriseemmo'ne. Konne coye coyi'roommohu ani Kaaliiqaati» yee coyi'ranna macciishshoommo."
Jeremiah49:17 Kaaliiqi qole, «Iillitino'ne bao lae, hakkaanni hige sa""annohu baalu bararraaqanno."
Jeremiah49:18 Soddoomunna Gomooru qooxeessinsara noo katamma ledo, diigantu wari gedee bao, ki'ne Edoomi manni aanano dagganno. Gobba'nera layinkimeeshsho mannu dihee'ranno. Konne coye coyi'roommohu ani Kaaliiqaati."
Jeremiah49:19 Yordaanoosi mule noo dubbi giddonni fule, daffitino kalo giddora eanno doobbiichi gede ikke, hedeweelcho daye Edoomoota shorre, hasi'roommoha shoomeemmo. Hoolannoehu ane gedeehu ayeti? Ittisannoe gashshaanchino hiikkonneeti?"
Jeremiah49:20 Kunnira, ani Kaaliiqi Edoomi manniranna Temaani Katamira heedhannorira hedoommore macciishshe; ooso'ne nafa goshoonshe haa'ne ha'nanni; la""annohu baalu bararraaqanno."
Jeremiah49:21 Ubbinanna macciishshinanni luulinni kainohunni, baatto shafantanno; luuluno hakkiinni sae Duumu Baari geeshsha leellanno."
Jeremiah49:22 Allamurchu qoola fane eela buuwannohu gede, diinu Bootsira gawajjara qoqqobbisanno. Hatte yannara ki'ne Edoomi olanto wodani, game amaddino mancho wodani gedeeha ikkanno» yii."
Jeremiah49:23 Kaaliiqi Demaasiqote Katami daafira: «Hamaatinna Arfaadi katamma manni, Demaasiqonniha busha duduwo macciishshanno woyite, wodaninsa dambalu shafino baari gede ikke hembeelamanno."
Jeremiah49:24 Demaasiqote mannira wolqa ba'anno; waajjite xooqqara ka'anno; gamaa'mitanni noo mancho gede, qarrunna shetto amaddannonsa."
Jeremiah49:25 Hakku maccahunna hagiirraamu katami, hee'ranno manni hoogeenna ona ikke gatanno."
Jeremiah49:26 Hakka waro Demaasiqote wedelli reeshshi dooggate waxaaxanno; olantosino gooffanno.
Jeremiah49:27 Demaasiqote huxxira giira qaseemmo; Benihadaadiha mootete mine giira ittanno. Konne coye coyi'roommohu ani Olantote Mootichi Kaaliiqaati» yii.
Jeremiah49:28 Kaaliiqi Baabilooni moote Nabukadanatsoori anga galtinorira Qeedaari ga'reranna Hatsoori gobbara, «Ka'ne Qeedaari ga'rera gaaddine, soojjaati manna gudde."
Jeremiah49:29 Dukkannansanna saadansa baala adhe; dukkonsanna uduunnensa baala adhe; gaallansano adhitine, ‹Kune mogga gaangeessite noo'ne› yitine kullensa."
Jeremiah49:30 Ki'ne Hatsoori manna, Baabilooni moote Nabukadanatsoori, ki'nera busha gano ganinona, xeerto gobba hadhine godu giddo maaxantinanni gede, ani Kaaliiqi kuleemmo'ne."
Jeremiah49:31 Ani Kaaliiqi Baabilooni mootera, ‹Daggine huxxu, cufannanna waawanna nookkiha fano heedhenni, bashshi assitukkinni hawaqidhe noo gosara bala tugi› yee kuloommosi."
Jeremiah49:32 ‹Gaallansanna saadansa adhe; umo qooxidhannore baala billaalliseemmo; ragu baalunkunni qarra abbeemmonsa› yee kuloommosi.
Jeremiah49:33 Kunnira, Hatsoori yeedaala heedhannowa ona gobba ikke gatanno; layinkimeeshsho hakkiichira heleqqi yaanno manni dihee'ranno. Konne coye coyi'roommohu ani Kaaliiqaati» yii."
Jeremiah49:34 Yihudu moote Sedeqiyaasi moohanni hee'reennanni, Kaaliiqi Elaami gobba daafira,"
Jeremiah49:35 «Ani Elaami wolqaataame assitinota bagadaano'ne sheemmo.
Jeremiah49:36 Elaamira shoolente maddenni bubbe kayiseemmo; mannano base baalate billaalliseemmo; insa iillitannokki dargino dihee'ranno.
Jeremiah49:37 Elaami manna shaara hasanni noo diini, waajjishiishanno gede asseemmo; lowo hanqi'yanni co'o yite gooffa geeshsha, bagado soye shorreemmonsa."
Jeremiah49:38 Mootensanna gashshaanonsa hune, ayirrado barcima'ya hakko wodheemmo."
Jeremiah49:39 Ikkollana, mitto barra dargansa qoleemmonsa. Konne coye coyi'roommohu ani Kaaliiqaati» yii."
Jeremiah50:1 Kaaliiqi Baabilooni gobbaranna giddo hee'ranno manni baalunkura kuleemmo gede ane Ermiyaasira,"
Jeremiah50:2 «Daga baalate duduwo kulle; ge'recho qassine lallabbe. Mittoreno gatissinikkinni, ‹Kune Baabilooni amadamaraati; maganinsa Marduki hiiqqamaraati; tiyyi'nanniti misillansano cancanantaraati."
Jeremiah50:3 Bala tugge Baabilooni mulla darga assitanno gosa, aliyyeenni ka'ino; saadano mannuno fule xooqanno; mitturino giddo digatanno› yiino yite kulinsa» yiie."
Jeremiah50:4 Kaaliiqi, «Hatte yannara, Israeelennihunna Yihudu manni gamba yee wi'lanni, ane Maganonsa hasi'ranni daanno."
Jeremiah50:5 Tsiyooni massitanno doogo xa'mitanni, hattenne doogo amadde hadhanno; ‹Layinkita didiingeemmo› yitanni, ane ledo hegere gondooro e'anno."
Jeremiah50:6 «Manni'ya ballehino ge'reewi gede ikkino; allaalaasinensa doogote aaninni soorriteenna, ilaallatenna gaarrate aana raataabbanni, fooliishshidhannowa hooggino."
Jeremiah50:7 Afihu baalu bala tuginonsa; diininsano, ‹Assitino cubbilla amadinonsana, ninke assinoommonsari dino. Halaalaanchu qanchinsara, akaakkansa hexxite heedhino Maganira, badhe wodhitino daafiraati› yaanno."
Jeremiah50:8 Ki'ne Israeele, Baabilooni gobbanni xooqqine fulle! Gobba agurtine hadhe! Wole balaxxine ki'ne fulle!"
Jeremiah50:9 Aliyyeenni heedhanno gosa, Baabiloonira gaaddanno gede asseemmo; dagge amaddanno; insano olte disodhannoreeti."
Jeremiah50:10 Baabilooni gobba mulqantanno; mulqidhannorino illensanni leellinore baala, hasidhu geeshsha adhitanno. Konne coye coyi'roommohu ani Kaaliiqaati» yii."
Jeremiah50:11 Kaaliiqi, «Ki'ne Baabilooni gosa! Manna'ya mulqidhine hagiidhitinanni kukkubbitinoonni; kalote giddo burraaqqanno adde gede ikkitinoonni; misino farashshi gede himimmissinoonni."
Jeremiah50:12 Ikkirono ayirradu katami'ne saalfatanno; gobba ama'ne shollitanno; gashshootu baalunkura woriidita ikkitanno; wayi hee'rannokkita moola ikkitanno.
Jeremiah50:13 Hanqi'yanni kainohunni Baabilooni gobbara mittuno dihee'ranno; diigame gatanno; mulesiinni saannohu baalu mase bararraaqanno.
Jeremiah50:14 «Ki'ne digaanunni olantinanni bagadaasine, Baabilooni qasate doyissitine amadde; ane Kaaliiqi aana sao assitino daafira, mittono gatissinikkinni maxxa baala, Baabilooni aana giggishshe."
Jeremiah50:15 Katamu qooxeessira alaakke; kune Baabilooni anga uyino; huxxisi baalu diigamino. Ani Baabilooni rabbisanni noommo daafira, ki'neno rabbisidhe; insano woloota assitu gede asse."
Jeremiah50:16 Baabilooni gobbara gide wixi'rannohunna, wixi'rinoha mixxannohuno hee'rannokki gede asse. Hatte gobbara hee'rannohu wole gobba manni, bagadaasine waajje gobbasi hige xooqanno» yii."
Jeremiah50:17 Kaaliiqi, «Israeelete manni doobbiyu shorre billaallisino ge'reewi gede ikkino; balaxe Asoori moote gawajjinonsa. Hakkunni gedensaanni, Baabilooni moote miqichonsa quruuxino."
Jeremiah50:18 Kunnira, ani Israeelete Magani Olantote Mootichi Kaaliiqi, Asoori moote qorichishummonte gede, Baabilooni mootenna gobbasi qorichisheemmo."
Jeremiah50:19 Israeelete manna qanchinsa giddora qoleemmo; Qermeloosi Ilaaliranna Baasaani gobbara fulinore baala itanno; Efireeminna Geleaadi gobbara fulanno gide hasi'ri geeshsha itanno.
Jeremiah50:20 Hatte yannara, reyotenni gatisoommoha, Israeelennihanna Yihudu manna maareemmo daafira, giddonsa cubbonna sao hanse dianfanni. Konne coye coyi'roommohu ani Kaaliiqaati» yii."
Jeremiah50:21 Kaaliiqi, «Miratayiminna Feqoodi gosa aana bala tugge; shitine gudde. Ani yeemmo'nere baala asse. Konne coye coyi'roommohu ani Kaaliiqaati."
Jeremiah50:22 Baattote aana olu luulo macciishshinanni; lowo bao iillitanno.
Jeremiah50:23 Baattote aana noo manna baala, meenchu gede asse cancanino Baabilooni, xa kayinni umisi cancanamanno. Insa aana ikkanno coyi bararraanqanniho."
Jeremiah50:24 Baabilooni! Ane Kaaliiqi ledo gaarantinoonni daafira, hedeweelcho woroommo woshshaado giddora e'inoonni."
Jeremiah50:25 Ani Olantote Mootichi Kaaliiqi, Baabilooni gobbara looseemmo loosi nooe daafira, olu uduunne duunnanni mine fane, hanqu bagado fushshoommo."
Jeremiah50:26 Ki'ne Baabilooni diinna, ragu baalunkunni daggine qasse; gide duu'nitino gootarra baala fanne. Adhitinoonnireno gidu gede assitine duunne; mittoreno gatissinikkinni shakki assitine gudde."
Jeremiah50:27 Qorichinshanninsa yanna iillitinona, Baabilooni wedella, woraamma gorrinannihu gede assitine gorre."
Jeremiah50:28 Baabilooni olanto Qullaawa Mine'ya diiggino; ikkollana ani rabbisi'reemmo. Hakkunni gedensaanni qafadotenni higgannori, ani Kaaliiqi assoommore Tsiyooni dudubbanno» yii."
Jeremiah50:29 Kaaliiqi, «Digaana bedeeda egentino bagadaano, Baabiloonira gaaddanno gede woshshe. Ane Kaaliiqi Israeelete qullaawi ledo gaarantino daafira, mittuno gate fulannokki gede gaangeessitona. Bushu loosinsa daafira qorichansa uuyyensa; wole beebba assitunte gede, insano hatto asse."
Jeremiah50:30 Kunni daafira, wedellansa dooggate aana shinanni; olantonsa baala hakko barra gooffanno. Konne coye coyi'roommohu ani Kaaliiqaati."
Jeremiah50:31 «Ki'ne boonaleeyye, ani Olantote Mootichi Kaaliiqi ki'ne aana noommo; qorichisheemmo'ne yannano iillitino."
Jeremiah50:32 Ki'ne boonaleeyye gosa, sarraaqantine ubbinanni; irkise gotti assanno'nehuno dihee'ranno. Katami'nera giira qaseemmo; qooxeessaho noori baalu giirame goofanno» yii."
Jeremiah50:33 Olantote Mootichi Kaaliiqi, «Israeelennihunna Yihudu manni gadadamino. Qafadde haadhe hadhinonsari, fultannokki gede agare wortinonsa."
Jeremiah50:34 Wodeemmonsahu ani Olantote Mootichi Kaaliiqi jawaataho; ani umi'ya insara golame, gobbansara keere dirriseemmo. Baabilooni heedhannori kayinni fooliishsho diafidhanno."
Jeremiah50:35 «Reyo Baabilooni mannira! Reyo gashshaanonsara! Reyo masaalaasinensara!
Jeremiah50:36 Reyo gowwootaho, kaphaano himanaanonsara! Reyo waajjite huxidhannorira bagadaanonsara!"
Jeremiah50:37 Goofo faradinsaranna faradi gaarensara! Reyo shashootaho, kiranyootu olantonsara! Goofo saammannitera jironsara!"
Jeremiah50:38 Moolleno gobbansara ikkito; wayibbansano gooffo. Gobbansara tiyyi'nanni maganna wo'mite, insano gowwoota assitinonsa."
Jeremiah50:39 Baabilooni gobbara durriisu, gotunna awulo calla heedhanno; mannu layinkimeeshsho hakkiicho dihee'ranno."
Jeremiah50:40 Soddoomanna Gomoora, qooxeessinsara noo katamma ledo diigummonte gede, Baabiloonino hatto asseemmo. Hakkiicho layinkimeeshsho mannu dihee'ranno. Konne coye coyi'roommohu ani Kaaliiqaati» yii."
Jeremiah50:41 Kaaliiqi qole, «Aliyye ragira qoltine la'e; kune fafo gobbara, wolqaataame daga olaho qixxaabbanni no."
Jeremiah50:42 Insa digaananna urde amaxxitinoreeti; kaajjaddahonna marartannokkireeti; faradinsa hirbi dambalu gedeeho. Baabilooni, kune insa ate qassara dagganni no."
Jeremiah50:43 Baabilooni moote konne duduwo macciishshanno woyite, wolqasi daaqqanno; waajjillu amadeenna gamaa'mitanni noo mancho gede ikkanno."
Jeremiah50:44 «Yordaanoosi mule noo dubbi giddonni fule, kalloonni hayisso giddora eanno doobbiichi gede ikke, hedeweelcho daye Baabiloonoota shorre, hasi'roommoha shoomeemmo. Hoolannoehu ayeti? Ane gedeehu nooni? Ittisannoe gashshaanchino hiikkonneeti?"
Jeremiah50:45 Kunnira, ani Kaaliiqi Baabilooni Kataminna, giddo heedhinanni manni ani hedoommore macciishshe; ooso'ne nafa goshoonshe haa'ne ha'nanni; la""annohu baalu bararraaqanno."
Jeremiah50:46 Ubbinanna macciishshinanni luulinni kainohunni, baatto shafantanno; luuluno hakkiinni sae wole gobbara leellanno» yii."
Jeremiah51:1 Kaaliiqi, «Baabilooninna mannasi, fiite huntannota wolqaataame bubbe kayiseemmo."
Jeremiah51:2 Gidu gede woowansitannorenna baattonsa huntannore, wole gobba manna soyemmo. Ba'inanni barri daanno woyite, insano ragu ragunkunni bala tugge baatto mulla gatissanno."
Jeremiah51:3 Gaaddonsa digaana bedeeddaranna, siwiilu uddano uddidhara yanna uyitinoontensa; wedellansano marartinoonte; olantonsa baala shakki asse."
Jeremiah51:4 Madidhe katammansa dooggara ubbe reyitanno.
Jeremiah51:5 Ani Olantote Mootichi Kaaliiqi, Israeelete qullaawi aana saonsa batidhuro nafa, Israeelenna Yihuda diaguroommo."
Jeremiah51:6 Lubbo'ne gatisi'rate Baabilooninni fultine xooqqe; insa loossino cubbinni ki'ne beebba gooffinoonte. Ani insara malino qoricha eemmo yanna daggino.
Jeremiah51:7 Gosa baala dagge agganno gede, Baabilooni, culku finiinchooti; isira hanqi'yata woyinete xajje wonshoommo; daga baala woyinete xajje agge wodana sa'u."
Jeremiah51:8 Baabilooni hedeweelcho uwe cancanaminona wi'lesi; miteekke hursannosiha ikkiro, madasera buurranni xagicho hasse."
Jeremiah51:9 Hakko hee'rannohu wole gobba manni, ‹Ninke hursate wo'naalloommo. Ikkollana dihurino; Kaaliiqi lowo hanqinni co'o asse hunasira murci're kainona, agurre gobbanke ha'no› yaanno» yii."
Jeremiah51:10 Israeelete manni mimmitoho, «Kaaliiqi ninkera halaale fushshinonkena, amme Yerusaalame ha'ne, Maganinke Kaaliiqi assinore baala dudumbona» yii."
Jeremiah51:11 Kaaliiqi Qullaawu Minisi daafira rabbisi'rate yee, Baabilooni huntanno gede Medooni mootoolla kayisino. Kunni daafira, maxxa'ne quxidhe; wonqo'ne amaxxe."
Jeremiah51:12 Baabilooni huxxa diigate malaatisse; seekkitine agarre. Qotannohano worre; gaa'le agarannoha qixxeesse. Konne coye assitinannihu, Kaaliiqi Baabilooni mannira hedinore wonshateeti."
Jeremiah51:13 Ati jajjabbu wayi mule hee'rattohu, dureessu Baabilooni! Goofimarchikki dayino; qocci yite ta""atto yanna daggino."
Jeremiah51:14 Ani Olantote Mootichi Kaaliiqi, «Kanchafaru gede kiiro batidhino olanto soyemmo. Hatti olantono ate qeelte qeexaa'litanno» yee su'mi'yanni xaaroommo."
Jeremiah51:15 Kaaliiqa ati, wolqakkinni baatto kalaqootto; egennokkinni kalqe xintootto; afakkinni gordo diriirsootto."
Jeremiah51:16 Ati hajajatto yannara gordoho noo wayibba luultanno; baattote qaccennino gomicho gamba assite abbatto; xeenu yannarano banqo beleqqanno gede assatto; bubbeno maaxoottowiinni fushshatto.
Jeremiah51:17 Kaphu maganna seekkidhannori, gowwootahonna balalootaho. Tini kaphunniti magannansa, lubbo afidhinokki daafira, insa seekkidhuri saalfattanno."
Jeremiah51:18 Tini maganna mullare ikkitino daafira, minshe hunnanni; ati Kaaliiqi qorichishattonsara daatto yannara ba'anno."
Jeremiah51:19 Ati baalankare kalaqoottohu, Israeelete Magani kayinni, insa gedeeha di""ikkootto. Israeelete manna umikki manna assidhe doodhootto; su'mikkino Olantote Mootichaati."
Jeremiah51:20 Kaaliiqi, «Baabilooni, ati anera, meencho'yaatinna bagado'yaati; atenni daga gudoommo."
Jeremiah51:21 Faradonna faradaasine, faradi gaarenna guluffannore atenni runkutoommo."
Jeremiah51:22 Atenni meya labbaaha, ajanna akkala, oosonna seenne cancanoommo."
Jeremiah51:23 Allaalaasinenna hoshsha, hawuudhannohanna hawuurranni handa, mootoollanna gashshaano atenni hiiqqaqqoommo» yaanno."
Jeremiah51:24 Kaaliiqi, «Baabilooninna mannisi Yerusaalamete aana assitino bunshera, ki'ne la'inanna rabbisi'reemmo» yii."
Jeremiah51:25 Qoleno Kaaliiqi Baabilooni gosara, «Ki'ne gobba baala huntinoonniri, ilaalu gede to'ine manna guddinoonniri Baabilooni gosa, anino ki'ne hatto asse gudeemmo. Buluushshe mulla darga asseemmo'ne."
Jeremiah51:26 Diigamittohu gedensaanni, dhaawate woy safote ikkanno kinchi digatannohe; atino hegerera mulla darga ikkatto. Konne coye coyi'roommohu ani Kaaliiqaati» yii."
Jeremiah51:27 «Ki'ne gosa baala, bala tugate malaatisse; xurumba ufuuffe; Baabilooni qasanno manna qixxeesse. Araaraati, Mininna Ashikenaazi gashshaano, bala tugganno gede kullensa; gaadaannuwano doorre. Kanchafaru gede kiiro bati'rino farado haadhine abbe."
Jeremiah51:28 Baabilooni qasanno manna qixxeesse; Medooni mootoollawa, gashshaanonniwanna olu hajajaanowa, qoleno insa gashshitino gobbara noo olanto baalate manna sokke."
Jeremiah51:29 Baabilooni mitturino hee'rannokkiha ona ikkanno gede, Kaaliiqi hedino coye wonshanno daafira, baatto qece yite huxidhanno."
Jeremiah51:30 Katammansa cufannanna waawanna hiiqqaqqantino daafiranna, minnansa giirantino daafira, Baabilooni bagadaano ola uurrissanno; bareende ba'eennansa shashoota ikkitanno."
Jeremiah51:31 Baabilooni Katami raga baala diigaminota, mootete kultara sokkaano hoode hoodete doddanni dagganno."
Jeremiah51:32 Diinu olanto waa fulte dagge qiishote giira qassanno; Baabilooni gaaddono waajjite huxidhanno» yii.
Jeremiah51:33 Israeelete Magani Olantote Mootichi Kaaliiqi, «Ayiddummete aana gannanni gide, mannunna saada kakkaddannohu gede, Baabiloonino diinu hatto asse sibbiiqanno. Gannanni gidi gede, gamba assinannisi barri rahe daanno."
Jeremiah51:34 Baabilooni moote Nabukadanatsoori, Yerusaalame murmure itino; Katama mullichu gambayichi gedeeha assino. Moyichu gede asse egemmino; hasi'rino geeshsha adhe, gatinore hune agurino."
Jeremiah51:35 Tsiyooni manni, ‹Ninkera iillitino beebba, Baabiloonira iillito!› yaanno. Yerusaalamete mannino, ‹Ninke mundee duntu gede, insano hatte beebba amaddonsa!› yaanno» yii."
Jeremiah51:36 Kaaliiqi Yerusaalamete mannira, «Ki'nera ani ha'leemmo'ne; Baabiloonootano rabbiseemmo'ne; bu'ansanna waansa baala mooshsheemmo."
Jeremiah51:37 Baabilooni diigame duuno ikkeenna, aanaho yeedaala kukkubbitanno. La""ate bararraanqanniha ikkanno; giddosi mittu manchino dihee'ranno; afihu baalu qacifatannosi."
Jeremiah51:38 Baabiloonootu baalu doobbiichimma ittantanno; doobbiichu gurba'nichi gede gurura'anno.
Jeremiah51:39 Saankaabbe heedheenna, jilaho koyisoommonsa. Dimbita geeshsha hayikkisoommonsa; hakkunni gedensaanni goxxanno; galagalteno dika'anno."
Jeremiah51:40 Saadate gede gorrantannowa haa're ha'reemmonsa. Konne coye coyi'roommohu ani Kaaliiqaati» yaanno.
Jeremiah51:41 Kaaliiqi Baabilooni daafira, «Hatte yannara mannu, ‹Gobba baala jajjannosihu Baabilooni Katami amadami! Gosa baala bararraaqqannoha ikkino!"
Jeremiah51:42 Baabilooni, diinu baaru dambali gede ikke egemmi."
Jeremiah51:43 Katammasi wayi hee'rannokkita, moolanna mullicho ikkitanno. Hakkiicho hee'rannohu dino; heleqqi yaannohano dianfanni."
Jeremiah51:44 Baabilooni magano Marduki qorichisheemmo; adhinore baala tushshiisheemmosi; layinkimeeshsho gosa diguwissannosi; Baabilooni huxxuwa to'ino› » yaanno.
Jeremiah51:45 Kaaliiqi qole, «Manna'ya, Baabilooninni xooqqine fulle! Waajjishannohu hanqi'yanni, lubbo'ne gatisi'rate fultine ba'e!"
Jeremiah51:46 Diru dirunkunni dudumbanniha, moote mootete ledo gaarantannoha, bunshete duduwo macciishshitineenna, wolqa'ne ba'oonke."
Jeremiah51:47 Baabilooni maganna gudeemmo barri daanno; mannu baalu goofeenna, baatto saalfattanno."
Jeremiah51:48 Baabilooni aliyyenni daanno diini angara eanno waro, gordunna baatto, qoleno aanansa noori ilillisanno."
Jeremiah51:49 Baabilooninni kainohunni lowo gosa gooffino; Israeelete baorano kaimu isootina, Baabilooni uwanno. Konne coye coyi'roommohu ani Kaaliiqaati» yii."
Jeremiah51:50 Kaaliiqi Baabilooni hee'ranno mannira, «Ki'ne reyotenni gattinoonniri manni'ya, rakkine fultine hadhe! Manni gobbara heedhinirono, ane Kaaliiqanna Yerusaalame habbinoonte."
Jeremiah51:51 ‹Xonnoonninke daafira, saalu amadinonke. Qullaawu Dargira Kaaliiqi Minira, wole gobba manni eino daafira, sholline umo heeshshi yinoommo› yitinanni."
Jeremiah51:52 Baabilooni maganna gudeemmohunna, baattote aana madaanonsa uratto macciishshinanni barri daanno. Konne coye coyi'roommohu ani Kaaliiqaati."
Jeremiah51:53 Baabilooni gordu iimira fule, qiisho qiishi'riro nafa, hakkiichira mare gudannosi diina soyemmo» yii."
Jeremiah51:54 Kaaliiqi, «Baattote aana daggino bao daafira, Baabilooni manni raaranno raare macciishshe!"
Jeremiah51:55 Ani Baabilooni co'o asse gude, sammi yaanno gede asseemmo. Olanto dambalu gede ikkite luultanni dagge, hedeweelcho bala tugganno."
Jeremiah51:56 Guddannosiri gaaddinosi daafira, gaaddosi qafadantu; maxxinsano hiiqqaqqami. Ani baalunkura loosisi garinni eemmoha ikkoommo daafira, Baabiloonino assino beebbara shetiseemmosi."
Jeremiah51:57 Ejjeettosi, masaalaanosi, gashshaanosi, olu hajajaanosinna gaaddosi, agge dimbitanno gede asseemmo. Dimbituhu gedensaanni goxxanno; hakkiinnino layinkimeeshsho dika'anno. Ani Moote Olantote Mootichi Kaaliiqi konne coye coyi'roommo."
Jeremiah51:58 Hala'ladu Baabilooni huxxi toe, baattote ledo xaadanno. Seeddaanna cufannasi giirantanno; mannisi daafurino mullawa gatanno. Mannisi daafure assinori baalu giirame ba""anno. Konne coye coyi'roommohu ani Olantote Mootichi Kaaliiqaati» yii."
Jeremiah51:59 Mahiseya beetti Neeriya ilinohu Seeraya moote Sedeqiyaasira gamba yiino gashshaanchooti. Sedeqiyaasi Yihudaho moohihunni shoolki diro, Seeraya isi ledo Baabilooni gobba ha'ranna, biddishsha ikkannore anga woroommosi."
Jeremiah51:60 Baabilooni aana dagganno baonna isi daafira kulloonni coye baala maxaafaho borreessoommo.
Jeremiah51:61 Seerayano, «Baabilooni iillitanni heedhenni, kunni maxaafira borreessoommore baala qoonqokki naggi assite mannaho nabbawi."
Jeremiah51:62 Hakkunni gedensaanni, ‹Mooticha'ya! Ati tenne baatto hunatto gede coyi'rootto. Kunnira lubbo afi'rino kalaqami: mannunna saada gooffeenna baatto hegerera ona ikkite gatto› yite huucci."
Jeremiah51:63 Seeraya, konne maxaafa nabbabbe gudittohu gedensaanni maxaafa kinchu ledo usurte Efiraaxisi Wayi giddo tugge,"
Jeremiah51:64 ‹Kaaliiqi aanasi abbanno baonni kainohunni Baabilooni togo ikke uwe gatanno; layinkimeeshsho hakkiinni dikaanno› yii» yoommosi. Ermiyaasi hasaawi konne goofino.
Jeremiah52:1 Sedeqiyaasi Yihudaho moohinohu 21 dirisinniiti; isi Yerusaalame teesso assi're Yihuda 11 diro gashshino. Amasi su'mi Hamuxaliiti; annise Ermiyaasi Libina Katami manchooti.
Jeremiah52:2 Alba moote Iyoaaqeemi assinonte gede, Sedeqiyaasino Kaaliiqi albaanni busha coye assino."
Jeremiah52:3 Kunnira, Kaaliiqi Yerusaalametenna Yihudu manna albisinni shorre huni. Moote Sedeqiyaasino Baabilooni moote Nabukadanatsoorira mokkookki."
Jeremiah52:4 Sedeqiyaasi moohihunni honsikki diro tonnikki aganira tonnikki barra, Nabukadanatsoori olantosi adhe daye Yerusaalame qasara doyisse amadi. Olantosino katama gaangeessite huxxu qooxeessira bushsha tuultu."
Jeremiah52:5 Kunni garinni Sedeqiyaasi moohihunni honsikki dirinni kayise tonaa mitikki diri geeshsha doyissite keeshshitu.
Jeremiah52:6 Hakko diro shoolki aganira honsikki barra, mannaho itannori goofeenna hude batidhu."
Jeremiah52:7 Diinu olanto huxxa dhoosse e'uta, Yihudu olanto hashsha fulte ba'u. Baabilooni olanto agarte heedheennanni, lamenka huxxa xaadisanno waalchi widoonni mootete gati muleenni higge Yordaanoosi Lagi widira higge hadhu."
Jeremiah52:8 Ikkollana Baabilooni olanto Sedeqiyaasi shorrite Iyyaarko mule noo xawira amadde qafaddusi; gaaddosi baalanti iso hunte xooqqu.
Jeremiah52:9 Isono Nabukadanatsooriwa haadhe massitu. Hatte yannara Nabukadanatsoori Hamaati gobbara Ribila yinanni katamira no. Sedeqiyaasirano bunshesi daafira erecco kari.
Jeremiah52:10 Hakkiicho Ribila illesi la'anna oososi shinanni gede assi; Yihudu gashshaanono shiishiishi.
Jeremiah52:11 Hakkunni gedensaanni Sedeqiyaasitano ille giddonni fushshite lekkasira quwe gante Baabilooni haadhe hadhusi. Reyanno barri geeshshano hakko Baabilooni usuranya ikke hee'ranno gede assisi.
Jeremiah52:12 Nabukadanatsoori moohihunni tonaa honsikki diro ontikki aganira tonnikki barra, mootete mini agaraasine roorrichi Nabuzardaani Yerusaalame ei."
Jeremiah52:13 Qullaawa Mine, mootete minenna Yerusaalamete hee'rino manna jajjabbunnitera giira qasi; wole qara qara minnano giire huni."
Jeremiah52:14 Olantosino Yerusaalamete huxxa diiggu.
Jeremiah52:15 Nabuzardaani gobbansa gibbe Baabiloonootu ledo heedhannore, angate ogimma afidhinorenna gama buxane ikkino manna qafade haa're ha'ri."
Jeremiah52:16 Horo buxxinore kayinni hakkiicho dargaho agurino. Insa woyinete kaashsho shuquntanno gedenna baatto hawuurtanno gede assino.
Jeremiah52:17 Baabiloonootu Qullaawa Mine noota camotenni seekkinoonni tuuqqa, uduunne aanaho worrannire lekka afi'rinorenna camotenni seekkinoonnita waa worrannita jawa gawate hiiqqaqqitu. Camo baala kayinni Baabilooni adhite hadhu."
Jeremiah52:18 Kerra, qarawa, buluulo fushshinannire, xiltaame saannanna mooqquwa, qoleno camotenni seekkinoonniha Qullaawu Mini uduunne baala adhite hadhu."
Jeremiah52:19 Nabuzardaani xiltaame saanna, hixaana giirrannire, xiltuwa, kerra, caabbicho worranniha, mooqquwa agattote fushshaate shiqinshannirenna culkunninna birrunni seekkinoonni uduunne baala adhe ha'ri."
Jeremiah52:20 Moote Selemooni Kaaliiqi Minira ikkanno gede seekkisiisino uduunne: 2 tuuqqa, uduunne aanaho worranniha lekka afi'rinoricho, 12 bootu suudinni seekkinoonnita wayinnita jajjabba camote gawatta aanaho worrannire baala adhe ha'ri. Kore baala seekkinoonni camo lowota ikkitino daafira keenne dila'noonni."
Jeremiah52:21 Lamunku tuuqi mittu suudinni seekkinoonniho. Mittu mittunku seendille 18 cigile, du'mille 12 cigile ikkitanno; tuuqqano giddo boombete; tuuqqate gooro du'millino taakkote darateeti."
Jeremiah52:22 Lamenka tuuqo umo camotenni seekkinoonni. Hojja 5 cigile assine meemmotenna shaffote suudinni seesiinsoonni.
Jeremiah52:23 Mittu mittunkura 100 shaffo noonsa. Kuri giddonni 96 shaffo uulla hee'neennanni leeltanno.
Jeremiah52:24 Nabuzardaani qeesootu roorricha Seeraya, isi hoodeha qeesicha Soffooniyaasinna wole 3 Qullaawu Mini roorroota amade haa're ha'ri."
Jeremiah52:25 Katamu gaaddo hajajaancho, hatte yanna geeshsha katamaho keeshshitinore 7 mootete amaalaasine, olantote haja borreessannoha olu hajajaanchi hoodehanna wole 60 jajjabba manna haa're ha'ri."
Jeremiah52:26 Konne manna baala Hamaati gobbara Ribila katamira noohuwa Baabilooni mootewa haa're ha'ri.
Jeremiah52:27 Mooteno hakkiicho gansiise shettotenni reyitanno gede assi. Yihudu manni gobbansanni kunni garinni qafadame ha'rino.
Jeremiah52:28 Nabukadanatsoori qafade haa're ha'rino manni kiiro aante noote: moohihunni lamalki diro 3,023 manna qafadino."
Jeremiah52:29 Moohihunni tonaa settikki diro, 832 manna Yerusaalametenni,"
Jeremiah52:30 qoleno moohihunni lemiina sayikki diro, 745 manna Nabuzardaani qafade haa're ha'rino. Qafande haa'ne ha'noonni manni kiiro mitteenni 4,600."
Jeremiah52:31 Moote Ewili-Merodaaki Baabilooni moohi yannara, Yoakiini qafadamihunni sajjiina lamalki diro, tonaa layinki aganira lemiina ontikki barra usurunni tirisi."
Jeremiah52:32 Isi Yoakiinira dancha coye assinosi. Isi gede qafadante Baabilooni heedhino mootoolla baalantenni roore ayirrado darga uyinosi.
Jeremiah52:33 Yoakiini usuru mini imaana soorri're, reya geeshsha mootete ledo itanno gede assinoonnisi."
Jeremiah52:34 Lubbotenni hee'ri geeshsha barru barrunkunni hasiisannosire baala uyinannasi hee'rino.
Lamentations1:1 Mannu wo'me hee'rannoti Yerusaalame, hiitto fano gattu! Gobba gosa ayirrisseenna heedhinoti, galte shiidhino mancho gede hiitto callase gattu! Katammate giddo mootitte ikkite heedhinoti, kuneeti borojjicho ikkitino."
Lamentations1:2 Hashsha wo'ma lowo geeshsha wi'litanna, baqqaallisera hindiiddo daaddanno. Albi baxillaanose baalate giddonni, sheshifachishannosehu mittu nafa dino. Halese ikkitinori baalu badhe wodhitinose; diina ikkitinose."
Lamentations1:3 Yihudu manni lowo qarrinna borojjimmate loosi gedensaanni, gobbansanni qafadame ha'rino. Hadhe wole gosa ledo heedhino; fooliishshidhannowano diafidhino. Gadadissannonsari qarru giddo heedheenna dagge, fultannokki gede assite amaddinonsa."
Lamentations1:4 Ayyaana ayirrisate Qullaawu Minira daannohu nookki daafira, Tsiyooni doogga ca'lamaddi yitino. Katamu waalchuwa onate; qeesootise wi'litino. Seennise yaadanno; Tsiyoonino dadillu giddo no."
Lamentations1:5 Cubbise batinyinni kainohunni, Kaaliiqi shetisinose daafira, diinnase isera umo ikkitino; insara baalu coyi qiniinonsa. Oososeno diinu qafadanno gede assino."
Lamentations1:6 Yerusaalamete gaamaarre baala sa'e hadhino. Albisootise hudi'rino geedimi gede daafurtino; shorritannonsariwiinni xooqqe fulate wolqa diafidhino.
Lamentations1:7 Diigante mullicho gattino Yerusaalame, xa albi xumillese heddanni no. Diinu anga ubbu yannara mittuno kaa'linosehu dino; qeeltuserino uwase la'e oso'litino."
